PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Client.Components.SideButton

-- https://lua.expert/
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Fusion = require(ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion)
require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.PrimaryProcessor)
local devicetypewas = nil
local function checkDeviceType() --[[ checkDeviceType | Line: 15 | Upvalues: devicetypewas (ref) ]]
	local ViewportSize = workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize
	if ViewportSize.X >= 1024 and ViewportSize.Y >= 768 then
		devicetypewas = "iPad"
		return
	end
	if ViewportSize.X >= 800 and ViewportSize.Y >= 480 then
		return "mobile"
	end
	if game:GetService("UserInputService").KeyboardEnabled or game:GetService("UserInputService").MouseEnabled then
		return "pc"
	else
		return "mobile"
	end
end
devicetypewas = checkDeviceType()
print("device type was", devicetypewas, "according to other")
game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:Connect(function(p1) --[[ Line: 35 | Upvalues: devicetypewas (ref), checkDeviceType (copy) ]]
	if p1.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		devicetypewas = checkDeviceType()
		return
	end
	if p1.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
		return
	end
	devicetypewas = "pc"
end)
return function(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 44 | Upvalues: Fusion (copy), devicetypewas (ref) ]]
	local v1 = p1:New("TextButton")
	local t = {
		Visible = p2.Visible,
		AutomaticSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.XY,
		BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0),
		Active = false,
		Selectable = false,
		Modal = false,
		AutoButtonColor = false,
		[Fusion.OnEvent("MouseButton1Click")] = p2.Clicked
	}
	local t2 = {}
	local v2 = p1:New("UIListLayout")({
		FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal,
		VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center,
		Padding = UDim.new(0, 8),
		SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
	})
	local v3 = p1:New("UIGradient")({
		Rotation = 90,
		Transparency = NumberSequence.new({ NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.65), NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0.5) })
	})
	local v4 = p1:New("UICorner")({
		CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
	})
	local v5 = p1:New("UIPadding")({
		PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 16),
		PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 16),
		PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 10),
		PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 10)
	})
	local v6 = p1:New("ImageLabel")
	local t3 = {
		BackgroundTransparency = 1
	}
	t3.Size = if devicetypewas == "mobile" then UDim2.fromOffset(16, 16) else UDim2.fromOffset(40, 40)
	t3.Image = p2.Icon
	t3.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	local v8 = v6(t3)
	local v9 = p1:New("TextLabel")
	local t4 = {
		BackgroundTransparency = 1,
		AutomaticSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.XY,
		Text = p2.Text
	}
	t4.TextSize = if devicetypewas == "mobile" then 14 else 35
	t4.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	t4.FontFace = Font.fromName("Montserrat", Enum.FontWeight.Bold)
	t2[1] = v2
	t2[2] = v3
	t2[3] = v4
	t2[4] = v5
	t2[5] = v8
	t2[6] = v9(t4)
	t[Fusion.Children] = t2
	return v1(t)
end

					local v1 = p1(p2.Price)
					if p1(p2.Owned) then
						return "OWNED"
					else
						return "\238\128\130" .. tostring(v1)
					end
				end),
				Color = p1:Computed(function(p1) --[[ Line: 295 | Upvalues: p2 (copy) ]]
					if p1(p2.Owned) then
						return Color3.fromRGB(180, 180, 180)
					else
						return Color3.fromRGB(85, 255, 0)
					end
				end)
			}) }

-- https://lua.expert/
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
game:GetService("Workspace")
game:GetService("TweenService")
game:GetService("Debris")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local Tools = PlayerGui:WaitForChild("Tools")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local v1 = if Shared then Shared:WaitForChild("Data") else Shared
local v2 = v1 and require(v1.Tools)
local v3 = v1 and require(v1.Vehicles)
local v4 = "Tools"
local t = {
	SwitchArea = function(p1, p2) --[[ SwitchArea | Line: 43 | Upvalues: v4 (ref), Tools (copy) ]]
		if p2 == v4 then
			return
		end
		local v1 = Tools.Frame:FindFirstChild(v4)
		if v1 then
			v1.Visible = false
		end
		local v2 = Tools.Frame:FindFirstChild(p2)
		if v2 then
			v2.Visible = true
		end
		v4 = p2
	end,
	GetCameraDistance = function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ GetCameraDistance | Line: 61 ]]
		local v2 = (p2:IsA("Model") and p2:GetModelSize() or p2.Size).Magnitude * 0.5
		return v2 / math.tan((math.rad(p3.FieldOfView / 2)))
	end,
	CheckToolEquipped = function(p1, p2) --[[ CheckToolEquipped | Line: 69 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (copy) ]]
		local Backpack = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
		local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
		if Backpack and Backpack:FindFirstChild(p2) then
			return true
		end
		return Character and Character:FindFirstChild(p2) and true or false
	end
}
function t.LoadAllTools(p1) --[[ LoadAllTools | Line: 84 | Upvalues: v2 (copy), Tools (copy), Shared (copy), t (copy), Remotes (copy) ]]
	for k, v in pairs(v2) do
		if not Tools.Frame.Tools:FindFirstChild(k) then
			local v1 = Tools.Frame.Tools.Template:Clone()
			v1.Parent = Tools.Frame.Tools
			v1.Visible = true
			v1.Name = k
			local v22 = Shared.Tools:FindFirstChild(k)
			local v3 = if v22 then v22:Clone() else v22
			if v3 then
				v3:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(0, 0, 0))
				local Camera = Instance.new("Camera", v1.Tool)
				v1.Tool.CurrentCamera = Camera
				v3.Parent = v1.Tool
				Camera.CFrame = v3.PrimaryPart.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, -179.5, 0) * CFrame.new(0, 0, t:GetCameraDistance(v3, Camera))
			end
			v1.Equipped.Visible = t:CheckToolEquipped(k)
			v1.Button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 107 | Upvalues: t (ref), k (copy), Remotes (ref) ]]
				if t:CheckToolEquipped(k) then
					Remotes.ToolUnequip:FireServer(k)
				else
					Remotes.ToolEquip:FireServer(k)
				end
			end)
		end
	end
end
function t.LoadAllVehicles(p1) --[[ LoadAllVehicles | Line: 118 | Upvalues: v3 (copy), Tools (copy), Shared (copy), t (copy), Remotes (copy) ]]
	for k, v in pairs(v3) do
		if not Tools.Frame.Vehicles:FindFirstChild(k) then
			local v1 = Tools.Frame.Vehicles.Template:Clone()
			v1.Parent = Tools.Frame.Vehicles
			v1.Visible = true
			v1.Name = k
			local v2 = Shared.Vehicles:FindFirstChild(k)
			local v32 = if v2 then v2:Clone() else v2
			if v32 then
				v32:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(0, 0, 0))
				local Camera = Instance.new("Camera", v1.Tool)
				v1.Tool.CurrentCamera = Camera
				v32.Parent = v1.Tool
				Camera.CFrame = v32.PrimaryPart.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, -179.5, 0) * CFrame.new(0, 0, t:GetCameraDistance(v32, Camera))
			end
			v1.Equipped.Visible = t:CheckToolEquipped(k)
			v1.Button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 141 | Upvalues: t (ref), k (copy), Remotes (ref) ]]
				if t:CheckToolEquipped(k) then
					Remotes.ToolUnequip:FireServer(k)
				else
					Remotes.ToolEquip:FireServer(k)
				end
			end)
		end
	end
end
function t.MonitorTools(p1) --[[ MonitorTools | Line: 152 | Upvalues: Tools (copy), t (copy), LocalPlayer (copy) ]]
	local function UpdateToolUI() --[[ UpdateToolUI | Line: 153 | Upvalues: Tools (ref), t (ref) ]]
		for i, v in ipairs(Tools.Frame.Tools:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Frame") and v.Name ~= "Template" then
				v.Equipped.Visible = t:CheckToolEquipped(v.Name)
			end
		end
		for i, v in ipairs(Tools.Frame.Vehicles:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Frame") and v.Name ~= "Template" then
				v.Equipped.Visible = t:CheckToolEquipped(v.Name)
			end
		end
	end
	local function SetupCharacterMonitoring(p1) --[[ SetupCharacterMonitoring | Line: 166 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (ref), UpdateToolUI (copy) ]]
		local Backpack = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Backpack")
		Backpack.ChildAdded:Connect(UpdateToolUI)
		Backpack.ChildRemoved:Connect(UpdateToolUI)
		p1.ChildAdded:Connect(UpdateToolUI)
		p1.ChildRemoved:Connect(UpdateToolUI)
	end
	local v1 = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
	SetupCharacterMonitoring(v1)
	LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(p1) --[[ Line: 179 | Upvalues: SetupCharacterMonitoring (copy), UpdateToolUI (copy) ]]
		SetupCharacterMonitoring(p1)
		UpdateToolUI()
	end)
	UpdateToolUI()
end
function t.Toggle(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Toggle | Line: 188 | Upvalues: Tools (copy), Remotes (copy) ]]
	if p2 then
		Tools.Enabled = p3
	else
		Tools.Enabled = not Tools.Enabled
	end
	Remotes.ForceDisableDoll:Fire(not Tools.Enabled)
end
function t.Init(p1) --[[ Init | Line: 197 | Upvalues: t (copy), Tools (copy), Remotes (copy), PlayerGui (copy) ]]
	t:LoadAllTools()
	t:LoadAllVehicles()
	t:MonitorTools()
	for k, v in pairs(Tools.Frame.Areas:GetChildren()) do
		if v.ClassName == "TextButton" and Tools.Frame:FindFirstChild(v.Name) then
			v.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 204 | Upvalues: t (ref), v (copy) ]]
				t:SwitchArea(v.Name)
			end)
		end
	end
	Tools.Frame.Close.Button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 210 | Upvalues: Tools (ref), Remotes (ref), PlayerGui (ref) ]]
		Tools.Enabled = false
		Remotes.ForceDisableDoll:Fire(not Tools.Enabled)
		if not PlayerGui then
			return
		end
		local DetectTool = PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("DetectTool", true)
		if not DetectTool then
			return
		end
		DetectTool.Visible = true
	end)
end
t:Init()
return t

		v1 = "iPad"

		return "pc"
	else
		return "mobile"
	end
end

			Character:SetAttribute("emoteInvite", false)
		end
	end

		return
	end
	v1.Visible = p1

local function createMobileControls() --[[ createMobileControls | Line: 73 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]

local function getDesiredVelocity() --[[ getDesiredVelocity | Line: 128 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), v5 (ref), t2 (copy), Humanoid (ref), CurrentCamera (copy), v2 (ref), t (copy) ]]
	local sum = Vector3.new()
	local v1 = false
	if UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() then
		if not (v5 and t2.isMoving) then
			return sum
		end
		t2.isMoving = false
		v5.flightTrack:Stop()
		v5.flightIdleTrack:Play()
		return sum
	else
		if UserInputService.TouchEnabled and not UserInputService.KeyboardEnabled then
			local MoveDirection = Humanoid.MoveDirection
			if MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
				sum = MoveDirection
				v1 = true
			end
			if t2.isTouchingUp then
				sum = sum + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
				v1 = true
			end
			if t2.isTouchingDown then
				v1 = true
				sum = sum - Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
			end
		else
			local LookVector = CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector
			local RightVector = CurrentCamera.CFrame.RightVector
			local v22 = if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) and not v2 then 1 else 0
			local v4 = v22 - (if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) and not v2 then 1 else 0)
			local v6 = if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) and not v2 then 1 else 0
			local v8 = Vector3.new(v4, 0, v6 - (if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) and not v2 then 1 else 0))
			if v8.Magnitude > 0 then
				sum = RightVector * v8.X + LookVector * v8.Z
				v1 = true
			end
			if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) and not v2 then
				v1 = true
				sum = sum + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
			end
		end
		if v1 ~= t2.isMoving and v5 then
			t2.isMoving = v1
			if v1 then
				v5.flightIdleTrack:Stop()
				v5.flightTrack:Play()
			else
				v5.flightTrack:Stop()
				v5.flightIdleTrack:Play()
			end
		end
		return sum.Magnitude > 0 and sum.Unit * t.FLIGHT_SPEED or sum
	end
end
local function TrackGPE() --[[ TrackGPE | Line: 193 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), v2 (ref) ]]
	UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 194 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
		v2 = if p1.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Unknown or (p1.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 or (p1.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift or p1.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.F)) then false else p2
	end)
end
local function startFlying() --[[ startFlying | Line: 204 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), Humanoid (ref), v5 (ref), HumanoidRootPart (ref), UserInputService (copy), createMobileControls (copy), LocalPlayer (copy), RunService (copy), getDesiredVelocity (copy), t (copy), CurrentCamera (copy) ]]
	if t2.isFlying then
		return
	end
	t2.isFlying = true
	Humanoid:SetAttribute("Flying", true)
	if v5 then
		v5.flightIdleTrack:Play()
	end
	Humanoid.PlatformStand = true
	Humanoid.AutoRotate = false
	local FlightVl = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
	FlightVl.Name = "FlightVl"
	FlightVl.MaxForce = Vector3.new(inf, inf, inf)
	FlightVl.Parent = HumanoidRootPart
	local FlightAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
	FlightAttachment.Name = "FlightAttachment"
	FlightAttachment.Parent = HumanoidRootPart
	local FlightAlign = Instance.new("AlignOrientation")
	FlightAlign.Name = "FlightAlign"
	FlightAlign.Mode = Enum.OrientationAlignmentMode.OneAttachment
	FlightAlign.Attachment0 = FlightAttachment
	FlightAlign.RigidityEnabled = false
	FlightAlign.Responsiveness = 15
	FlightAlign.MaxTorque = (1 / 0)
	FlightAlign.Parent = HumanoidRootPart
	if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
		createMobileControls().Parent = LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
		if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
			local TouchGui = LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui")
			if TouchGui then
				local v1 = TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame", true) and TouchGui.TouchControlFrame:FindFirstChild("JumpButton")
				if v1 then
					v1.Visible = false
				end
			end
		end
	end
	local v2 = 0
	RunService:BindToRenderStep("FlightUpdate", Enum.RenderPriority.Character.Value, function(p1) --[[ Line: 243 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), getDesiredVelocity (ref), t2 (ref), t (ref), FlightVl (copy), FlightAlign (copy), CurrentCamera (ref) ]]
		local v1 = tick()
		if v1 - v2 < 0.016 then
			return
		end
		v2 = v1
		local v22 = getDesiredVelocity()
		t2.currentVelocity = t2.currentVelocity:Lerp(v22, v22.Magnitude > t2.currentVelocity.Magnitude and t.ACCELERATION or t.DECELERATION)
		FlightVl.Velocity = t2.currentVelocity
		if not (t2.currentVelocity.Magnitude > t.VELOCITY_THRESHOLD) then
			FlightAlign.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(0, 0, 0), CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector)
			return
		end
		local Unit = t2.currentVelocity.Unit
		local v6 = CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(0, 0, 0), Unit)
		if Unit.Y == 0 then
			local Angles = CFrame.Angles
			v6 = v6 * Angles(math.rad(-t.TILT_ANGLE), 0, 0)
		end
		FlightAlign.CFrame = v6
	end)
end
local function stopFlying() --[[ stopFlying | Line: 275 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), Humanoid (ref), v5 (ref), UserInputService (copy), LocalPlayer (copy), RunService (copy), HumanoidRootPart (ref) ]]
	if not t2.isFlying then
		return
	end
	t2.isFlying = false
	t2.isMoving = false
	t2.currentVelocity = Vector3.new()
	t2.isTouchingUp = false
	t2.isTouchingDown = false
	Humanoid:SetAttribute("Flying", false)
	if v5 then
		v5.flightTrack:Stop()
		v5.flightIdleTrack:Stop()
	end
	Humanoid.PlatformStand = false
	Humanoid.AutoRotate = true
	if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
		local TouchGui = LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui")
		if TouchGui then
			local v1 = TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame", true) and TouchGui.TouchControlFrame:FindFirstChild("JumpButton")
			if v1 then
				v1.Visible = true
			end
		end
	end
	RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep("FlightUpdate")
	if LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("FlightControls") then
		LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.FlightControls:Destroy()
	end
	for i, v in ipairs(HumanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do
		if v.Name == "FlightVl" or (v.Name == "FlightAlign" or v.Name == "FlightAttachment") then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

end

			if not p1:IsA("Tool") or p1.Name ~= "Money Throw" and (p1.Name ~= "Selfie Stick" and (p1.Name ~= "Camera" and (p1.Name ~= "WaterGun" and (p1.Name ~= "Draco" and p1.Name ~= "Money Spread")))) then
				return
			end
			v3 = false
			v1:SetSyncEnabled(false)
			v4 = true
		end
		local function ChildRemoved(p1) --[[ ChildRemoved | Line: 281 | Upvalues: v3 (ref), v1 (ref), v4 (ref) ]]
			if not p1:IsA("Tool") or p1.Name ~= "Money Throw" and (p1.Name ~= "Selfie Stick" and (p1.Name ~= "Camera" and (p1.Name ~= "WaterGun" and (p1.Name ~= "Draco" and p1.Name ~= "Money Spread")))) then
				return
			end
			v3 = true
			v1:SetSyncEnabled(true)
			v4 = false
		end
		local function FightingChanged() --[[ FightingChanged | Line: 289 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (ref), v3 (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
			if LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("Fighting") then
				v3 = false
				v1:StopAnimation()
				v1:SetSyncEnabled(false)
			else
				v3 = true
				v1:SetSyncEnabled(true)
			end
		end
		for v22, v32 in p1:GetChildren() do
			ChildAdded(v32)
		end
		v12:Connect(p1.ChildAdded, ChildAdded)
		v12:Connect(p1.ChildRemoved, ChildRemoved)
		v12:Connect(LocalPlayer:GetAttributeChangedSignal("Fighting"), FightingChanged)

			v12:Connect(RunService.Heartbeat, function() --[[ Line: 309 | Upvalues: Humanoid (copy), v3 (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
				if Humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 then
					v3 = true
					v1:SetSyncEnabled(true)
				else
					v3 = false
					v1:SetSyncEnabled(false)
				end
			end)
		end

			if not v1 then
				return
			end

			if not v22 then
				return
			end
			if v22.PlaybackRegionsEnabled then
				Promise.new(function(p12) --[[ Line: 329 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), v22 (copy) ]]
					while p1.Length == 0 do
						v22.Volume = 0
						task.wait()
					end
					p12(p1.Length)
				end):andThen(function(p12) --[[ Line: 335 | Upvalues: v22 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
					v22.PlaybackRegion = NumberRange.new(0, p12)
					v22.TimePosition = p1.TimePosition
					v22.PlaybackSpeed = p1.Speed
					v22.Volume = if v22:GetAttribute("muted") then 0 else v22:GetAttribute("volume") or 0
				end)
			end
			v22:Play()
			v2 = v22
			p1.Stopped:Once(function() --[[ Line: 346 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
				if not v2 then
					return
				end
				v2:Stop()
				v2 = nil
			end)
		end)
		v12:Add(function() --[[ Line: 355 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			if not v2 then
				return
			end
			v2:Stop()
		end)

			v12:Clean()
			v3 = DataController:GetData().Settings.Sync
			v1:SetSyncEnabled(v3)
		end)
	end

		CharacterAdded(LocalPlayer.Character)
	end
	LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(CharacterAdded)

		if v22 ~= LocalPlayer then

		end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Controllers.DLCAdvertsController

-- https://lua.expert/
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
game:GetService("RunService")
local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
game:GetService("ContentProvider")
game:GetService("UserInputService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local GlobalMessage = Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("GlobalMessage")
local Knit = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Knit)
require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Promise)
require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Signal)
require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)
require(ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.MouseTracker)
local v1 = Knit.CreateController({
	Name = "DLCAdvertsController"
})
local function tweenMega(p1) --[[ tweenMega | Line: 29 | Upvalues: TweenService (copy) ]]
	if not p1 then
		return
	end
	if not p1:IsA("Model") then
		return
	end
	for k, v in pairs(p1:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") then
			TweenService:Create(v, TweenInfo.new(2, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true, 0), {
				Size = v.Size + Vector3.new(1, 1, 1),
				Position = v.Position + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
			}):Play()
		end
	end
	spawn(function() --[[ Line: 39 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), TweenService (ref) ]]
		while wait(0.01) do
			for k, v in pairs(p1:GetDescendants()) do
				if v:IsA("BasePart") then
					local v1 = TweenService:Create(v, TweenInfo.new(0.01, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {
						Orientation = v.Orientation + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
					})
					v1:Play()
					v1:Destroy()
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end
local function createProximityPrompt(p1) --[[ createProximityPrompt | Line: 54 | Upvalues: Players (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
	local ProximityPrompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
	ProximityPrompt.ActionText = "Use Megaphone"
	ProximityPrompt.ObjectText = "Megaphone"
	ProximityPrompt.HoldDuration = 0.2
	ProximityPrompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
	ProximityPrompt.MaxActivationDistance = 5
	ProximityPrompt.Parent = p1
	ProximityPrompt.Triggered:Connect(function(p1_2) --[[ Line: 63 | Upvalues: Players (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
		if p1_2.UserId ~= Players.LocalPlayer.UserId then
			return
		end
		v1:Open()
	end)
end
local function initializeMegaphone() --[[ initializeMegaphone | Line: 70 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy), CollectionService (copy), tweenMega (copy), Players (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
	local Megaphone = ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Tools:FindFirstChild("Megaphone")
	if not Megaphone then
		return
	end
	for i, v in ipairs((CollectionService:GetTagged("DLCMegaphone"))) do
		if v:IsA("Model") then
			local v2 = Megaphone:Clone()
			v2:PivotTo(v:GetPivot())
			v2.Parent = workspace
			local v3 = v2:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
			if v3 then
				tweenMega(v2)
				local ProximityPrompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
				ProximityPrompt.ActionText = "Use Megaphone"
				ProximityPrompt.ObjectText = "Megaphone"
				ProximityPrompt.HoldDuration = 0.2
				ProximityPrompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
				ProximityPrompt.MaxActivationDistance = 5
				ProximityPrompt.Parent = v3
				ProximityPrompt.Triggered:Connect(function(p1_2) --[[ Line: 63 | Upvalues: Players (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
					if p1_2.UserId ~= Players.LocalPlayer.UserId then
						return
					end
					v1:Open()
				end)
			end
		end
	end
end
function v1.KnitStart(p1) --[[ KnitStart | Line: 91 | Upvalues: initializeMegaphone (copy), GlobalMessage (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
	initializeMegaphone()
	GlobalMessage.Frame.Close.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 94 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
		v1:Close()
	end)
	GlobalMessage.Frame.Submit.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 98 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
		v1:Submit()
	end)
end
function v1.Submit(p1) --[[ Submit | Line: 103 | Upvalues: GlobalMessage (copy), v1 (copy), ReplicatedStorage (copy) ]]
	if GlobalMessage.Frame.Message.Text == "" then
		return
	end
	local Text = GlobalMessage.Frame.Message.Text
	if typeof(Text) ~= "string" then
		return
	end
	v1:Close()
	ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.PurchaseMessage:FireServer(Text)
end
function v1.Open(p1) --[[ Open | Line: 120 | Upvalues: GlobalMessage (copy) ]]
	GlobalMessage.Enabled = true
end
function v1.Close(p1) --[[ Close | Line: 124 | Upvalues: GlobalMessage (copy) ]]
	GlobalMessage.Enabled = false
	GlobalMessage.Frame.Message.Text = ""
end
return v1

	ClassName = "Maid"

function t.new() --[[ new | Line: 18 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

		_tasks = {}
	}, t)
end
function t.isMaid(p1) --[[ isMaid | Line: 24 ]]
	return if type(p1) == "table" then p1.ClassName == "Maid" else false
end
function t.__index(p1, p2) --[[ __index | Line: 30 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t[p2] then
		return t[p2]
	else
		return p1._tasks[p2]
	end
end
function t.__newindex(p1, p2, p3) --[[ __newindex | Line: 47 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t[p2] ~= nil then
		error(("\'%s\' is reserved"):format((tostring(p2))), 2)
	end
	local _tasks = p1._tasks
	local v1 = _tasks[p2]
	if v1 == p3 then
		return
	end
	_tasks[p2] = p3
	if not v1 then
		return
	end
	if type(v1) == "function" then
		v1()
		return
	end
	if typeof(v1) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
		v1:Disconnect()
		return
	end
	if v1.Destroy then
		v1:Destroy()
		return
	end
	if not v1.destroy then
		return
	end
	v1:destroy()
end
function t.giveTask(p1, p2) --[[ giveTask | Line: 77 ]]
	if not p2 then
		error("Task cannot be false or nil", 2)
	end
	local v1 = #p1._tasks + 1
	p1[v1] = p2
	if type(p2) ~= "table" or (p2.Destroy or p2.destroy) then
		return v1
	end
	warn("[Maid.GiveTask] - Gave table task without .Destroy\n\n" .. debug.traceback())
	return v1
end
function t.give(p1, p2) --[[ give | Line: 109 ]]
	if type(p2) == "table" and p2.isAPromise then
		local v1, v2 = p1:givePromise(p2)
		_ = v1
		return p2, v2
	end
	return p2, p1:giveTask(p2)
end
function t.doCleaning(p1) --[[ doCleaning | Line: 121 ]]
	local _tasks = p1._tasks
	for k, v in pairs(_tasks) do
		if typeof(v) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			_tasks[k] = nil
			v:Disconnect()
		end
	end
	local v1, v2 = next(_tasks)
	while v2 ~= nil do
		_tasks[v1] = nil
		if type(v2) == "function" then
			v2()
		elseif typeof(v2) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			v2:Disconnect()
		elseif v2.Destroy then
			v2:Destroy()
		elseif v2.destroy then
			v2:destroy()
		end
		local v3, v4 = next(_tasks)
		v2, v1 = v4, v3
	end
end
t.destroy = t.doCleaning
t.clean = t.doCleaning
return t

function t.Start(p1) --[[ Start | Line: 41 | Upvalues: RunService (copy), CurrentCamera (copy), Mouse (copy), v1 (ref) ]]
	if not p1.MouseTrackingConnection then
		p1.MouseTrackingConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 46 | Upvalues: CurrentCamera (ref), p1 (copy), Mouse (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
			local v12, v2 = CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(p1.TrackingInstance.Position)
			if not v2 then
				return
			end
			local v3 = Mouse:GetMouseLocation()
			local Magnitude = (Vector2.new(v12.X, v12.Y) - v3).Magnitude
			p1.CurrentMouseDistance = Magnitude
			if Magnitude < math.clamp(CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Magnitude / 15, 40, 300) then
				if p1.MouseInZone then
					return
				end
				if not v1 then
					v1 = p1
					p1.MouseInZone = true
					p1.MouseEntered:Fire()
					return
				end
				if v1.CurrentMouseDistance < Magnitude then
					return
				end
				v1.MouseInZone = false
				v1.MouseLeft:Fire()
				v1 = p1
				p1.MouseInZone = true
				p1.MouseEntered:Fire()
				return
			end
			if not p1.MouseInZone then
				return
			end
			p1.MouseInZone = false
			p1.MouseLeft:Fire()
		end)
	end
end
function t.Stop(p1) --[[ Stop | Line: 81 ]]

		return
	end
	p1.MouseTrackingConnection:Disconnect()
	p1.MouseTrackingConnection = nil
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 88 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]

function v4.set(p1_2, p2_2, p3_2, p4_2, p5_2) --[[ set | Line: 697 ]]

	if type(p4_2) == "string" then
		p4_2 = p4_2:lower()
	end

			if p4_2 == "deselected" or p4_2 == "selected" then

				table.insert(tbl2, p4_2)
			else

			end
			for k2, v in pairs(tbl2) do
				v1.values[v] = p3_2
				if p5_2 ~= "_ignorePrevious" then
					v1.additionalValues["previous_" .. v] = v4
				end
				if type(p5_2) == "string" then
					v1.additionalValues[p5_2 .. "_" .. v] = v4
				end
			end

			v1.value = p3_2

				end

			end

		end

			return p1_2, "Value was already set"
		end

end
function v4.get(p1_2, p2_2, p3_2, p4_2) --[[ get | Line: 792 ]]

	assert(if v1 == nil then false else true, ("setting \'%s\' does not exist"):format(p2_2))
	local v3 = nil
	local v4 = nil
	if typeof(p3_2) == "string" then
		p3_2 = p3_2:lower()

function v4._updateDropdown(p1_2) --[[ _updateDropdown | Line: 1944 ]]

		return p1_2:get("order") < p2_2:get("order")

	for i = 1, v1 do
		local v3
		local v4 = p1_2.dropdownIcons[i]

function t._updateSelectionGroup(p1, p2) --[[ _updateSelectionGroup | Line: 695 | Upvalues: t (copy), GuiService (copy) ]]

function t._determineControllerDisplay() --[[ _determineControllerDisplay | Line: 946 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), t (copy), v11 (ref) ]]

	local GamepadEnabled = UserInputService.GamepadEnabled
	local v1 = t.getIcon("_TopbarControllerOption")
	if MouseEnabled and GamepadEnabled then
		if v11 then
			v1:setEnabled(false)
		else
			v1:setEnabled(true)
		end
	else
		if MouseEnabled and not GamepadEnabled then
			v1:setEnabled(false)
			t._enableControllerMode(false)
			v1:deselect()
			return
		end
		if MouseEnabled or not GamepadEnabled then
			return
		end
		v1:setEnabled(false)
		t._enableControllerMode(true)
	end
end

return {
	addToReplicatedStorage = function() --[[ addToReplicatedStorage | Line: 9 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy) ]]
		if ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(script.Name) then
			return false
		else
			local v1 = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
			v1.Name = script.Name
			v1.Value = script.Parent
			v1.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
			return v1
		end
	end,
	getObject = function() --[[ getObject | Line: 21 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy) ]]
		local v1 = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(script.Name)
		if v1 then
			return v1
		else
			return false
		end
	end
}

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.Icon_Old.Maid

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {
	ClassName = "Maid"
}
function t.new() --[[ new | Line: 18 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	return setmetatable({
		_tasks = {}
	}, t)
end
function t.isMaid(p1) --[[ isMaid | Line: 24 ]]
	return if type(p1) == "table" then p1.ClassName == "Maid" else false
end
function t.__index(p1, p2) --[[ __index | Line: 30 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t[p2] then
		return t[p2]
	else
		return p1._tasks[p2]
	end
end
function t.__newindex(p1, p2, p3) --[[ __newindex | Line: 47 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t[p2] ~= nil then
		error(("\'%s\' is reserved"):format((tostring(p2))), 2)
	end
	local _tasks = p1._tasks
	local v1 = _tasks[p2]
	if v1 == p3 then
		return
	end
	_tasks[p2] = p3
	if not v1 then
		return
	end
	if type(v1) == "function" then
		v1()
		return
	end
	if typeof(v1) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
		v1:Disconnect()
		return
	end
	if v1.Destroy then
		v1:Destroy()
		return
	end
	if not v1.destroy then
		return
	end
	v1:destroy()
end
function t.giveTask(p1, p2) --[[ giveTask | Line: 77 ]]
	if not p2 then
		error("Task cannot be false or nil", 2)
	end
	local v1 = #p1._tasks + 1
	p1[v1] = p2
	if type(p2) ~= "table" or (p2.Destroy or p2.destroy) then
		return v1
	end
	warn("[Maid.GiveTask] - Gave table task without .Destroy\n\n" .. debug.traceback())
	return v1
end
function t.give(p1, p2) --[[ give | Line: 109 ]]
	if type(p2) == "table" and p2.isAPromise then
		local v1, v2 = p1:givePromise(p2)
		_ = v1
		return p2, v2
	end
	return p2, p1:giveTask(p2)
end
function t.doCleaning(p1) --[[ doCleaning | Line: 121 ]]
	local _tasks = p1._tasks
	for k, v in pairs(_tasks) do
		if typeof(v) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			_tasks[k] = nil
			v:Disconnect()
		end
	end
	local v1, v2 = next(_tasks)
	while v2 ~= nil do
		_tasks[v1] = nil
		if type(v2) == "function" then
			v2()
		elseif typeof(v2) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			v2:Disconnect()
		elseif v2.Destroy then
			v2:Destroy()
		elseif v2.destroy then
			v2:destroy()
		end
		local v3, v4 = next(_tasks)
		v2, v1 = v4, v3
	end
end
t.destroy = t.doCleaning
t.clean = t.doCleaning
return t



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.Slider

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {
	Sliders = {}
}
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
assert(RunService:IsClient(), "Slider module can only be used on the Client!")
local Utils = script.Utils
local Signal = require(Utils.Signal)
local SliderFuncs = require(Utils.SliderFuncs)
function t.__index(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 28 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	for i, v in ipairs({
		{ ".OnChange", ".Changed", (rawget(p1, "Changed")) }
	}) do
		if string.sub(v[1], 2) == p2 then
			warn(string.format("%s is deprecated, please use %s instead", v[1], v[2]))
			return v[3]
		end
	end
	return t[p2]
end
function t.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 54 | Upvalues: t (copy), SliderFuncs (copy), Signal (copy) ]]
	assert(pcall(function() --[[ Line: 55 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		return p1.AbsoluteSize, p1.AbsolutePosition
	end), "Holder argument does not have an AbsoluteSize/AbsolutePosition")
	local v2 = false
	for i, v in ipairs(t.Sliders) do
		if v._holder == p1 then
			v2 = true
			break
		end
	end
	assert(not v2, "Cannot set two sliders with same frame!")
	assert(if p2.SliderData.Increment == nil then false else true, "Failed to find Increment in SliderData table")
	assert(if p2.SliderData.Start == nil then false else true, "Failed to find Start in SliderData table")
	assert(if p2.SliderData.End == nil then false else true, "Failed to find End in SliderData table")
	assert(if p2.SliderData.Increment > 0 then true else false, "SliderData.Increment must be greater than 0")
	assert(if p2.SliderData.End > p2.SliderData.Start then true else false, string.format("Slider end value must be greater than its start value! (%.1f <= %.1f)", p2.SliderData.End, p2.SliderData.Start))
	local v9 = setmetatable({}, t)
	v9._holder = p1
	local t2 = {
		Button = nil,
		HolderButton = nil,
		_clickOverride = false,
		_mainConnection = nil,
		_inputPos = nil,
		_percent = 0,
		_value = 0,
		_scaleIncrement = 0,
		_currentTween = nil,
		_clickConnections = {},
		_otherConnections = {}
	}
	t2._allowBackgroundClick = p2.AllowBackgroundClick ~= false
	v9._data = t2
	v9._config = p2
	v9._config.Axis = string.upper(p2.Axis or "X")
	v9._config.Padding = p2.Padding or 5
	v9._config.MoveInfo = p2.MoveInfo or TweenInfo.new(0.2)
	v9._config.MoveType = p2.MoveType or "Tween"
	v9.IsHeld = false
	local Slider = p1:FindFirstChild("Slider")
	assert(Slider ~= nil, "Failed to find slider button.")
	assert(Slider:IsA("GuiButton"), "Slider is not a GuiButton")
	v9._data.Button = Slider
	if v9._data._allowBackgroundClick then
		local HolderClickButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
		HolderClickButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		HolderClickButton.Text = ""
		HolderClickButton.Name = "HolderClickButton"
		HolderClickButton.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		HolderClickButton.ZIndex = -1
		HolderClickButton.Parent = v9._holder
		v9._data.HolderButton = HolderClickButton
	end
	v9._data._percent = 0
	if p2.SliderData.DefaultValue then
		p2.SliderData.DefaultValue = math.clamp(p2.SliderData.DefaultValue, p2.SliderData.Start, p2.SliderData.End)
		v9._data._percent = SliderFuncs.getAlphaBetween(p2.SliderData.Start, p2.SliderData.End, p2.SliderData.DefaultValue)
	end
	v9._data._percent = math.clamp(v9._data._percent, 0, 1)
	v9._data._value = SliderFuncs.getNewValue(v9)
	v9._data._increment = p2.SliderData.Increment
	v9._data._scaleIncrement = SliderFuncs.getScaleIncrement(v9)
	v9.Changed = Signal.new()
	v9.Dragged = Signal.new()
	v9.Released = Signal.new()
	v9._data._percent = SliderFuncs.snapToScale(v9._data._percent, v9._data._scaleIncrement)
	v9:Move()
	table.insert(v9._data._otherConnections, Slider:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function() --[[ Line: 144 | Upvalues: v9 (copy) ]]
		v9:Move("Instant")
	end))
	table.insert(t.Sliders, v9)
	return v9
end
function t.Track(p1) --[[ Track | Line: 153 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy) ]]
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._data._clickConnections) do
		v:Disconnect()
	end
	table.insert(p1._data._clickConnections, p1._data.Button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 158 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		p1.IsHeld = true
	end))
	table.insert(p1._data._clickConnections, p1._data.Button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 162 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		if p1.IsHeld then
			p1.Released:Fire(p1._data._value)
		end
		p1.IsHeld = false
	end))
	if p1._data._allowBackgroundClick then
		table.insert(p1._data._clickConnections, p1._data.HolderButton.Activated:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 170 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
				return
			end
			p1._data._inputPos = p12.Position
			p1._data._clickOverride = true
			p1:Update()
			p1._data._clickOverride = false
		end))
	end
	if p1.Changed then
		p1.Changed:Fire(p1._data._value)
	end
	if p1._data._mainConnection then
		p1._data._mainConnection:Disconnect()
	end
	p1._data._mainConnection = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(p12, p2) --[[ Line: 188 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		p1._data._inputPos = p12.Position
		p1:Update()
	end)
end
function t.Update(p1) --[[ Update | Line: 196 | Upvalues: SliderFuncs (copy) ]]
	if not (p1.IsHeld or p1._data._clickOverride) then
		return
	end
	if not p1._data._inputPos then
		return
	end
	local v3 = p1._data._inputPos[p1._config.Axis]
	if not v3 then
		return
	end
	p1._data._percent = math.clamp(SliderFuncs.snapToScale((v3 - p1._holder.AbsolutePosition[p1._config.Axis]) / p1._holder.AbsoluteSize[p1._config.Axis], p1._data._scaleIncrement), 0, 1)
	p1.Dragged:Fire(p1._data._value)
	p1:Move()
end
function t.Untrack(p1) --[[ Untrack | Line: 215 ]]
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._data._clickConnections) do
		v:Disconnect()
	end
	if p1._data._mainConnection then
		p1._data._mainConnection:Disconnect()
	end
	p1.IsHeld = false
end
function t.Reset(p1) --[[ Reset | Line: 225 | Upvalues: SliderFuncs (copy) ]]
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._data._clickConnections) do
		v:Disconnect()
	end
	if p1._data._mainConnection then
		p1._data._mainConnection:Disconnect()
	end

		p1._data._percent = SliderFuncs.getAlphaBetween(p1._config.SliderData.Start, p1._config.SliderData.End, p1._config.SliderData.DefaultValue)
	end
	p1._data._percent = math.clamp(p1._data._percent, 0, 1)

	p1._data._percent = SliderFuncs.getAlphaBetween(p1._config.SliderData.Start, p1._config.SliderData.End, p2)

function t.Move(p1, p2) --[[ Move | Line: 251 | Upvalues: SliderFuncs (copy), TweenService (copy) ]]

	if v1 == "Tween" or v1 == nil then
		if p1._data._currentTween then

		})

		p1._data.Button.Position = SliderFuncs.getNewPosition(p1)
	end
	p1.Changed:Fire(p1._data._value)

function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 286 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

		v:Disconnect()
	end
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._data._otherConnections) do
		v:Disconnect()
	end

		p1._data._mainConnection:Disconnect()
	end
	if p1._data.HolderButton then
		p1._data.HolderButton:Destroy()
		p1._data.HolderButton = nil
	end
	p1.Changed:Destroy()
	p1.Dragged:Destroy()
	p1.Released:Destroy()

		if t.Sliders[i] == p1 then
			table.remove(t.Sliders, i)
		end
	end
	setmetatable(p1, nil)
end

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {
	snapToScale = function(p1, p2) --[[ snapToScale | Line: 3 ]]
		return math.clamp(math.round(p1 / p2) * p2, 0, 1)
	end
}
function lerp(p1, p2, p3) --[[ lerp | Line: 7 ]]
	return (1 - p3) * p1 + p3 * p2
end
function t.map(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6) --[[ map | Line: 11 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = lerp(p4, p5, t.getAlphaBetween(p2, p3, p1))
	if not p6 then
		return v1
	end
	if p4 < p5 then
		p4, p5 = p5, p4
	end
	return math.max(math.min(v1, p4), p5)
end
function t.getNewPosition(p1) --[[ getNewPosition | Line: 24 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = p1._data.Button.AbsoluteSize[p1._config.Axis]
	local v2 = p1._holder.AbsoluteSize[p1._config.Axis]
	local v3 = p1._data.Button.AnchorPoint[p1._config.Axis]
	local v4 = v3 * v1 / v2 + p1._config.Padding / v2
	local v5 = t.map(p1._data._percent, 0, 1, v4, 1 - v4 + (2 * v1 * v3 - v1) / v2, true)
	if p1._config.Axis == "X" then
		return UDim2.fromScale(v5, p1._data.Button.Position.Y.Scale)
	else
		return UDim2.fromScale(p1._data.Button.Position.X.Scale, v5)
	end
end
function t.getScaleIncrement(p1) --[[ getScaleIncrement | Line: 43 ]]
	return 1 / ((p1._config.SliderData.End - p1._config.SliderData.Start) / p1._config.SliderData.Increment)
end
function t.getAlphaBetween(p1, p2, p3) --[[ getAlphaBetween | Line: 47 ]]
	return (p3 - p1) / (p2 - p1)
end
function t.getNewValue(p1) --[[ getNewValue | Line: 51 ]]
	local v1 = lerp(p1._config.SliderData.Start, p1._config.SliderData.End, p1._data._percent)
	local v2 = 1 / p1._config.SliderData.Increment
	return math.round(v1 * v2) / v2
end
return t

function t.Disconnect(p1) --[[ Disconnect | Line: 81 ]]
	if not p1.Connected then
		return
	end
	p1.Connected = false
	if p1._signal._handlerListHead == p1 then
		p1._signal._handlerListHead = p1._next
		return
	end
	local _handlerListHead = p1._signal._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead and _handlerListHead._next ~= p1 do
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
	if not _handlerListHead then
		return
	end
	_handlerListHead._next = p1._next
end
t.Destroy = t.Disconnect

function t3.DisconnectAll(p1) --[[ DisconnectAll | Line: 286 ]]
	local _handlerListHead = p1._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead do
		_handlerListHead.Connected = false
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
	p1._handlerListHead = false
	local v1 = rawget(p1, "_yieldedThreads")
	if not v1 then
		return
	end
	for v2 in v1 do
		if coroutine.status(v2) == "suspended" then
			warn(debug.traceback(v2, "signal disconnected; yielded thread cancelled", 2))
			task.cancel(v2)
		end
	end
	table.clear(p1._yieldedThreads)
end
function t3.Fire(p1, ...) --[[ Fire | Line: 321 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), runEventHandlerInFreeThread (copy) ]]

	while _handlerListHead do
		if _handlerListHead.Connected then
			if not v1 then
				v1 = coroutine.create(runEventHandlerInFreeThread)
			end
			task.spawn(v1, _handlerListHead._fn, ...)
		end
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
end
function t3.FireDeferred(p1, ...) --[[ FireDeferred | Line: 342 ]]
	local _handlerListHead = p1._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead do

		task.defer(function(...) --[[ Line: 346 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]

				return
			end
			v1._fn(...)
		end, ...)
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
end
function t3.Wait(p1) --[[ Wait | Line: 370 ]]
	local v1 = rawget(p1, "_yieldedThreads")
	if not v1 then
		v1 = {}
		rawset(p1, "_yieldedThreads", v1)
	end
	local v2 = coroutine.running()
	v1[v2] = true
	p1:Once(function(...) --[[ Line: 380 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), v2 (copy) ]]
		v1[v2] = nil
		task.spawn(v2, ...)
	end)
	return coroutine.yield()
end

local function startEyeDrop(p1) --[[ startEyeDrop | Line: 138 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), PlayerGui (copy), GuiService (copy) ]]
	p1.isUsingEyeDropper = true
	local currentColor = p1.currentColor
	p1.eyeDropbutton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0.25, 0.25)
	p1.eyeDropbutton.Text = "Cancel"
	p1.okButton.AutoButtonColor = false
	p1.okButton.TextTransparency = 0.5
	p1.cancelButton.AutoButtonColor = false
	p1.cancelButton.TextTransparency = 0.5
	while p1.isUsingEyeDropper do
		local v1 = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
		local v2 = PlayerGui:GetGuiObjectsAtPosition(v1.X, v1.Y - GuiService.TopbarInset.Height)
		local v3 = nil
		if v2[1] then
			for v4, v5 in v2 do
				if v5.BackgroundTransparency ~= 1 then
					v3 = v5
					break
				end
			end
		end
		if v3 then
			updateColor(p1, v3.BackgroundColor3)
		else
			local v6 = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(v1.X, v1.Y - GuiService.TopbarInset.Height)
			local v7 = workspace:Raycast(v6.Origin, v6.Direction * 500)
			if v7 then
				updateColor(p1, v7.Instance.Color)
			else
				updateColor(p1, (Color3.new(0/255, 0/255, 0/255)))
			end
		end
		if UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) and v2[1] ~= p1.eyeDropbutton then
			local v9 = UserInputService.InputEnded:Wait()
			while v9.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 do
				v9 = UserInputService.InputEnded:Wait()
			end
			p1.isUsingEyeDropper = false
			p1.eyeDropbutton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
			p1.eyeDropbutton.Text = "Eye drop"
			p1.okButton.AutoButtonColor = true
			p1.okButton.TextTransparency = 0
			p1.cancelButton.AutoButtonColor = true
			p1.cancelButton.TextTransparency = 0
		end
		task.wait()
	end
end

function t.new() --[[ new | Line: 332 | Upvalues: t (copy), ColorPicker (copy), connectEvents (copy) ]]
	local v2 = setmetatable({}, t)
	v2.startColor = nil
	v2.currentColor = Color3.new(255/255, 255/255, 255/255)
	v2.active = false
	v2.isUsingEyeDropper = false
	v2._Opened = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
	v2._Closed = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
	v2._Changed = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
	v2.Opened = v2._Opened.Event
	v2.Closed = v2._Closed.Event
	v2.Changed = v2._Changed.Event
	local v3, v4, v5 = v2.currentColor:ToHSV()
	v2.hue = v3
	v2.sat = v4
	v2.val = v5
	v2.frame = script.Main:Clone()
	v2.frame.Name = tostring(#ColorPicker:GetChildren() + 1)
	v2.frame.Parent = ColorPicker
	v2.sliders = v2.frame.Sliders
	v2.numeric = v2.frame.Numeric
	v2.previewColor = v2.numeric.Preview
	v2.eyeDropbutton = v2.numeric.EyeDrop
	v2.okButton = v2.numeric.Ok
	v2.cancelButton = v2.numeric.Cancel
	v2.textBoxNumber = v2.numeric.TextBox

	v2.colorCursor = v2.sliders.Color.White.Cursor
	v2.valueButton = v2.sliders.Value.Button
	v2.valueCursor = v2.sliders.Value.Cursor
	v2.valUiGradient = v2.sliders.Value.UIGradient
	updateColor(v2, v2.currentColor)
	connectEvents(v2)
	return v2
end
function t.SetColor(p1, p2) --[[ SetColor | Line: 374 ]]
	if not p2 then
		error("Argument 1 missing or nil", 2)
	end
	if p2 and typeof(p2) ~= "Color3" then
		error("Color3 expected got " .. typeof(p2), 2)
	end
	if not p2 then
		return
	end
	local v1, v2, v3 = p2:ToHSV()
	p1.hue = v1
	p1.sat = v2
	p1.val = v3
	updateColor(p1, p1.hue, p1.sat, p1.val)
end
function t.GetColor(p1) --[[ GetColor | Line: 385 ]]
	return p1.currentColor
end
function t.Start(p1) --[[ Start | Line: 389 ]]
	if not p1.active then
		p1.startColor = p1.currentColor
		p1.frame.Visible = true
		p1.active = true
		p1._Opened:Fire()
	end
end
function t.Cancel(p1) --[[ Cancel | Line: 397 | Upvalues: cancelColorPicker (copy) ]]
	if p1.active then
		cancelColorPicker(p1)
	end
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 402 ]]
	p1.active = false
	p1._Changed:Destroy()
	p1._Opened:Destroy()
	p1._Closed:Destroy()
	p1.frame:Destroy()
	setmetatable(p1, nil)
end
return t

			local function getSpinnerSizeAndDigitCount() --[[ getSpinnerSizeAndDigitCount | Line: 1136 | Upvalues: p2_2 (ref) ]]
				local sum_2 = 0
				local count_2 = 0
				for v1, v2 in p2_2.Frame:GetChildren() do
					local v3 = string.lower(v2.Name)
					if v3 == "digit" then
						sum_2 = sum_2 + v2.AbsoluteSize.X
						count_2 = count_2 + 1
						continue
					end
					if (v3 == "prefix" or (v3 == "suffix" or v3 == "comma")) and v2.Text ~= "" then
						sum_2 = sum_2 + v2.AbsoluteSize.X
						count_2 = count_2 + 1
					end
				end
				return sum_2, count_2
			end
			local function getLabelParentContainerXSize() --[[ getLabelParentContainerXSize | Line: 1154 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p2_2 (ref) ]]

				local v2 = if v12 then v12.Parent else v12
				if v2 == nil then

				end

function v10.convertLabelToNumberSpinner(p1_2, p2_2, p3_2) --[[ convertLabelToNumberSpinner | Line: 1105 ]]

		p2_2.Parent = v1.Parent

				p2_2[v] = v1[v]
			end))
		end
		local function getSpinnerSizeAndDigitCount() --[[ getSpinnerSizeAndDigitCount | Line: 1136 | Upvalues: p2_2 (ref) ]]
			local sum_2 = 0
			local count_2 = 0
			for v1, v2 in p2_2.Frame:GetChildren() do
				local v3 = string.lower(v2.Name)
				if v3 == "digit" then
					sum_2 = sum_2 + v2.AbsoluteSize.X
					count_2 = count_2 + 1
					continue
				end

					sum_2 = sum_2 + v2.AbsoluteSize.X
					count_2 = count_2 + 1
				end
			end
			return sum_2, count_2
		end
		local function getLabelParentContainerXSize() --[[ getLabelParentContainerXSize | Line: 1154 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p2_2 (ref) ]]
			local v12 = v1.Parent

				return 0
			end

			else

			return p2_2.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X
		end

				p1_2:setLabel(p2_2.Value)
			end

			while v12 < X and p1_2.isDestroyed ~= true do
				task.wait(0.05)
				if v2 > 0 and v2 < 8 then
					p2_2.TextSize = v1.TextSize
					break
				end
				local v3 = p2_2
				v3.TextSize = v3.TextSize + 1
				X = p2_2.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X

				v12 = v4
				v2 = v5
			end

			local v7 = if v6 then v6.Parent else v6
			local v8 = if v7 == nil then 0 elseif v7.IconImage.Visible == true then p2_2.Frame.AbsoluteSize.X + v1.Parent.Parent.IconImage.AbsoluteSize.X else v7.AbsoluteSize.X

				task.wait(0.05)
				if v2 < 8 and v2 > 0 then
					p2_2.TextSize = v1.TextSize
					return
				end
				local v9 = p2_2
				v9.TextSize = v9.TextSize - 1

				v12, v2 = v122, v13_2
			end
		end
		p1_2:addToJanitor(p2_2.Frame.ChildAdded:Connect(adjustSize))
		p1_2:addToJanitor(p2_2.Frame.ChildRemoved:Connect(adjustSize))
		p1_2:addToJanitor(p1_2.iconAdded:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 1208 | Upvalues: adjustSize (copy) ]]
			task.wait(1)
			adjustSize()
		end))

		p2_2.Prefix = "$"
		p2_2.Commas = true
		p2_2.Decimals = 0
		p2_2.Duration = 0.25
		p2_2.Value = 10

		end

	end)

end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.Icon.VERSION

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {
	appVersion = "v3.4.0",
	latestVersion = nil
}
function t.getLatestVersion() --[[ getLatestVersion | Line: 14 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local latestVersion = t.latestVersion
	if latestVersion then
		return latestVersion
	end
	local v1
	while true do

function t.rebuild(p1) --[[ rebuild | Line: 282 | Upvalues: t (copy), Utility (copy), Default (copy) ]]

local function viewProjectionEdgeHits(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ viewProjectionEdgeHits | Line: 72 ]]

	local v2 = (1 / 0)
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		local v3 = p4 * (p3 - v.Z)
		local v4 = v[p2] + v3
		local v5 = v[p2] - v3
		local v6 = math.max(v1, v4, v5)
		v1, v2 = v6, math.min(v2, v4, v5)
	end
	return v1, v2
end

	local AbsoluteSize = p1.ViewportFrame.AbsoluteSize
	t.aspect = AbsoluteSize.X / AbsoluteSize.Y
	t.yFov2 = math.rad(p1.Camera.FieldOfView / 2)
	t.tanyFov2 = math.tan(t.yFov2)
	t.xFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * t.aspect)
	t.tanxFov2 = math.tan(t.xFov2)
	t.cFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * math.min(1, t.aspect))
	t.sincFov2 = math.sin(t.cFov2)
	p1._viewport = t
end
function t4.GetFitDistance(p1, p2) --[[ GetFitDistance | Line: 150 ]]
	return (p1._modelRadius + (p2 and (p2 - p1._modelCFrame.Position).Magnitude or 0)) / p1._viewport.sincFov2
end
function t4.GetMinimumFitCFrame(p1, p2) --[[ GetMinimumFitCFrame | Line: 162 | Upvalues: viewProjectionEdgeHits (copy) ]]
	if not p1.Model then
		return CFrame.new()
	end
	local v1 = (p2 - p2.Position):Inverse()
	local _points = p1._points
	local t = { v1 * _points[1] }
	local Z = t[1].Z
	for i = 2, #_points do
		local v2 = v1 * _points[i]
		local v3 = math.min(Z, v2.Z)
		t[i] = v2
		Z = v3
	end
	local v4, v5 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "X", Z, p1._viewport.tanxFov2)
	local v6, v7 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "Y", Z, p1._viewport.tanyFov2)
	return p2 * CFrame.new((v4 + v5) / 2, (v6 + v7) / 2, Z + math.max((v4 - v5) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanxFov2, (v6 - v7) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanyFov2))
end
return t4

		return

	end)

	end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.Utility.StringDiff

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {
	longest_word = function(p1, p2) --[[ longest_word | Line: 11 ]]
		if #p1 < #p2 then
			p1, p2 = p2, p1
		end
		return p1, p2
	end,
	longest_number = function(p1, p2) --[[ longest_number | Line: 20 ]]
		if p1 < p2 then
			p1, p2 = p2, p1
		end
		return p1, p2
	end,
	longest_common_match = function(p1, p2) --[[ longest_common_match | Line: 29 ]]
		local count = 0
		local t = {}
		for i = 1, #p1 do
			for j = 1, #p2 do
				local count_2, v1 = j, {}
				for k = i, #p1 do
					if string.sub(p1, k, k) ~= string.sub(p2, count_2, count_2) then
						break
					end
					table.insert(v1, (string.sub(p1, k, k)))
					count_2 = count_2 + 1
				end
				if #table.concat(v1) > 0 then
					count = count + 1
				end
				if #t < #v1 then
					t = v1
				end
			end
		end
		return table.concat(t), count
	end,
	perfect_common_match_calc = function(p1) --[[ perfect_common_match_calc | Line: 66 ]]
		local tbl = {}
		for i = 1, #p1 do
			local v1 = string.sub(p1, i, i)
			if tbl[v1] then
				tbl[v1] = tbl[v1] + 1
				continue
			end
			tbl[v1] = 1
		end
		local sum = 0
		for k, v in pairs(tbl) do
			sum = sum + v * v
		end
		return sum
	end
}
function t.compare(p1, p2) --[[ compare | Line: 95 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1, v2 = t.longest_word(p1, p2)
	if #v1 < 1 then
		warn("Strings are too short to compare.")
		return 0, "Strings are too short to compare."
	else
		local v3 = t.perfect_common_match_calc(v1)
		local v4, v5 = t.longest_common_match(v1, v2)
		local v6 = (#v4 / #v1 * 100 + v5 / v3 * 100) / 2
		local v7, v8 = t.longest_number(v6, #v2 / #v1 * 100)
		return v6 * (v8 / v7 * 100 / 100), v4
	end
end
return t

return function(p1, p2, ...) --[[ SafeCall | Line: 3 ]]
	local v1 = nil
	local v2 = 0
	local v4 = nil
	while not v1 and v2 < (p1 or 5) do
		local v5, v6 = pcall(p2, ...)
		v1, v2, v4 = v5, v2 + 1, v6

local function version_lt(p1, p2) --[[ version_lt | Line: 39 ]]
	if p1.Major == p2.Major then
		return p1.Minor < p2.Minor
	else
		return p1.Major < p2.Major
	end
end
local function version_eq(p1, p2) --[[ version_eq | Line: 45 ]]
	return if p1.Major == p2.Major then p1.Minor == p2.Minor else false
end
local function double_to_int32(p1) --[[ double_to_int32 | Line: 49 ]]
	if math.clamp(tonumber(p1) or 0, -2147483648, 2147483647) ~= p1 then
		return UDim.new(nil, p1).Offset
	end
	if p1 <= -1 then
		return math.ceil(p1)
	end
	if p1 >= 1 then
		return math.floor(p1)
	else
		return 0
	end
end

	t.Minor = if math.clamp(v5, -2147483648, 2147483647) == p2 then if p2 <= -1 then math.ceil(p2) elseif p2 >= 1 then math.floor(p2) else 0 else UDim.new(nil, p2).Offset

	v2.__metatable = "The metatable is locked"

function t.from_double(p1) --[[ from_double | Line: 8 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
	local v12, v2, v3 = string.match(tostring(p1), "^(%d+)%.?(%d*)e?([+-]?%d*)$")
	local v4, v5 = string.match(v12 .. v2, "^0*(%d-)(0*)$")
	local t = {}
	t[1] = string.byte(string.gsub(v4, ".", v1), 1, -1)
	return t, #t, (tonumber(v3) or 0) - #v2 + #v5
end
return table.freeze(t)



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Libraries.Utility.FormatNumber._internal.skeleton

local formatter_settings = require(script.Parent.formatter_settings)
local enums = require(script.Parent.enums)
local t = {}
local t2 = {
	[enums.SignDisplay.AUTO] = nil,
	[enums.SignDisplay.ALWAYS] = "sign-always",
	[enums.SignDisplay.NEVER] = "sign-never",
	[enums.SignDisplay.EXCEPT_ZERO] = "sign-except-zero",
	[enums.SignDisplay.NEGATIVE] = "sign-negative"
}
local function notation_to_skeleton(p1) --[[ notation_to_skeleton | Line: 14 | Upvalues: enums (copy), t2 (copy) ]]
	local v1, v2
	if p1.type == enums._Internal.NotationType.SCIENTIFIC then
		v1 = true
		v2 = if p1.power10Scale == 3 then "engineering" else "scientific"
		if p1.minExponentDigits ~= 1 then
			v2 = v2 .. "/*" .. string.rep("e", p1.minExponentDigits)
		end
		if p1.exponentSignDisplay ~= enums.SignDisplay.AUTO then
			return v1, v2 .. "/" .. t2[p1.exponentSignDisplay]
		end
	else
		if p1.type == enums._Internal.NotationType.SIMPLE then
			return true, nil
		end
		v1 = false
		v2 = "Compact notation skeleton is not supported for being represented as a skeleton string in this module"
	end
	return v1, v2
end
local function precision_to_skeleton(p1) --[[ precision_to_skeleton | Line: 40 | Upvalues: enums (copy), formatter_settings (copy) ]]
	local v1 = nil
	local v2 = nil
	local v3 = nil
	local v4 = nil
	local v5 = nil
	local v6 = nil
	local v7 = nil
	if p1.type == enums._Internal.PrecisionType.FRACTION then
		v4 = p1.min
		v5 = p1.max
	elseif p1.type == enums._Internal.PrecisionType.SIGNFICANT then
		v6 = p1.min
		v7 = p1.max
	elseif p1.type == enums._Internal.PrecisionType.FRACTION_SIGNIFICANT then
		v4 = p1.minFractionDigits
		v5 = p1.maxFractionDigits
		if p1.sourcedWithSignificantDigits then
			v6 = p1.minSignificantDigits
			v7 = p1.maxSignificantDigits
		elseif p1.roundingPriority == enums.RoundingPriority.RELAXED then
			v6 = p1.maxSignificantDigits
			v7 = formatter_settings.MAX_PRECISION
		else
			v7 = p1.maxSignificantDigits
			v6 = 1
		end
	else
		v1 = "precision-unlimited"
	end
	if v4 and v5 == 0 then
		v2 = "precision-integer"
	elseif v4 then
		local v8 = "." .. string.rep("0", v4)
		v2 = if v5 == formatter_settings.MAX_PRECISION then v8 .. "*" else v8 .. string.rep("#", v5 - v4)
	end
	if v6 then
		local v9 = string.rep("@", v6)
		v3 = if v7 == formatter_settings.MAX_PRECISION then v9 .. "*" else v9 .. string.rep("#", v7 - v6)
	end
	if v2 then
		if v3 then
			v1 = v2 .. "/" .. v3
			if p1.type == enums._Internal.PrecisionType.FRACTION_SIGNIFICANT and p1.sourcedWithSignificantDigits then
				if p1.roundingPriority == enums.RoundingPriority.RELAXED then
					return v1 .. "r"
				else
					return v1 .. "s"
				end
			end
		else
			v1 = v2
		end
	elseif v3 then
		v1 = v3
	end
	return v1
end
local t3 = {
	[enums.RoundingMode.CEILING] = "rounding-mode-ceiling",
	[enums.RoundingMode.FLOOR] = "rounding-mode-floor",
	[enums.RoundingMode.DOWN] = "rounding-mode-down",
	[enums.RoundingMode.UP] = "rounding-mode-up",

local function int_width_to_skeleton(p1) --[[ int_width_to_skeleton | Line: 122 ]]
	if p1.max == -1 then
		return "integer-width/*" .. string.rep("0", p1.min)
	end
	if p1.max == 0 and p1.min == 0 then
		return "integer-width-trunc"
	end
	return "integer-width/" .. string.rep("#", p1.max - p1.min) .. string.rep("0", p1.min)
end
local t5 = {
	[enums.DecimalSeparatorDisplay.AUTO] = nil,
	[enums.DecimalSeparatorDisplay.ALWAYS] = "decimal-always"
}
function t.settings_to_skeleton(p1) --[[ settings_to_skeleton | Line: 143 | Upvalues: notation_to_skeleton (copy), precision_to_skeleton (copy), t3 (copy), t4 (copy), int_width_to_skeleton (copy), t5 (copy) ]]
	local t = {}
	local v1 = nil
	local v2
	if p1.notation then
		local v3, v4 = notation_to_skeleton(p1.notation)
		if v3 then
			table.insert(t, v4)
			v2 = v3
		else
			v2 = v3
			v1 = v4
		end
	else
		v2 = true
	end
	if v2 then
		if p1.precision then
			table.insert(t, (precision_to_skeleton(p1.precision)))
		end
		if p1.roundingMode then
			table.insert(t, t3[p1.roundingMode])
		end
		if p1.grouping then
			table.insert(t, t4[p1.grouping])
		end
		if p1.integerWidth then
			table.insert(t, (int_width_to_skeleton(p1.integerWidth)))
		end
		if p1.decimal then
			table.insert(t, t5[p1.decimal])
		end
		v1 = table.concat(t, " ")
	end
	return v2, v1
end

local function skeleton_to_scientific_notation(p1) --[[ skeleton_to_scientific_notation | Line: 258 | Upvalues: enums (copy), t7 (copy), formatter_settings (copy) ]]
	local v1, v2, v3 = string.match(p1, "^(%a+)/?([^/]*)/?([^/]*)$")
	local v4 = 1
	local AUTO = enums.SignDisplay.AUTO
	if v1 ~= "scientific" and v1 ~= "engineering" then
		return nil
	end
	if string.match(v2, "^[%*%+]e+$") then
		v2, v4 = v3, #v2 - 1
	elseif string.match(v3, "^[%*%+]e+$") then
		v4 = #v3 - 1
	end
	if v2 ~= "" then
		if string.sub(v2, 1, 5) ~= "sign-" then
			return nil
		end
		AUTO = t7[v2]
	end
	if v4 > 999 then
		return nil
	end
	local freeze = table.freeze
	local t = {
		type = enums._Internal.NotationType.SCIENTIFIC
	}
	t.power10Scale = if v1 == "engineering" then 3 else 1
	t.minExponentDigits = v4
	t.exponentSignDisplay = AUTO
	t.displayExponentSignAt = formatter_settings.generate_from_sign_enum(AUTO)
	return freeze(t)
end
local function skeleton_to_scientific_notation_concise(p1) --[[ skeleton_to_scientific_notation_concise | Line: 296 | Upvalues: t7 (copy), enums (copy), formatter_settings (copy) ]]
	local v1, v2 = string.match(p1, "^(EE?)(.+)$")
	if not v1 then
		return nil
	end
	local v3, v4 = string.match(v2, "^(%+[!%?])(.+)$")
	local v5, v6
	if v3 then
		v5 = t7[v3]
		v6 = v4
	else
		v5 = enums.SignDisplay.AUTO
		v6 = v2
	end
	if not string.match(v6, "^0+$") then
		return nil
	end
	if #v6 > 999 then
		return nil
	end
	local freeze = table.freeze
	local t = {
		type = enums._Internal.NotationType.SCIENTIFIC
	}
	t.power10Scale = if v1 == "EE" then 3 else 1
	t.minExponentDigits = #v6
	t.exponentSignDisplay = v5
	t.displayExponentSignAt = formatter_settings.generate_from_sign_enum(v5)
	return freeze(t)
end
local function skeleton_to_precision(p1) --[[ skeleton_to_precision | Line: 335 | Upvalues: formatter_settings (copy), enums (copy) ]]

		end

			return nil
		end

local function skeleton_to_int_width(p1) --[[ skeleton_to_int_width | Line: 455 ]]
	if p1 == "integer-width-trunc" then
		return table.freeze({
			min = 0,
			max = 0
		})
	end

			return nil
		else
			return table.freeze({
				max = -1,
				min = #v1
			})
		end

		if v2 and (v2 ~= "" and not (#v2 > 999 or #v3 > 999)) then
			return table.freeze({
				min = #v3,
				max = #v2
			})
		else
			return nil
		end
	end
end
local function skeleton_to_int_width_concise(p1) --[[ skeleton_to_int_width_concise | Line: 487 ]]

			min = #p1
		})
	else
		return nil
	end

			v12, v2 = true, tostring(p2)
		else
			v12 = false
		end
	elseif p3 == "number" then
		local v4 = tonumber(p2)
		if v4 then
			v12 = true
			v2 = v4
		else
			v12, p3, v2 = false, p3 .. " object", v4
		end
	elseif string.sub(p3, 1, 1) == "{" then
		local v5 = string.sub(p3, 2, -2)
		if type(p2) == "table" then
			local v6 = table.move(p2, 1, rawlen(p2), 1, table.create((rawlen(p2))))
			v2 = v6
			for v7, v8 in v6 do
				if type(v8) ~= v5 then
					error(string.format("Values inside the table argument must be a %s, index %d got %s", v5, v7, (type(v8))), 3)
				end
			end
			v12 = true
		else
			p3 = "table"
		end
	elseif t.is_a(p2, p3) then
		v2 = v1[p2].data
		v12 = true
	end
	if v12 then
		return v2
	end
	error(string.format("Argument #%d provided must be a %s", p1, p3), 3)
end
function t.try_coerce_range(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ try_coerce_range | Line: 147 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = nil
	if p2 == nil then
		v1 = p5
	else
		local v2 = tonumber(p2)
		if v2 then
			local v3 = t.double_to_int32(v2)
			if p3 <= v3 and v3 <= p4 then
				v1 = v3
			end
		end
	end
	return if v1 then v1 else error(string.format("Argument #%d provided must be an integer that is in the range of %d to (and including) %d", p1, p3, p4), 3)
end
function t.try_coerce_enum(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ try_coerce_enum | Line: 169 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = nil
	if p2 == nil then
		v1 = p4
	elseif tonumber(p2) then
		local v3 = t.double_to_int32(p2)
		for v4, v5 in p3 do
			if v3 == v5 then
				v1 = v5
				break
			end
		end
	end
	return if v1 then v1 else error(string.format("Argument #%d provided is out of range", p1), 3)
end
function t.double_to_int32(p1) --[[ double_to_int32 | Line: 190 ]]
	if p1 > -2147483649 and p1 < 2147483648 then
		if p1 <= -1 then
			return math.ceil(p1)
		end
		if p1 >= 1 then
			return math.floor(p1)
		else
			return 0
		end
	else
		return UDim.new(nil, p1).Offset
	end
end
return table.freeze(t)

local function GetMassOfModel(p1) --[[ GetMassOfModel | Line: 14 ]]
	local sum = 0
	for k, v in pairs(p1:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") then
			sum = sum + v:GetMass()
			continue
		end
		if v:IsA("Accoutrement") then
			local BasePart = v:FindFirstChildOfClass("BasePart")
			if BasePart then
				sum = sum + BasePart:GetMass()
			end
		end
	end
	return sum
end

local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local ApplyForce = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("GameEvents"):WaitForChild("ApplyForce")
local t = {
	OnApplyForce = function(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ OnApplyForce | Line: 13 ]]
		assert(if typeof(p2) == "Instance" then p2:IsA("BasePart") else false, "not a part")
		if p2.Anchored or p2:IsGrounded() then
			return
		end
		local v2 = if typeof(p3) == "Vector3" and p3 then p3 else Vector3.new()
		local v3, v4
		if typeof(p4) == "Vector3" and p4 then
			v3 = p4
			v4 = v2
		else
			v3 = Vector3.new()
			v4 = v2
		end
		local v5, v6
		if typeof(p5) == "Vector3" and p5 then
			v5 = p5
			v6 = v3
		else
			v5 = Vector3.new()
			v6 = v3
		end
		p2:ApplyImpulseAtPosition(v4 / 10, p2.Position + v5)
		p2:ApplyAngularImpulse(v6 / 10)
	end
}
function t.ApplyForce(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ ApplyForce | Line: 27 | Upvalues: Workspace (copy), RunService (copy), ApplyForce (copy), t (copy) ]]
	assert(if typeof(p2) == "Instance" then p2:IsA("BasePart") else false, "not a part")
	if not p2:IsDescendantOf(Workspace) or (p2.Anchored or p2:IsGrounded()) then
		return
	end
	if RunService:IsServer() then
		local v2 = p2:GetNetworkOwner()
		if v2 then
			ApplyForce:FireClient(v2, p2, p3, p4, p5)
		else
			t:OnApplyForce(p2, p3, p4, p5)
		end
	else
		t:OnApplyForce(p2, p3, p4, p5)
	end
end
return t

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local function IsReallyVisible(p1) --[[ IsReallyVisible | Line: 9 ]]
	local v1 = p1
	while v1 and v1 ~= game do
		if v1:IsA("GuiObject") and not v1.Visible then
			return false
		end
		v1 = v1.Parent
	end
	return true
end
function CreatePreview(p1, p2, p3) --[[ CreatePreview | Line: 25 | Upvalues: Janitor (copy), ViewportModel (copy), RunService (copy), IsReallyVisible (copy) ]]
	local Viewport = p1:FindFirstChild("Viewport")
	if Viewport then
		Viewport:Destroy()
	end
	p1.Image = ""
	local v1 = Janitor.new()
	local ViewportCamera = Instance.new("Camera")
	ViewportCamera.Name = "ViewportCamera"
	ViewportCamera.Parent = p1
	local Viewport_2 = Instance.new("ViewportFrame")
	Viewport_2.Name = "Viewport"
	Viewport_2.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	Viewport_2.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	Viewport_2.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
	Viewport_2.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	Viewport_2.CurrentCamera = ViewportCamera
	Viewport_2.Ambient = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	Viewport_2.LightColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	Viewport_2.ZIndex = 0
	Viewport_2.Parent = p1
	local v2 = p2:Clone()
	if p3 and v2.PrimaryPart then
		v2.PrimaryPart.PivotOffset = CFrame.new()
	elseif p3 then
		v2.WorldPivot = v2:GetBoundingBox()
	end
	v2.Parent = Viewport_2
	local v3, _ = v2:GetBoundingBox()
	local v4 = ViewportModel.new(Viewport_2, ViewportCamera)
	v4:SetModel(v2)
	local v5 = v4:GetFitDistance(v3.Position)
	ViewportCamera.CFrame = CFrame.new(v3.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0) * CFrame.new(0, 0, v5 * 0.9)
	v2:PivotTo(v2:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.pi, 0))
	local v6 = 180
	local v7 = 0
	local v8 = 0
	local v9 = true
	v1:Add(RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p1) --[[ Line: 84 | Upvalues: v7 (ref), v9 (ref), IsReallyVisible (ref), Viewport_2 (copy), v8 (ref), v6 (ref), v2 (copy) ]]
		if os.clock() - v7 > 0.1 then
			v7 = os.clock()
			v9 = IsReallyVisible(Viewport_2)
		end
		local v1 = os.clock() - v8
		if v1 < 0.01 then
			return
		end
		v8 = os.clock()
		if not v9 then
			return
		end
		v6 = v6 + 1 * v1
		v2:PivotTo(v2:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(1), 0))
	end))
	v1:Add(ViewportCamera)
	v1:LinkToInstance(Viewport_2)
	return Viewport_2, v1
end
return CreatePreview



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Modules.ViewportModel

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = { 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 }
local t2 = { 0, 1, 3, 4, 5, 7 }
local t3 = { 0, 1, 4, 5, 6 }
local t4 = {}
t4.__index = t4
t4.ClassName = "ViewportModel"
local function getIndices(p1) --[[ getIndices | Line: 37 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), t3 (copy), t (copy) ]]
	if p1:IsA("WedgePart") then
		return t2
	end
	if p1:IsA("CornerWedgePart") then
		return t3
	else
		return t
	end
end
local function getCorners(p1, p2, p3) --[[ getCorners | Line: 46 ]]
	local t = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p3) do
		local v1 = math.floor(v / 4) % 2 * 2 - 1
		t[k] = p1 * (p2 * Vector3.new(v1, math.floor(v / 2) % 2 * 2 - 1, 2 * (v % 2) - 1))
	end
	return t
end
local function getModelPointCloud(p1) --[[ getModelPointCloud | Line: 58 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), t3 (copy), t (copy), getCorners (copy) ]]
	local t4 = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p1:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") then
			for k2, v3 in pairs((getCorners(v.CFrame, v.Size / 2, if v:IsA("WedgePart") then t2 elseif v:IsA("CornerWedgePart") then t3 else t))) do
				table.insert(t4, v3)
			end
		end
	end
	return t4
end
local function viewProjectionEdgeHits(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ viewProjectionEdgeHits | Line: 72 ]]
	local v1 = (-1 / 0)
	local v2 = (1 / 0)
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		local v3 = p4 * (p3 - v.Z)
		local v4 = v[p2] + v3
		local v5 = v[p2] - v3
		local v6 = math.max(v1, v4, v5)
		v1, v2 = v6, math.min(v2, v4, v5)
	end
	return v1, v2
end
function t4.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 91 | Upvalues: t4 (copy) ]]
	local v2 = setmetatable({}, t4)
	v2.Model = nil
	v2.ViewportFrame = p1
	v2.Camera = p2
	v2._points = {}
	v2._modelCFrame = CFrame.new()
	v2._modelSize = Vector3.new()
	v2._modelRadius = 0
	v2._viewport = {}
	v2:Calibrate()
	return v2
end
function t4.SetModel(p1, p2) --[[ SetModel | Line: 115 | Upvalues: getModelPointCloud (copy) ]]
	p1.Model = p2
	local v1, v2 = p2:GetBoundingBox()
	p1._points = getModelPointCloud(p2)
	p1._modelCFrame = v1
	p1._modelSize = v2
	p1._modelRadius = v2.Magnitude / 2
end
function t4.Calibrate(p1) --[[ Calibrate | Line: 128 ]]
	local t = {}
	local AbsoluteSize = p1.ViewportFrame.AbsoluteSize
	t.aspect = AbsoluteSize.X / AbsoluteSize.Y
	t.yFov2 = math.rad(p1.Camera.FieldOfView / 2)
	t.tanyFov2 = math.tan(t.yFov2)
	t.xFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * t.aspect)
	t.tanxFov2 = math.tan(t.xFov2)
	t.cFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * math.min(1, t.aspect))
	t.sincFov2 = math.sin(t.cFov2)
	p1._viewport = t
end
function t4.GetFitDistance(p1, p2) --[[ GetFitDistance | Line: 150 ]]
	return (p1._modelRadius + (p2 and (p2 - p1._modelCFrame.Position).Magnitude or 0)) / p1._viewport.sincFov2
end
function t4.GetMinimumFitCFrame(p1, p2) --[[ GetMinimumFitCFrame | Line: 162 | Upvalues: viewProjectionEdgeHits (copy) ]]
	if not p1.Model then
		return CFrame.new()
	end
	local v1 = (p2 - p2.Position):Inverse()
	local _points = p1._points
	local t = { v1 * _points[1] }
	local Z = t[1].Z
	for i = 2, #_points do
		local v2 = v1 * _points[i]
		local v3 = math.min(Z, v2.Z)
		t[i] = v2
		Z = v3
	end
	local v4, v5 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "X", Z, p1._viewport.tanxFov2)
	local v6, v7 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "Y", Z, p1._viewport.tanyFov2)
	return p2 * CFrame.new((v4 + v5) / 2, (v6 + v7) / 2, Z + math.max((v4 - v5) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanxFov2, (v6 - v7) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanyFov2))
end
return t4

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Formatter

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = { "K", "M", "B", "T" }
local t2 = {
	Clock = function(p1) --[[ Clock | Line: 10 ]]
		local v1 = math.floor(p1 / 3600)
		local v2 = math.floor(p1 / 60 % 60)
		local v3 = math.floor(p1 % 60)
		if v1 > 0 then
			return string.format("%02i:%02i:%02i", v1, v2, v3)
		else
			return string.format("%i:%02i", v2, v3)
		end
	end,
	LongTime = function(p1) --[[ LongTime | Line: 24 ]]
		local v1 = math.floor(p1 / 86400)
		local v2 = math.floor(p1 % 86400 / 3600)
		local v5 = string.format("%d minutes, and %02i seconds", math.floor(p1 % 3600 / 60), (math.floor(p1 % 60)))
		if v2 > 0 then
			v5 = string.format("%d hours, ", v2) .. v5
		end
		if v1 > 0 then
			v5 = string.format("%d days, ", v1) .. v5
		end
		return v5
	end,
	MediumTime = function(p1) --[[ MediumTime | Line: 48 ]]
		local v1 = math.floor(p1 / 86400)
		local v2 = math.floor(p1 % 86400 / 3600)
		local v3 = math.floor(p1 % 3600 / 60)
		local v4 = math.floor(p1 % 60)
		if v1 > 0 then
			local v7 = ("%* day%*"):format(v1, if v1 == 1 then "" else "s")
			return if v2 > 0 then v7 .. (" and %* hour%*"):format(v2, if v2 == 1 then "" else "s") else v7
		elseif v2 > 0 then
			local v13 = ("%* hour%*"):format(v2, if v2 == 1 then "" else "s")
			return if v3 > 0 then v13 .. (" and %* minute%*"):format(v3, if v3 == 1 then "" else "s") else v13
		elseif v3 > 0 then
			local v19 = ("%* minute%*"):format(v3, if v3 == 1 then "" else "s")
			return if v4 > 0 then v19 .. (" and %* second%*"):format(v4, if v4 == 1 then "" else "s") else v19
		else
			return ("%* second%*"):format(v4, if v4 == 1 then "" else "s")
		end
	end,
	OneTime = function(p1) --[[ OneTime | Line: 92 ]]
		math.floor(p1 / 86400)
		local v1 = math.floor(p1 % 86400 / 3600)
		local v2 = math.floor(p1 % 3600 / 60)
		local v3 = math.floor(p1 % 60)
		if v1 > 0 then

local function Afn(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ Afn | Line: 3 ]]
	local v1 = (p1 + p2 / 30) % 12
	return p4 - p3 * math.max(math.min(v1 - 3, 9 - v1, 1), -1)
end
local function Hsl2Rgb(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Hsl2Rgb | Line: 9 ]]
	local v1 = p2 * math.min(p3, 1 - p3)
	local v2 = (p1 / 30 + 0) % 12
	local v5 = (p1 / 30 + 8) % 12
	local v8 = (p1 / 30 + 4) % 12
	return p3 - v1 * math.max(math.min(v2 - 3, 9 - v2, 1), -1), p3 - v1 * math.max(math.min(v5 - 3, 9 - v5, 1), -1), p3 - v1 * math.max(math.min(v8 - 3, 9 - v8, 1), -1)
end
local function Rgb2Hsl(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Rgb2Hsl | Line: 15 ]]
	local v1 = math.max(p1, p2, p3)
	local v2 = v1 - math.min(p1, p2, p3)
	local v3 = 1 - math.abs(v1 + v1 - v2 - 1)
	local v4 = if v2 then if v1 == p1 then (p2 - p3) / v2 elseif v1 == p2 then (p3 - p1) / v2 + 2 else (p1 - p2) / v2 + 4 else v2
	return 60 * (if v4 < 0 then v4 + 6 else v4), if v3 == 0 then 0 else v2 / v3, (v1 + v1 - v2) / 2
end
return {
	Hsl2Rgb = Hsl2Rgb,
	Rgb2Hsl = Rgb2Hsl,
	Darken = function(p1, p2) --[[ Darken | Line: 24 | Upvalues: Rgb2Hsl (copy) ]]
		local v1, v2, v3 = Rgb2Hsl(p1.R, p1.G, p1.B)
		local v4 = v3 * (1 - p2)
		local v5 = v2 * math.min(v4, 1 - v4)

		local v9 = (v1 / 30 + 8) % 12
		local v12 = (v1 / 30 + 4) % 12

	end,
	Grayscale = function(p1) --[[ Grayscale | Line: 30 ]]
		local v1 = p1.R * 0.2126 + p1.G * 0.7152 + p1.B * 0.0722
		return Color3.new(v1, v1, v1)
	end

local t = {}
function t.new(p1) --[[ new | Line: 42 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

		_damper = 1,
		_speed = 1,
		_time0 = tick(),
		_position0 = v1,
		_velocity0 = 0 * v1,
		_target = v1
	}, t)
end
function t.Impulse(p1, p2) --[[ Impulse | Line: 57 ]]
	p1.Velocity = p1.Velocity + p2
end
function t.TimeSkip(p1, p2) --[[ TimeSkip | Line: 63 ]]

	local v2, v3 = p1:_positionVelocity(v1 + p2)
	p1._position0 = v2
	p1._velocity0 = v3
	p1._time0 = v1
end
function t.__index(p1, p2) --[[ __index | Line: 71 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t[p2] then
		return t[p2]
	end
	if p2 == "Value" or (p2 == "Position" or p2 == "p") then
		local v1, _ = p1:_positionVelocity(tick())
		return v1
	end
	if p2 == "Velocity" or p2 == "v" then
		local _, v2 = p1:_positionVelocity(tick())
		return v2
	end
	if p2 == "Target" or p2 == "t" then
		return p1._target
	end
	if p2 == "Damper" or p2 == "d" then
		return p1._damper
	end
	if p2 == "Speed" or p2 == "s" then
		return p1._speed
	else
		error(("%q is not a valid member of Spring"):format((tostring(p2))), 2)
	end
end
function t.__newindex(p1, p2, p3) --[[ __newindex | Line: 91 ]]
	local v1 = tick()
	if p2 == "Value" or (p2 == "Position" or p2 == "p") then
		local _, v2 = p1:_positionVelocity(v1)
		p1._position0 = p3
		p1._velocity0 = v2
	elseif p2 == "Velocity" or p2 == "v" then
		local v3, _ = p1:_positionVelocity(v1)
		p1._position0 = v3
		p1._velocity0 = p3
	elseif p2 == "Target" or p2 == "t" then
		local v4, v5 = p1:_positionVelocity(v1)
		p1._position0 = v4
		p1._velocity0 = v5
		p1._target = p3
	elseif p2 == "Damper" or p2 == "d" then
		local v6, v7 = p1:_positionVelocity(v1)
		p1._position0 = v6
		p1._velocity0 = v7
		p1._damper = math.clamp(p3, 0, 1)
	elseif p2 == "Speed" or p2 == "s" then
		local v8, v9 = p1:_positionVelocity(v1)
		p1._position0 = v8
		p1._velocity0 = v9
		p1._speed = if p3 < 0 then 0 else p3
	else
		error(("%q is not a valid member of Spring"):format((tostring(p2))), 2)
	end
	p1._time0 = v1
end
function t._positionVelocity(p1, p2) --[[ _positionVelocity | Line: 124 ]]
	local _position0 = p1._position0
	local _velocity0 = p1._velocity0
	local _target = p1._target
	local _damper = p1._damper
	local _speed = p1._speed
	local v1 = _speed * (p2 - p1._time0)
	local v2 = _damper * _damper
	local v3, v4, v5
	if v2 < 1 then
		local v6 = math.sqrt(1 - v2)
		local v7 = math.exp(-_damper * v1) / v6
		v3 = v7 * math.cos(v6 * v1)
		v4 = v7 * math.sin(v6 * v1)
		v5 = v6
	elseif v2 == 1 then
		v5 = 1
		local v8 = math.exp(-_damper * v1) / v5
		v3 = v8
		v4 = v8 * v1
	else
		local v9 = math.sqrt(v2 - 1)
		local v10 = math.exp((-_damper + v9) * v1) / (2 * v9)
		local v11 = math.exp((-_damper - v9) * v1) / (2 * v9)
		v5 = v9
		v3 = v10 + v11
		v4 = v10 - v11
	end
	return (v5 * v3 + _damper * v4) * _position0 + (1 - (v5 * v3 + _damper * v4)) * _target + v4 / _speed * _velocity0, -_speed * v4 * _position0 + _speed * v4 * _target + (v5 * v3 - _damper * v4) * _velocity0
end
return t
