function getScreenGuiWorldDetails(p1) --[[ getScreenGuiWorldDetails | Line: 43 ]]
	local v1 = p1.Parent
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Front then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.LookVector * v1.Size.Z / 2, v1.CFrame.LookVector
	end
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Back then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.LookVector * -v1.Size.Z / 2, -v1.CFrame.LookVector
	end
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Right then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.RightVector * v1.Size.X / 2, v1.CFrame.RightVector
	end
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Left then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.RightVector * -v1.Size.X / 2, -v1.CFrame.RightVector
	end
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Top then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.UpVector * v1.Size.Y / 2, v1.CFrame.UpVector
	end
	if p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Bottom then
		return v1.Position + v1.CFrame.UpVector * -v1.Size.Y / 2, -v1.CFrame.UpVector
	end
end
function template(p1, p2) --[[ template | Line: 60 ]]
	local v2 = if p1 and (typeof(p1) == "table" and p1) then p1 else {}
	for k, v in pairs(p2) do
		local v3
		if v2[k] == nil or typeof(v) == "table" then
			if typeof(v) == "table" then
				local v4 = template
				v3 = v4(v2[k] or {}, v) or v
			else
				v3 = v
			end
			v2[k] = v3
		end
	end
	return v2
end
function roundToHundredths(p1) --[[ roundToHundredths | Line: 71 ]]
	return math.round(p1 * 100) / 100
end
function t.New(p1, p2) --[[ New | Line: 76 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), t (copy) ]]
	if p1:IsA("SurfaceGui") then
		assert(p1.Face == Enum.NormalId.Front, "Color Picker - SurfaceGui must have it\'s Face property set to \'Front\' to work properly")
	end
	if not (p1:IsA("ScreenGui") and UserInputService:GetMouseLocation() + Vector2.new(50, -20)) then
		local zero = Vector2.zero
	end
	local v1 = template(p2, {
		RoundedCorners = true,
		Draggable = false,
		ZIndex = 1,
		Size = 0.4,
		Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.44, 0),
		Primary = {
			Transparency = 0.2,
			Color = Color3.fromRGB(48, 48, 48)
		},
		Secondary = {
			Transparency = 0.2,
			Color = Color3.fromRGB(31, 31, 31)
		},
		Topbar = {
			Transparency = 0.2,
			Color = Color3.fromRGB(48, 48, 48)
		},
		Text = {
			Transparency = 0,
			Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		}
	})
	local v3 = setmetatable({}, t)
	v3.Params = v1
	v3.Gui = p1
	v3.Connections = {}
	v3:Create()
	v3:SetColor(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255))
	return v3
end
function t.Create(p1) --[[ Create | Line: 107 | Upvalues: RunService (copy), UserInputService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = script.ColorWindow:Clone()
	v1.Position = p1.Params.Position
	v1.Size = UDim2.fromScale(p1.Params.Size, p1.Params.Size)
	v1.ZIndex = p1.Params.ZIndex
	v1.Parent = p1.Gui
	v1.Visible = true
	if p1.Params.Draggable then
		v1.Topbar.Button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 118 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), RunService (ref) ]]
			local v1 = p1:GetMousePos() or Vector2.zero
			local Position = p1.Instance.Position
			p1._dragFunc = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 121 | Upvalues: p1 (ref), v1 (copy), Position (copy) ]]
				local v2 = (p1:GetMousePos() or Vector2.zero) - v1
				p1.Instance.Position = Position + UDim2.fromOffset(v2.X, v2.Y)
			end)
		end)
	end
	p1.Updated = v1.UpdateEvent.Event
	p1.Finished = v1.FinishedEvent.Event
	p1.Canceled = v1.CanceledEvent.Event
	p1.Cancelled = v1.CanceledEvent.Event
	local function _updateVisual(p1, p2) --[[ _updateVisual | Line: 136 ]]
		for k, v in pairs(p1) do
			for k2, v2 in pairs(p2) do
				v[k2] = v2
			end
		end
	end
	_updateVisual({ v1.Content.Background.Top, v1.Content.Background.Bottom.Frame, v1.Properties }, {
		BackgroundColor3 = p1.Params.Primary.Color,
		BackgroundTransparency = p1.Params.Primary.Transparency
	})
	_updateVisual({ v1.Properties.Line, v1.Content.Bottom.Hex.Frame }, {
		BackgroundColor3 = p1.Params.Secondary.Color,
		BackgroundTransparency = p1.Params.Secondary.Transparency
	})
	_updateVisual({ v1.Topbar.Frame, v1.Topbar.Top.Frame }, {
		BackgroundColor3 = p1.Params.Topbar.Color,
		BackgroundTransparency = p1.Params.Topbar.Transparency
	})
	for k, v in pairs({ v1.Properties.HSV, v1.Properties.RGB }) do
		for k2, v2 in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
			if v2:IsA("Frame") then
				v2.Frame.BackgroundColor3 = p1.Params.Secondary.Color
				v2.Frame.BackgroundTransparency = p1.Params.Secondary.Transparency
			end
		end
	end
	for k, v in pairs(v1:GetDescendants()) do
		local v2, v3
		if not p1.Params.RoundedCorners and (v:IsA("UICorner") and v.Parent.Name ~= "Select") then
			v:Destroy()
		end
		if v:IsA("TextLabel") or (v:IsA("TextBox") or v:IsA("ImageButton")) then
			v2 = if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextBox") then "TextColor3" else "ImageColor3"
			v[v2] = p1.Params.Text.Color
			v3 = if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextBox") then "TextTransparency" else "ImageTransparency"
			v[v3] = p1.Params.Text.Transparency
		end
	end
	local Wheel = v1.Content.Wheel
	Wheel.Button.InputBegan:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 181 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), RunService (ref), Wheel (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		p1.Connections.wheelReposition = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 183 | Upvalues: p1 (ref), Wheel (ref) ]]
			local v1 = p1:GetMousePos()
			if not v1 then
				return
			end
			local v2 = (v1 - (Wheel.Image.AbsolutePosition + Wheel.Image.AbsoluteSize / 2)) / Wheel.Image.AbsoluteSize
			if v2.Magnitude > 0.5 then
				v2 = v2.Unit / 2
			end
			Wheel.Image.Select.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5 + v2.X, 0.5 + v2.Y)
			local v3, v4 = toPolar(v2 * Vector2.new(1, -1))
			local v6 = math.clamp(radToDeg(v3) / 360, 0, 1)
			p1.Saturation = math.clamp(v4 * 2, 0, 1)
			p1.Hue = v6
			p1:UpdateColorVisual()
		end)
	end)
	local Right = v1.Content.Right.Value
	Right.Button.InputBegan:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 208 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), RunService (ref), Right (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		p1.Connections.valueReposition = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 210 | Upvalues: p1 (ref), Right (ref) ]]
			local v1 = p1:GetMousePos()
			if not v1 then
				return
			end
			local v3 = 1 - math.clamp((v1.Y - Right.AbsolutePosition.Y) / Right.AbsoluteSize.Y, 0, 1)
			p1.Value = v3
			Right.Select.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 1 - v3)
			p1:UpdateColorVisual()
		end)
	end)
	p1.Connections.inputEnded = UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(p12, p2) --[[ Line: 226 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		if p1.Connections.wheelReposition then
			p1.Connections.wheelReposition:Disconnect()
			p1.Connections.wheelReposition = nil
		end
		if p1.Connections.valueReposition then
			p1.Connections.valueReposition:Disconnect()
			p1.Connections.valueReposition = nil
		end
		if not p1._dragFunc then
			return
		end
		p1._dragFunc:Disconnect()
		p1._dragFunc = nil
	end)
	v1.Content.Bottom.Hex.Frame.TextBox.FocusLost:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 245 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		p1:SetColor((Color3.fromHex(v1.Content.Bottom.Hex.Frame.TextBox.Text)))
	end)
	for k, v in pairs(v1.Properties.RGB:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Frame") then
			v.Frame.TextBox.FocusLost:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 253 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
				p1:SetColor(Color3.fromRGB(math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.RGB.R.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 255, 0, 255), math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.RGB.G.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 255, 0, 255), (math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.RGB.B.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 255, 0, 255))))
			end)
		end
	end
	for k, v in pairs(v1.Properties.HSV:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Frame") then
			v.Frame.TextBox.FocusLost:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 265 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
				p1:SetColor(Color3.fromHSV(math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.HSV.H.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 0, 0, 360) / 360, math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.HSV.S.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 1, 0, 1), (math.clamp(tonumber(v1.Properties.HSV.V.Frame.TextBox.Text) or 1, 0, 1))))
			end)
		end
	end
	v1.Content.Bottom.Buttons.Confirm.InputBegan:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 275 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		v1.FinishedEvent:Fire(Color3.fromHSV(p1.Hue, p1.Saturation, p1.Value))
		p1:Destroy()
	end)
	v1.Content.Bottom.Buttons.Cancel.InputBegan:Connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 282 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and p12.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end
		v1.CanceledEvent:Fire()
		p1:Destroy()
	end)
	p1.Instance = v1
	return v1
end
function t.GetMousePos(p1) --[[ GetMousePos | Line: 294 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
	if p1.Gui:IsA("ScreenGui") then
		return v1 - Vector2.new(0, 36)
	else
		local v2 = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera:ViewportPointToRay(v1.X, v1.Y)
		local v3, v4 = getScreenGuiWorldDetails(p1.Gui)
		local v7 = (-p1.Gui.Parent.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(v2.Origin + v2.Direction * (-(v2.Origin - v3):Dot(v4) / v2.Direction:Dot(v4))) + p1.Gui.Parent.Size / 2) * p1.Gui.PixelsPerStud
		return Vector2.new(v7.X, v7.Y)
	end
end
function t.UpdateColorVisual(p1) --[[ UpdateColorVisual | Line: 312 ]]
	if not p1.Instance then
		return
	end
	local v1 = Color3.fromHSV(p1.Hue, p1.Saturation, p1.Value)
	p1.Instance.UpdateEvent:Fire(v1)
	p1.Instance.Content.Right.Value.UIGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({ ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromHSV(p1.Hue, p1.Saturation, 1)), ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)) })
	p1.Instance.Content.Bottom.Color.Frame.BackgroundColor3 = v1
	p1.Instance.Content.Bottom.Hex.Frame.TextBox.Text = string.format("#%s", v1:ToHex())
	p1.Instance.Properties.RGB.R.Frame.TextBox.Text = math.floor(v1.R * 255)
	p1.Instance.Properties.RGB.G.Frame.TextBox.Text = math.floor(v1.G * 255)
	p1.Instance.Properties.RGB.B.Frame.TextBox.Text = math.floor(v1.B * 255)
	p1.Instance.Properties.HSV.H.Frame.TextBox.Text = math.floor(p1.Hue * 360)
	p1.Instance.Properties.HSV.S.Frame.TextBox.Text = roundToHundredths(p1.Saturation)
	p1.Instance.Properties.HSV.V.Frame.TextBox.Text = roundToHundredths(p1.Value)
end
function t.SetColor(p1, p2) --[[ SetColor | Line: 336 ]]
	if not p1.Instance then
		return
	end
	local v1, v2, v3 = p2:ToHSV()
	p1.Saturation = v2
	p1.Value = v3
	p1.Hue = v1
	local v4 = v1 * math.pi * 2
	local v5 = Vector2.new(-math.cos(v4) / 2 * v2, math.sin(v4) / 2 * v2)
	p1.Instance.Content.Wheel.Image.Select.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5 + v5.X, 0.5 + v5.Y)
	p1.Instance.Content.Right.Value.Select.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 1 - v3)
	p1:UpdateColorVisual()
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 353 ]]
	for k, v in pairs(p1.Connections) do
		if typeof(v) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			v:Disconnect()
		end
	end
	if p1._dragFunc then
		p1._dragFunc:Disconnect()
		p1._dragFunc = nil
	end
	if not p1.Instance then
		return
	end
	p1.Instance:Destroy()
	p1.Instance = nil
end
return t

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.springCoefficients

-- https://lua.expert/
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ springCoefficients | Line: 17 ]]
	if p1 == 0 or p3 == 0 then
		return 1, 0, 0, 1
	end
	if p2 > 1 then
		local v1 = p1 * p3
		local v2 = math.sqrt(p2 ^ 2 - 1)
		local v3 = -0.5 / v2
		local v4 = -v2 - p2
		local v5 = 1 / v4
		local v6 = math.exp(v1 * v4)
		local v7 = math.exp(v1 * v5)
		return (v7 * v4 - v6 * v5) * v3, (v6 - v7) * v3 / p3, (v7 - v6) * v3 * p3, (v6 * v4 - v7 * v5) * v3
	end
	if p2 == 1 then
		local v8 = p1 * p3
		local v9 = math.exp(-v8)
		return v9 * (v8 + 1), v9 * p1, v9 * (-v8 * p3), v9 * (1 - v8)
	else
		local v10 = p1 * p3
		local v11 = math.sqrt(1 - p2 ^ 2)
		local v12 = v11 * v10
		local v13 = math.exp(-v10 * p2)
		local v14 = v13 * math.sin(v12)
		local v15 = v13 * math.cos(v12)
		local v16 = v14 * (1 / v11)
		local v17 = v16 * p2
		return v17 + v15, v16, -(v17 * p2 + v14 * v11), v15 - v17
	end
end

require(v1.Types)

	type = "State",
	kind = "Tween"
}
local t2 = {
	__index = t
}
function t.update(p1) --[[ update | Line: 30 | Upvalues: peek (copy), External (copy), TweenScheduler (copy) ]]
	local v1 = peek(p1._goal)
	if v1 == p1._nextValue and not p1._currentlyAnimating then
		return false
	end
	local v2 = peek(p1._tweenInfo)
	if typeof(v2) ~= "TweenInfo" then
		External.logErrorNonFatal("mistypedTweenInfo", nil, (typeof(v2)))
		return false
	end
	p1._prevValue = p1._currentValue
	p1._nextValue = v1
	p1._currentTweenStartTime = External.lastUpdateStep()
	p1._currentTweenInfo = v2
	local sum = v2.DelayTime + v2.Time
	if v2.Reverses then
		sum = sum + v2.Time
	end
	p1._currentTweenDuration = sum * (v2.RepeatCount + 1)
	TweenScheduler.add(p1)
	return false
end
function t._peek(p1) --[[ _peek | Line: 70 ]]
	return p1._currentValue
end
function t.get(p1) --[[ get | Line: 75 | Upvalues: External (copy) ]]
	External.logError("stateGetWasRemoved")
end
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Tween | Line: 79 | Upvalues: isState (copy), External (copy), peek (copy), t2 (copy), TweenScheduler (copy), whichLivesLonger (copy) ]]
	if isState(p1) then
		External.logError("scopeMissing", nil, "Tweens", "myScope:Tween(goalState, tweenInfo)")
	end
	local v1 = peek(p2)
	if p3 == nil then
		p3 = TweenInfo.new()
	end
	local t = {}
	local v3 = isState(p2)
	if v3 then
		t[p2] = true
	end
	local v4 = isState(p3)
	if v4 then
		t[p3] = true
	end
	local v5 = peek(p3)
	if typeof(v5) ~= "TweenInfo" then
		External.logError("mistypedTweenInfo", nil, (typeof(v5)))
	end
	local v7 = setmetatable({
		_currentTweenDuration = 0,
		_currentTweenStartTime = 0,
		_currentlyAnimating = false,
		scope = p1,
		dependencySet = t,
		dependentSet = {},
		_goal = p2,
		_tweenInfo = p3,
		_tweenInfoIsState = v4,
		_prevValue = v1,
		_nextValue = v1,
		_currentValue = v1,
		_currentTweenInfo = p3
	}, t2)
	local function f8() --[[ Line: 135 | Upvalues: TweenScheduler (ref), v7 (copy) ]]
		TweenScheduler.remove(v7)
		v7.scope = nil
		for k in pairs(v7.dependencySet) do
			k.dependentSet[v7] = nil
		end
	end
	v7.oldestTask = f8
	table.insert(p1, f8)
	if v3 then
		if p2.scope == nil then
			External.logError("useAfterDestroy", nil, ("The %* object"):format(p2.kind), "the Tween that is following it")
		elseif whichLivesLonger(p1, v7.oldestTask, p2.scope, p2.oldestTask) == "definitely-a" then
			External.logWarn("possiblyOutlives", ("The %* object"):format(p2.kind), "the Tween that is following it")
		end
		p2.dependentSet[v7] = true
	end
	return v7
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.lerpType

-- https://lua.expert/
local Oklab = require(script.Parent.Parent.Colour.Oklab)
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ lerpType | Line: 15 | Upvalues: Oklab (copy) ]]
	local v1 = typeof(p1)
	if typeof(p2) == v1 then
		if v1 == "number" then
			return (p2 - p1) * p3 + p1
		end
		if v1 == "CFrame" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Color3" then
			local v2 = Oklab.fromSRGB(p1)
			return Oklab.toSRGB(v2:Lerp(Oklab.fromSRGB(p2), p3), false)
		end
		if v1 == "ColorSequenceKeypoint" then
			local v4 = Oklab.fromSRGB(p1.Value)
			return ColorSequenceKeypoint.new((p2.Time - p1.Time) * p3 + p1.Time, Oklab.toSRGB(v4:Lerp(Oklab.fromSRGB(p2.Value), p3), false))
		end
		if v1 == "DateTime" then
			return DateTime.fromUnixTimestampMillis((p2.UnixTimestampMillis - p1.UnixTimestampMillis) * p3 + p1.UnixTimestampMillis)
		end
		if v1 == "NumberRange" then
			return NumberRange.new((p2.Min - p1.Min) * p3 + p1.Min, (p2.Max - p1.Max) * p3 + p1.Max)
		end
		if v1 == "NumberSequenceKeypoint" then
			return NumberSequenceKeypoint.new((p2.Time - p1.Time) * p3 + p1.Time, (p2.Value - p1.Value) * p3 + p1.Value, (p2.Envelope - p1.Envelope) * p3 + p1.Envelope)
		end
		if v1 == "PhysicalProperties" then
			return PhysicalProperties.new((p2.Density - p1.Density) * p3 + p1.Density, (p2.Friction - p1.Friction) * p3 + p1.Friction, (p2.Elasticity - p1.Elasticity) * p3 + p1.Elasticity, (p2.FrictionWeight - p1.FrictionWeight) * p3 + p1.FrictionWeight, (p2.ElasticityWeight - p1.ElasticityWeight) * p3 + p1.ElasticityWeight)
		end
		if v1 == "Ray" then
			return Ray.new(p1.Origin:Lerp(p2.Origin, p3), p1.Direction:Lerp(p2.Direction, p3))
		end
		if v1 == "Rect" then
			return Rect.new(p1.Min:Lerp(p2.Min, p3), p1.Max:Lerp(p2.Max, p3))
		end
		if v1 == "Region3" then
			local v6 = p1.CFrame.Position:Lerp(p2.CFrame.Position, p3)
			local v7 = p1.Size:Lerp(p2.Size, p3) / 2
			return Region3.new(v6 - v7, v6 + v7)
		end
		if v1 == "Region3int16" then
			return Region3int16.new(Vector3int16.new((p2.Min.X - p1.Min.X) * p3 + p1.Min.X, (p2.Min.Y - p1.Min.Y) * p3 + p1.Min.Y, (p2.Min.Z - p1.Min.Z) * p3 + p1.Min.Z), Vector3int16.new((p2.Max.X - p1.Max.X) * p3 + p1.Max.X, (p2.Max.Y - p1.Max.Y) * p3 + p1.Max.Y, (p2.Max.Z - p1.Max.Z) * p3 + p1.Max.Z))
		end
		if v1 == "UDim" then
			return UDim.new((p2.Scale - p1.Scale) * p3 + p1.Scale, (p2.Offset - p1.Offset) * p3 + p1.Offset)
		end
		if v1 == "UDim2" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector2" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector2int16" then
			return Vector2int16.new((p2.X - p1.X) * p3 + p1.X, (p2.Y - p1.Y) * p3 + p1.Y)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector3" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector3int16" then
			return Vector3int16.new((p2.X - p1.X) * p3 + p1.X, (p2.Y - p1.Y) * p3 + p1.Y, (p2.Z - p1.Z) * p3 + p1.Z)
		end
	end
	if p3 < 0.5 then
		return p1
	else
		return p2
	end
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.unpackType

-- https://lua.expert/
local Oklab = require(script.Parent.Parent.Colour.Oklab)
return function(p1, p2) --[[ unpackType | Line: 14 | Upvalues: Oklab (copy) ]]
	if p2 == "number" then
		return { p1 }
	end
	if p2 == "CFrame" then
		local v1, v2 = p1:ToAxisAngle()
		return {
			p1.X,
			p1.Y,
			p1.Z,
			v1.X,
			v1.Y,
			v1.Z,
			v2
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Color3" then
		local v3 = Oklab.fromSRGB(p1)
		return { v3.X, v3.Y, v3.Z }
	end
	if p2 == "ColorSequenceKeypoint" then
		local v4 = Oklab.fromSRGB(p1.Value)
		return {
			v4.X,
			v4.Y,
			v4.Z,
			p1.Time
		}
	end
	if p2 == "DateTime" then
		return { p1.UnixTimestampMillis }
	end
	if p2 == "NumberRange" then
		return { p1.Min, p1.Max }
	end
	if p2 == "NumberSequenceKeypoint" then
		return { p1.Value, p1.Time, p1.Envelope }
	end
	if p2 == "PhysicalProperties" then
		return {
			p1.Density,
			p1.Friction,
			p1.Elasticity,
			p1.FrictionWeight,
			p1.ElasticityWeight
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Ray" then
		return {
			p1.Origin.X,
			p1.Origin.Y,
			p1.Origin.Z,
			p1.Direction.X,
			p1.Direction.Y,
			p1.Direction.Z
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Rect" then
		return {
			p1.Min.X,
			p1.Min.Y,
			p1.Max.X,
			p1.Max.Y
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Region3" then
		return {
			p1.CFrame.X,
			p1.CFrame.Y,
			p1.CFrame.Z,
			p1.Size.X,
			p1.Size.Y,
			p1.Size.Z
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Region3int16" then
		return {
			p1.Min.X,
			p1.Min.Y,
			p1.Min.Z,
			p1.Max.X,
			p1.Max.Y,
			p1.Max.Z
		}
	end
	if p2 == "UDim" then
		return { p1.Scale, p1.Offset }
	end
	if p2 == "UDim2" then
		return {
			p1.X.Scale,
			p1.X.Offset,
			p1.Y.Scale,
			p1.Y.Offset
		}
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2" then
		return { p1.X, p1.Y }
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2int16" then
		return { p1.X, p1.Y }
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3" then
		return { p1.X, p1.Y, p1.Z }
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3int16" then
		return { p1.X, p1.Y, p1.Z }
	else
		return {}
	end
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.TweenScheduler

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.InternalTypes)
local External = require(v1.External)
local lerpType = require(v1.Animation.lerpType)
local getTweenRatio = require(v1.Animation.getTweenRatio)
local updateAll = require(v1.State.updateAll)
local t = {}
local t2 = {}
function t.add(p1) --[[ add | Line: 27 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = true
end
function t.remove(p1) --[[ remove | Line: 36 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = nil
end
local function updateAllTweens(p1) --[[ updateAllTweens | Line: 45 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), updateAll (copy), t (copy), getTweenRatio (copy), lerpType (copy) ]]
	for v1 in t2 do
		local v2 = p1 - v1._currentTweenStartTime
		if v1._currentTweenDuration < v2 and v1._currentTweenInfo.RepeatCount > -1 then
			if v1._currentTweenInfo.Reverses then
				v1._currentValue = v1._prevValue
			else
				v1._currentValue = v1._nextValue
			end
			v1._currentlyAnimating = false
			updateAll(v1)
			t.remove(v1)
			continue
		end
		v1._currentValue = lerpType(v1._prevValue, v1._nextValue, (getTweenRatio(v1._currentTweenInfo, v2)))
		v1._currentlyAnimating = true
		updateAll(v1)
	end
end
External.bindToUpdateStep(updateAllTweens)
return t



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.packType

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local Oklab = require(v1.Colour.Oklab)
return function(p1, p2) --[[ packType | Line: 15 | Upvalues: Oklab (copy) ]]
	if p2 == "number" then
		return p1[1]
	end
	if p2 == "CFrame" then
		local v1 = CFrame.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
		return v1 * CFrame.fromAxisAngle(Vector3.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6]).Unit, p1[7])
	end
	if p2 == "Color3" then
		return Oklab.toSRGB(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), false)
	end
	if p2 == "ColorSequenceKeypoint" then
		return ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(p1[4], Oklab.toSRGB(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), false))
	end
	if p2 == "DateTime" then
		return DateTime.fromUnixTimestampMillis(p1[1])
	end
	if p2 == "NumberRange" then
		return NumberRange.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "NumberSequenceKeypoint" then
		return NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(p1[2], p1[1], p1[3])
	end
	if p2 == "PhysicalProperties" then
		return PhysicalProperties.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4], p1[5])
	end
	if p2 == "Ray" then
		return Ray.new(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), (Vector3.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6])))
	end
	if p2 == "Rect" then
		return Rect.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4])
	end
	if p2 == "Region3" then
		local v24 = Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
		local v28 = Vector3.new(p1[4] / 2, p1[5] / 2, p1[6] / 2)
		return Region3.new(v24 - v28, v24 + v28)
	end
	if p2 == "Region3int16" then
		return Region3int16.new(Vector3int16.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), Vector3int16.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6]))
	end
	if p2 == "UDim" then
		return UDim.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "UDim2" then
		return UDim2.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2" then
		return Vector2.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2int16" then
		return Vector2int16.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3" then
		return Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3int16" then
		return Vector3int16.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
	else
		return nil
	end
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.SpringScheduler

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.InternalTypes)
local External = require(v1.External)
local packType = require(v1.Animation.packType)
local springCoefficients = require(v1.Animation.springCoefficients)
local updateAll = require(v1.State.updateAll)
local t = {}
local t2 = {}
local v2 = External.lastUpdateStep()
function t.add(p1) --[[ add | Line: 25 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), t2 (copy) ]]
	p1._lastSchedule = v2
	table.clear(p1._startDisplacements)
	table.clear(p1._startVelocities)
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._springGoals) do
		p1._startDisplacements[i] = p1._springPositions[i] - v
		p1._startVelocities[i] = p1._springVelocities[i]
	end
	t2[p1] = true
end
function t.remove(p1) --[[ remove | Line: 42 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = nil
end
local function updateAllSprings(p1) --[[ updateAllSprings | Line: 48 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), t2 (copy), springCoefficients (copy), External (copy), packType (copy), updateAll (copy) ]]
	local tbl = {}
	v2 = p1
	for k in pairs(t2) do
		local v1, v22, v3, v4 = springCoefficients(p1 - k._lastSchedule, k._currentDamping, k._currentSpeed)
		local _springPositions = k._springPositions
		local _springVelocities = k._springVelocities
		local _startDisplacements = k._startDisplacements
		local _startVelocities = k._startVelocities
		local v5 = false
		for i, v in ipairs(k._springGoals) do
			if v == v then
				local v6 = _startDisplacements[i]
				local v7 = _startVelocities[i]
				local v8 = v6 * v1 + v7 * v22
				local v9 = v6 * v3 + v7 * v4
				if v8 ~= v8 or v9 ~= v9 then
					External.logWarn("springNanMotion")
					v8 = 0
					v9 = 0
				end
				if math.abs(v8) > 0.0001 or math.abs(v9) > 0.0001 then
					v5 = true
				end
				_springPositions[i] = v8 + v
				_springVelocities[i] = v9
				continue
			end
			External.logWarn("springNanGoal")
		end
		if not v5 then
			tbl[k] = true
		end
	end
	for k in pairs(tbl) do
		t2[k] = nil
		k._currentValue = packType(k._springGoals, k._currentType)
		updateAll(k)
	end
	for k in pairs(t2) do
		k._currentValue = packType(k._springPositions, k._currentType)
		updateAll(k)
	end
end
External.bindToUpdateStep(updateAllSprings)
return t



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Animation.getTweenRatio

-- https://lua.expert/
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
return function(p1, p2) --[[ getTweenRatio | Line: 13 | Upvalues: TweenService (copy) ]]
	local DelayTime = p1.DelayTime
	local Time = p1.Time
	local sum = DelayTime + Time
	if p1.Reverses then
		sum = sum + Time
	end
	if sum * (1 + p1.RepeatCount) <= p2 and p1.RepeatCount > -1 then
		return 1
	end
	local v2 = p2 % sum
	if v2 <= DelayTime then
		return 0
	end
	local sum_2 = (v2 - DelayTime) / Time
	if sum_2 > 1 then
		sum_2 = 2 - sum_2
	end
	return TweenService:GetValue(sum_2, p1.EasingStyle, p1.EasingDirection)
end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Instances.applyInstanceProps

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local External = require(v1.External)
local isState = require(v1.State.isState)
local parseError = require(v1.Logging.parseError)
local Observer = require(v1.State.Observer)
local peek = require(v1.State.peek)
local xtypeof = require(v1.Utility.xtypeof)
local whichLivesLonger = require(v1.Memory.whichLivesLonger)
local function setProperty_unsafe(p1, p2, p3) --[[ setProperty_unsafe | Line: 29 ]]
	p1[p2] = p3
end
local function testPropertyAssignable(p1, p2) --[[ testPropertyAssignable | Line: 37 ]]
	p1[p2] = p1[p2]
end
local function setProperty(p1, p2, p3) --[[ setProperty | Line: 44 | Upvalues: setProperty_unsafe (copy), parseError (copy), testPropertyAssignable (copy), External (copy) ]]
	local v1, v2 = xpcall(setProperty_unsafe, parseError, p1, p2, p3)
	if v1 then
		return
	end
	if not pcall(testPropertyAssignable, p1, p2) then
		External.logErrorNonFatal("cannotAssignProperty", nil, p1.ClassName, p2)
		return
	end
	local v3 = typeof(p3)
	local v5 = typeof(p1[p2])
	if v3 == v5 then
		External.logErrorNonFatal("propertySetError", v2)
		return
	end
	External.logErrorNonFatal("invalidPropertyType", nil, p1.ClassName, p2, v5, v3)
end
local function bindProperty(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ bindProperty | Line: 69 | Upvalues: isState (copy), External (copy), whichLivesLonger (copy), Observer (copy), setProperty (copy), peek (copy) ]]
	if not isState(p4) then
		setProperty(p2, p3, p4)
		return
	end
	if p4.scope == nil then
		External.logError("useAfterDestroy", nil, ("The %* object, bound to %*,"):format(p4.kind, p3), (("the %* instance"):format(p2.ClassName)))
	elseif whichLivesLonger(p1, p2, p4.scope, p4.oldestTask) == "definitely-a" then
		External.logWarn("possiblyOutlives", ("The %* object, bound to %*,"):format(p4.kind, p3), (("the %* instance"):format(p2.ClassName)))
	end
	Observer(p1, p4):onBind(function() --[[ Line: 83 | Upvalues: setProperty (ref), p2 (copy), p3 (copy), peek (ref), p4 (copy) ]]
		setProperty(p2, p3, peek(p4))
	end)
end
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ applyInstanceProps | Line: 92 | Upvalues: xtypeof (copy), bindProperty (copy), External (copy) ]]
	local t = {
		self = {},
		descendants = {},
		ancestor = {},
		observer = {}
	}
	for k, v in pairs(p2) do
		local v1 = xtypeof(k)
		if v1 == "string" then
			if k ~= "Parent" then
				bindProperty(p1, p3, k, v)
			end
			continue
		end
		if v1 == "SpecialKey" then
			local stage = k.stage
			local v2 = t[stage]
			if v2 == nil then
				External.logError("unrecognisedPropertyStage", nil, stage)
				continue
			end
			v2[k] = v
			continue
		end
		External.logError("unrecognisedPropertyKey", nil, v1)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.self) do
		k:apply(p1, v, p3)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.descendants) do
		k:apply(p1, v, p3)
	end
	if p2.Parent ~= nil then
		bindProperty(p1, p3, "Parent", p2.Parent)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.ancestor) do
		k:apply(p1, v, p3)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.observer) do
		k:apply(p1, v, p3)
	end
end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Logging.formatError

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local messages = require(v1.Logging.messages)
return function(p1, p2, p3, ...) --[[ formatError | Line: 16 | Upvalues: messages (copy) ]]
	local v1 = if typeof(p3) == "table" then p3 else nil
	local v2, v3
	if typeof(p3) == "table" then
		v2 = p3.trace
		v3 = p2
	else
		v3 = p2
		v2 = p3
	end
	local v4 = messages[p2]
	if v4 == nil then
		p2 = "unknownMessage"
		v4 = messages[p2]
	end
	local v5 = v4:format(...)
	local v6
	if v1 == nil then
		v6 = v5:gsub("ERROR_MESSAGE", v3)
	else
		local v8 = v5:gsub("ERROR_MESSAGE", v1.message)
		v6 = if v1.context == nil then v8 else v8 .. (" (%*)"):format(v1.context)
	end
	local v9 = ("[Fusion] %* \nID: %*"):format(v6, p2)
	local v10 = if p1 == nil or not p1.policies.allowWebLinks then v9 else v9 .. ("\nLearn more: https://elttob.uk/Fusion/0.3/api-reference/general/errors/#%*"):format((p2:lower()))
	if v2 ~= nil then
		v10 = v10 .. (" \n---- Stack trace ----\n%*"):format(v2)
	end
	return v10:gsub("\n", "\n    ")
end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Vendor.Fusion.Memory.doCleanup

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local External = require(v1.External)
local t = {}
local function v2(p1) --[[ doCleanup | Line: 22 | Upvalues: t (copy), External (copy), v2 (copy) ]]
	if t[p1] then
		return External.logError("destroyedTwice")
	end
	t[p1] = true
	if typeof(p1) == "Instance" then
		p1:Destroy()
	elseif typeof(p1) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
		p1:Disconnect()
	elseif typeof(p1) == "function" then
		p1()
	elseif typeof(p1) == "table" then
		if typeof(p1.destroy) == "function" then
			p1:destroy()
		elseif typeof(p1.Destroy) == "function" then
			p1:Destroy()
		elseif p1[1] ~= nil then
			for i = #p1, 1, -1 do
				v2(p1[i])
				p1[i] = nil
			end
		end
	end
	t[p1] = nil
end
return v2

require(script.Parent.Parent.Types)
local function whichScopeLivesLonger(p1, p2) --[[ whichScopeLivesLonger | Line: 14 ]]
	local v1 = 2
	local t = { p1, p2 }
	local t2 = {}
	local count = 0
	local t3 = {}
	while v1 > 0 do
		for v2, v3 in t do
			t2[v3] = true
			for i, v in ipairs(v3) do
				if v == p1 then
					return "definitely-b"
				end
				if v == p2 then
					return "definitely-a"
				end
				if typeof(v) == "table" and (v[1] ~= nil and t2[v3] == nil) then
					count = count + 1
					t3[count] = v
				end
			end
		end
		table.clear(t)
		v1, t, count, t3 = count, t3, 0, t
	end
	return "unsure"
end
return function(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ whichLivesLonger | Line: 49 | Upvalues: whichScopeLivesLonger (copy) ]]
	if p1 ~= p3 then
		return whichScopeLivesLonger(p1, p3)
	end
	for i = #p1, 1, -1 do
		local v1 = p1[i]
		if v1 == p2 then
			return "definitely-b"
		end
		if v1 == p4 then
			return "definitely-a"
		end
	end
	return "unsure"
end

return function(p1) --[[ updateAll | Line: 19 ]]

	local t = {}
	local t2 = {}
	local count_2 = 1
	local t3 = {}

	end

			for v5 in v2.dependentSet do
				count = count + 1
				t[count] = v5
			end
		end
		count_2 = count_2 + 1
	end
	local count_3 = 1
	while count_3 <= count do
		local v6 = t[count_3]
		local v7 = t3[v6] - 1

				t2[v8] = true
			end
		end
		count_3 = count_3 + 1
	end

function t.setState(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ setState | Line: 481 | Upvalues: Utility (copy), v4 (copy) ]]

end

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local t = {
	objectName = "TopbarPlusReference"
}
function t.addToReplicatedStorage() --[[ addToReplicatedStorage | Line: 10 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy), t (copy) ]]
	if ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(t.objectName) then
		return false
	else
		local v1 = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
		v1.Name = t.objectName
		v1.Value = script.Parent
		v1.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
		return v1
	end
end
function t.getObject() --[[ getObject | Line: 22 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy), t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(t.objectName)
	if v1 then
		return v1
	else
		return false
	end
end
return t

function findExistingAnimationInSet(p1, p2) --[[ findExistingAnimationInSet | Line: 111 ]]
	if p1 == nil or p2 == nil then
		return 0
	end
	for i = 1, p1.count do
		if p1[i].anim.AnimationId == p2.AnimationId then
			return i
		end
	end
	return 0
end
function configureAnimationSet(p1, p2) --[[ configureAnimationSet | Line: 125 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), t (copy), Humanoid (copy) ]]
	if t2[p1] ~= nil then
		for k, v in pairs(t2[p1].connections) do
			v:disconnect()
		end
	end
	t2[p1] = {}
	t2[p1].count = 0
	t2[p1].totalWeight = 0
	t2[p1].connections = {}
	local v1 = true
	local v2, _ = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 138 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
		v1 = game:GetService("StarterPlayer").AllowCustomAnimations
	end)
	if not v2 then
		v1 = true
	end
	local v3 = script:FindFirstChild(p1)

		table.insert(t2[p1].connections, v3.ChildAdded:connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 146 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]
			configureAnimationSet(p1, p2)
		end))
		table.insert(t2[p1].connections, v3.ChildRemoved:connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 147 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]
			configureAnimationSet(p1, p2)
		end))
		for k, v in pairs(v3:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Animation") then
				local Weight = v:FindFirstChild("Weight")
				local v4 = if Weight == nil then 1 else Weight.Value
				t2[p1].count = t2[p1].count + 1
				local count = t2[p1].count
				t2[p1][count] = {}
				t2[p1][count].anim = v
				t2[p1][count].weight = v4
				t2[p1].totalWeight = t2[p1].totalWeight + t2[p1][count].weight
				table.insert(t2[p1].connections, v.Changed:connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 163 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]
					configureAnimationSet(p1, p2)
				end))
				table.insert(t2[p1].connections, v.ChildAdded:connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 164 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]
					configureAnimationSet(p1, p2)
				end))

					configureAnimationSet(p1, p2)
				end))

		end
	end

		end

				Humanoid:LoadAnimation(v[i].anim)
				t[v[i].anim.AnimationId] = true
			end
		end
	end
end

				table.insert(t2[p1].connections, v.Changed:connect(function(p12) --[[ Line: 222 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]

function getHeightScale() --[[ getHeightScale | Line: 341 | Upvalues: Humanoid (copy), getRigScale (copy), ScaleDampeningPercent (ref) ]]
	if not Humanoid then
		return getRigScale()
	end
	if not Humanoid.AutomaticScalingEnabled then
		return getRigScale()
	end
	local v1 = Humanoid.HipHeight / 2
	if ScaleDampeningPercent == nil then
		ScaleDampeningPercent = script:FindFirstChild("ScaleDampeningPercent")
	end
	if ScaleDampeningPercent ~= nil then
		v1 = 1 + (Humanoid.HipHeight - 2) * ScaleDampeningPercent.Value / 2
	end
	return v1
end
local function rootMotionCompensation(p1) --[[ rootMotionCompensation | Line: 361 ]]
	return p1 * 1.25 / getHeightScale()
end
local function setRunSpeed(p1) --[[ setRunSpeed | Line: 369 | Upvalues: v11 (ref), v14 (ref) ]]
	local v1 = p1 * 1.25 / getHeightScale()
	local v2 = 0.0001
	local v3 = 1
	local v4
	if v1 <= 0.5 then
		v2 = 1
		v4 = 0.0001
		v3 = v1 / 0.5
	elseif v1 < 1 then
		local v5 = (v1 - 0.5) / 0.5
		v2 = 1 - v5
		v4 = v5
	else
		v4 = 1
		v3 = v1 / 1
	end
	v11:AdjustWeight(v2)
	v14:AdjustWeight(v4)
	v11:AdjustSpeed(v3)
	v14:AdjustSpeed(v3)
end

function keyFrameReachedFunc(p1) --[[ keyFrameReachedFunc | Line: 406 | Upvalues: v9 (ref), v5 (copy), v14 (ref), v11 (ref), t3 (copy), v21 (ref), v13 (ref), Humanoid (copy) ]]

		end

			v14.TimePosition = 0
		end

			v11.TimePosition = 0
		end

			v1 = "idle"

			if v11.Looped then
				return

	end
end
function rollAnimation(p1) --[[ rollAnimation | Line: 444 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	local sum = math.random(1, t2[p1].totalWeight)
	local count = 1
	while t2[p1][count].weight < sum do
		sum = sum - t2[p1][count].weight
		count = count + 1
	end
	return count
end

	v10 = p1

	if (v21 and Humanoid.MoveDirection == Vector3.new(0, 0, 0) and Humanoid.WalkSpeed / v1 or 0.75) * v1 < p1 then
		playAnimation("walk", 0.2, Humanoid)

		v2 = "Running"
		return

		return

	v2 = "Standing"
end

function onSwimming(p1) --[[ onSwimming | Line: 647 | Upvalues: v8 (copy), Humanoid (copy), v2 (ref) ]]

		p1 = p1 / getHeightScale()
	end
	if p1 > 1 then
		playAnimation("swim", 0.4, Humanoid)
		setAnimationSpeed(p1 / 10)
		v2 = "Swimming"
	else
		playAnimation("swimidle", 0.4, Humanoid)
		v2 = "Standing"
	end
end
function animateTool() --[[ animateTool | Line: 662 | Upvalues: v18 (ref), Humanoid (copy) ]]
	if v18 == "None" then
		playToolAnimation("toolnone", 0.1, Humanoid, Enum.AnimationPriority.Idle)
		return
	end
	if v18 == "Slash" then
		playToolAnimation("toolslash", 0, Humanoid, Enum.AnimationPriority.Action)
		return
	end
	if v18 == "Lunge" then
		playToolAnimation("toollunge", 0, Humanoid, Enum.AnimationPriority.Action)
	end
end
function getToolAnim(p1) --[[ getToolAnim | Line: 679 ]]
	for i, v in ipairs(p1:GetChildren()) do
		if v.Name == "toolanim" and v.className == "StringValue" then
			return v
		end
	end
	return nil
end
local v26 = 0
function stepAnimate(p1) --[[ stepAnimate | Line: 690 | Upvalues: v26 (ref), v20 (ref), v2 (ref), Humanoid (copy), v1 (copy), v18 (ref), v19 (ref), v24 (ref) ]]
	local v12 = p1 - v26
	v26 = p1
	if v20 > 0 then
		v20 = v20 - v12
	end
	if v2 == "FreeFall" and v20 <= 0 then
		playAnimation("fall", 0.2, Humanoid)
	else
		if v2 == "Seated" then
			playAnimation("sit", 0.5, Humanoid)
			return
		end
		if v2 == "Running" then
			playAnimation("walk", 0.2, Humanoid)
		elseif v2 == "Dead" or (v2 == "GettingUp" or (v2 == "FallingDown" or (v2 == "Seated" or v2 == "PlatformStanding"))) then
			stopAllAnimations()
		end
	end
	local Tool = v1:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
	if not (Tool and Tool:FindFirstChild("Handle")) then
		stopToolAnimations()
		v18 = "None"
		v24 = nil
		v19 = 0
		return
	end
	local v22 = getToolAnim(Tool)
	if v22 then
		v18 = v22.Value
		v22.Parent = nil
		v19 = p1 + 0.3
	end
	if not (v19 < p1) then
		animateTool()
		return
	end
	v19 = 0
	v18 = "None"
	animateTool()
end

end)

function findExistingAnimationInSet(p1, p2) --[[ findExistingAnimationInSet | Line: 111 ]]
	if p1 == nil or p2 == nil then
		return 0
	end
	for i = 1, p1.count do
		if p1[i].anim.AnimationId == p2.AnimationId then
			return i
		end
	end
	return 0
end

		return getRigScale()
	end

function rollAnimation(p1) --[[ rollAnimation | Line: 444 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	local sum = math.random(1, t2[p1].totalWeight)
	local count = 1
	while t2[p1][count].weight < sum do
		sum = sum - t2[p1][count].weight
		count = count + 1
	end
	return count
end

local v26 = 0
function stepAnimate(p1) --[[ stepAnimate | Line: 690 | Upvalues: v26 (ref), v20 (ref), v2 (ref), Humanoid (copy), v1 (copy), v18 (ref), v19 (ref), v24 (ref) ]]
	local v12 = p1 - v26
	v26 = p1
	if v20 > 0 then
		v20 = v20 - v12
	end
	if v2 == "FreeFall" and v20 <= 0 then
		playAnimation("fall", 0.2, Humanoid)
	else
		if v2 == "Seated" then
			playAnimation("sit", 0.5, Humanoid)
			return
		end
		if v2 == "Running" then
			playAnimation("walk", 0.2, Humanoid)
		elseif v2 == "Dead" or (v2 == "GettingUp" or (v2 == "FallingDown" or (v2 == "Seated" or v2 == "PlatformStanding"))) then
			stopAllAnimations()
		end
	end
	local Tool = v1:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
	if not (Tool and Tool:FindFirstChild("Handle")) then
		stopToolAnimations()
		v18 = "None"
		v24 = nil
		v19 = 0
		return
	end
	local v22 = getToolAnim(Tool)
	if v22 then
		v18 = v22.Value
		v22.Parent = nil

local function round_fmt(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ round_fmt | Line: 68 ]]
	if p2 == 0 then
		return 0, 0, false
	end
	local v1 = nil
	if p4.type ~= "unlimited" then
		local v2 = nil
		local v3 = nil
		if p4.type == "fracSigt" then
			local maxFractionDigits = p4.maxFractionDigits
			local maxSignificantDigits = p4.maxSignificantDigits
			if maxFractionDigits then
				if p4.roundingPriority == "strict" then
					v2 = math.min(p3 + maxFractionDigits, maxSignificantDigits)
				elseif p4.roundingPriority == "relaxed" then
					v2 = math.max(p3 + maxFractionDigits, maxSignificantDigits)
				end
			else
				v2 = maxSignificantDigits
			end
		else
			if not p4.max then
				return p2, p3, false
			end
			if p4.type == "fraction" then
				v2 = p3 + p4.max
			elseif p4.type == "significant" then
				v2 = p4.max
			end
		end
		local v6
		if v2 < 0 then
			v6 = -1
			v3 = true
			p2 = 0
			v1 = -v2 + 1
		elseif v2 < p2 then
			v1 = 1
			local v7 = if p1[v2 + 1] == 5 then if v2 + 1 == p2 then 0 else 1 elseif p1[v2 + 1] < 5 then -1 else 1
			v6, v3, p2 = v7, if v2 == 0 then true elseif p1[v2] % 2 == 0 then true else false, v2
		else
			v6 = -2
		end
		local v9 = nil
		if p5 == 1 then
			v9 = v6 >= 0
		elseif p5 == 0 then
			v9 = if v6 > 0 then true elseif v6 == 0 then not v3 else false
		end
		if v9 then
			for i = p2, 0, -1 do
				if i == 0 then
					p1[1] = 1
					return 1, p3 + v1, true
				end
				local v11 = (p1[i] or 0) + 1
				if v11 == 10 then
					p1[i] = nil
					p2 = p2 - 1
				else
					p1[i] = v11
					break
				end
			end
		end
		while p1[p2] == 0 do
			p2 = p2 - 1
		end
	end
	return p2, p3, false
end
local function format_numberformatter(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ format_numberformatter | Line: 145 | Upvalues: round_fmt (copy) ]]
	local resolved = p1.resolved
	if not resolved then
		local data = p1.data
		resolved = {
			notation = nil,
			precision = nil,
			roundingMode = nil,
			grouping = nil,
			integerWidth = nil,
			sign = nil
		}
		while data do
			if not resolved[data.key] then
				resolved[data.key] = data.value
			end
			data = data.parent
		end
		if not resolved.notation then
			resolved.notation = {
				type = "simple"
			}
		end
		if not resolved.precision then
			resolved.precision = if resolved.notation.type == "compact" then {
	type = "fracSigt",
	minFractionDigits = 0,
	maxFractionDigits = 0,
	maxSignificantDigits = 2,
	roundingPriority = "relaxed"
} or {
	type = "fraction",
	min = 0,
	max = 6
} else {
	type = "fraction",
	min = 0,
	max = 6
}
		end
		if not resolved.roundingMode then
			resolved.roundingMode = if resolved.notation.type == "simple" then 0 else 2
		end
		if not resolved.grouping then
			resolved.grouping = if resolved.notation.type == "compact" then 1 else 2
		end
		if not resolved.integerWidth then
			resolved.integerWidth = {
				zeroFillTo = 1,
				truncateAt = nil
			}
		end
		if not resolved.sign then
			resolved.sign = 0
		end
		p1.resolved = resolved
	end
	local v4, v5
	if p3 == "nan" then
		v4 = true
		v5 = "NaN"
	elseif p3 == "inf" then
		v4 = false
		v5 = "\226\136\158"
	else
		local precision = resolved.precision
		local notation = resolved.notation
		local sum
		if notation.type == "simple" or p4 == 0 then
			sum = 0
		else
			sum = p5 - 1
			if notation.engineering then
				p5 = sum % 3 + 1
				sum = math.floor(sum / 3) * 3
			elseif notation.type == "compact" then

function t.sal(p1, p2) --[[ sal | Line: 10 ]]

	p1.expt = p1.expt + (p2 - v1) / 28
	local v2 = 0

		local v4 = bit32.band(v2 + bit32.lshift(v, v1), 268435455)
		local v5 = bit32.rshift(v, 28 - v1)
		p1[i] = v4
		v2 = v5
	end
	if v2 == 0 then
		return
	end
	table.insert(p1, v2)
end
function t.clamp(p1) --[[ clamp | Line: 25 ]]

		table.remove(p1)
	end
end
function t.align(p1, p2) --[[ align | Line: 31 ]]

	end

function t.from_power(p1, p2) --[[ from_power | Line: 183 | Upvalues: uint64_t (copy), t (copy) ]]

		return {
			expt = 0,
			1
		}
	end
	local v1 = 0
	while bit32.band(p1, 1) == 0 do
		p1, v1 = bit32.rshift(p1, 1), v1 + 1
	end
	local v3, v4 = p1, 0
	while v3 ~= 0 do
		v3, v4 = bit32.rshift(v3, 1), v4 + 1
	end
	local v6 = table.create(v4 * p2 / 28 + 2)
	v6.expt = 0
	local v7 = 1

		v7 = v7 * 2
	end

		local v13, v14 = uint64_t.mul(v11, v10, v11, v10)
		if bit32.band(p2, v9) == 0 then
			v10 = v14
			v11 = v13
		else
			local v15, v16 = uint64_t.sal(1, 0, 64 - v4)
			local v17, v18 = uint64_t.sub(v15, v16, 1)
			if bit32.band(v13, (bit32.bnot(v17))) == 0 then
				if bit32.band(v14, (bit32.bnot(v18))) == 0 then
					local v21, v22 = uint64_t.mul(v13, v14, p1, 0)
					v10 = v22
					v11 = v21
				else
					v10 = v14
					v11 = v13
					v12 = true
				end
			else
				v10 = v14
				v11 = v13
				v12 = true
			end
		end
		v9 = bit32.rshift(v9, 1)
	end
	t.assign_uint64_t(v6, v11, v10)
	if v12 then
		t.mul_uint32_t(v6, p1)
	end

		t.square(v6)
		if bit32.band(p2, v9) ~= 0 then
			t.mul_uint32_t(v6, p1)
		end
		v9 = bit32.rshift(v9, 1)
	end
	t.sal(v6, v1 * p2)
	return v6
end
function t.compare(p1, p2) --[[ compare | Line: 248 ]]
	local v1 = #p1 + p1.expt
	local v2 = #p2 + p2.expt
	if v1 < v2 then
		return -1
	end
	if v2 < v1 then
		return 1
	end
	for i = v1, math.min(p1.expt, p2.expt) + 1, -1 do
		local v3 = p1[i] or 0
		local v4 = p2[i] or 0
		if v3 < v4 then
			return -1
		end
		if v4 < v3 then
			return 1
		end
	end
	return 0
end
function t.plus_compare(p1, p2, p3) --[[ plus_compare | Line: 266 ]]
	local v1 = #p1 + p1.expt
	local v2 = #p2 + p2.expt
	local v3 = #p3 + p3.expt
	if v1 < v2 then
		v1, p1, v2, p2 = v2, p2, v1, p1
	end
	if v1 + 1 < v3 then
		return -1
	end
	if v3 < v1 then
		return 1
	end
	if v2 <= p1.expt and v1 < v3 then
		return -1
	end

	for i = v3, math.min(p1.expt, p2.expt, p3.expt) + 1, -1 do

			return 1
		end
		local v9 = v7 + v4 - v8

			return -1
		end
		v4 = bit32.lshift(v9, 28)
	end
	if v4 == 0 then
		return 0
	else

function t.divmod(p1, p2) --[[ divmod | Line: 305 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = #p1 + p1.expt
	local v2 = #p2 + p2.expt
	if v1 < v2 then
		return 0
	end
	t.align(p1, p2)
	local v3 = #p1
	local sum = 0
	while v2 < v1 do
		sum = sum + p1[v3]
		t.sub_times(p1, p2, p1[v3])
		v3 = #p1
		v1 = v3 + p1.expt
	end
	local v4 = p1[v3]
	local v5 = p2[#p2]
	if not p2[2] then
		local v6 = math.floor(v4 / v5)
		p1[v3] = v4 - v5 * v6
		t.clamp(p1)
		return sum + v6
	end
	local v7 = math.floor(v4 / (v5 + 1))
	local count = sum + v7
	t.sub_times(p1, p2, v7)
	if v4 < v5 * (v7 + 1) then
		return count
	end
	while t.compare(p2, p1) <= 0 do
		t.sub(p1, p2)
		count = count + 1
	end
	return count
end
function t.mult_pow10(p1, p2) --[[ mult_pow10 | Line: 351 | Upvalues: t (copy), t2 (copy) ]]

		return

		sum = sum - 13
	end

		t.mul_uint32_t(p1, t2[sum])
	end

end
function t.assign_decimal(p1, p2, p3) --[[ assign_decimal | Line: 370 | Upvalues: t (copy), uint64_t (copy) ]]

local t = {
	add = function(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ add | Line: 6 ]]
		local sum = p1 + p3
		if sum > 4294967295 then
			p2 = p2 + 1
			sum = sum - 4294967296
		end
		if p4 then
			p2 = p2 + p4
			if p2 > 4294967295 then
				return sum, p2 - 4294967296
			end
		elseif p2 == 4294967296 then
			p2 = 0
		end
		return sum, p2
	end,
	sub = function(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ sub | Line: 23 ]]
		local sum = p1 - p3
		if sum < 0 then
			p2 = p2 - 1
			sum = sum + 4294967296
		end
		if p4 then
			p2 = p2 - p4
			if p2 < 0 then

			end

			p2 = 4294967296
		end

	end,

			return bit32.rshift(p2, -32 - p3) + bit32.lshift(p1, p3), bit32.lshift(p2, p3)

function t.mul32(p1, p2) --[[ mul32 | Line: 51 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

function t.compare(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ compare | Line: 72 ]]

		if p1 == p3 then
			return 0
		end

			return -1
		else
			return 1
		end

	else

function t.to_double(p1, p2, p3) --[[ to_double | Line: 78 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

			return -9.223372036854776e18
		end
		return -(v1 + v2 * 4294967296)

	end

local function Find(p1, p2) --[[ Find | Line: 669 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return v2, v1
		end
	end
	return nil, nil
end
local function Every(p1, p2) --[[ Every | Line: 698 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if not p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return false
		end
	end
	return true
end
local function Some(p1, p2) --[[ Some | Line: 727 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end
local function Truncate(p1, p2) --[[ Truncate | Line: 753 ]]
	local v1 = #p1
	local v2 = math.clamp(p2, 1, v1)
	if v2 == v1 then
		return table.clone(p1)
	else
		return table.move(p1, 1, v2, 1, table.create(v2))
	end
end
local function Zip(...) --[[ Zip | Line: 786 ]]
	assert(select("#", ...) > 0, "Must supply at least 1 table")
	local function ZipIteratorArray(p1, p2) --[[ ZipIteratorArray | Line: 788 ]]
		local v1 = p2 + 1
		local t = {}
		for v2, v3 in p1 do
			local v4 = v3[v1]
			if v4 == nil then
				return nil, nil
			end
			t[v2] = v4
		end
		return v1, t
	end
	local function ZipIteratorMap(p1, p2) --[[ ZipIteratorMap | Line: 801 ]]
		local t = {}
		for v1, v2 in p1 do
			local v3 = next(v2, p2)
			if v3 == nil then
				return nil, nil
			end
			t[v1] = v3
		end
		return p2, t
	end
	local t = { ... }
	if #t[1] > 0 then
		return ZipIteratorArray, t, 0
	else
		return ZipIteratorMap, t, nil
	end
end
local function Lock(p1) --[[ Lock | Line: 839 ]]
	local function v1(p1) --[[ Freeze | Line: 840 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
		for k, v in pairs(p1) do
			if type(v) == "table" then
				p1[k] = v1(v)
			end
		end
		return table.freeze(p1)
	end
	return v1(p1)
end
local function IsEmpty(p1) --[[ IsEmpty | Line: 869 ]]
	return next(p1) == nil
end
local function EncodeJSON(p1) --[[ EncodeJSON | Line: 881 | Upvalues: HttpService (copy) ]]
	return HttpService:JSONEncode(p1)
end
local function DecodeJSON(p1) --[[ DecodeJSON | Line: 893 | Upvalues: HttpService (copy) ]]
	return HttpService:JSONDecode(p1)
end
local function Length(p1) --[[ Length | Line: 897 ]]
	local count = 0
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		count = count + 1
	end
	return count
end
function UnpackVector3(p1) --[[ UnpackVector3 | Line: 907 ]]
	return p1.X, p1.Y, p1.Z
end
function UnpackColor3(p1) --[[ UnpackColor3 | Line: 911 ]]
	return p1.R * 255, p1.G * 255, p1.B * 255
end
t.UnpackVector3 = UnpackVector3
t.UnpackColor3 = UnpackColor3
t.Length = Length
t.Copy = Copy

t.DecodeJSON = DecodeJSON
return t

function t.Update(p1, p2) --[[ Update | Line: 137 | Upvalues: v3 (copy), CameraShakeState (copy), v2 (copy), Angles (copy), rad (copy) ]]
	local sum = v3
	local sum_2 = v3
	local _camShakeInstances = p1._camShakeInstances
	for i = 1, #_camShakeInstances do
		local v1 = _camShakeInstances[i]
		local v22 = v1:GetState()
		if v22 == CameraShakeState.Inactive and v1.DeleteOnInactive then
			p1._removeInstances[#p1._removeInstances + 1] = i
			continue
		end

			local v32 = v1:UpdateShake(p2)
			sum = sum + v32 * v1.PositionInfluence
			sum_2 = sum_2 + v32 * v1.RotationInfluence
		end
	end

		table.remove(_camShakeInstances, p1._removeInstances[j])
		p1._removeInstances[j] = nil
	end

end

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Packages.CameraShaker.CameraShakeInstance

-- https://lua.expert/
local t = {}
t.__index = t
local v1 = Vector3.new
local noise = math.noise
t.CameraShakeState = {
	FadingIn = 0,
	FadingOut = 1,
	Sustained = 2,
	Inactive = 3
}
function t.new(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ new | Line: 28 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), t (copy) ]]
	if p3 == nil then
		p3 = 0
	end
	if p4 == nil then
		p4 = 0
	end
	assert(if type(p1) == "number" then true else false, "Magnitude must be a number")
	assert(if type(p2) == "number" then true else false, "Roughness must be a number")
	assert(if type(p3) == "number" then true else false, "FadeInTime must be a number")
	assert(if type(p4) == "number" then true else false, "FadeOutTime must be a number")
	local t2 = {
		DeleteOnInactive = true,
		roughMod = 1,
		magnMod = 1,
		_camShakeInstance = true,
		Magnitude = p1,
		Roughness = p2,
		PositionInfluence = v1(),
		RotationInfluence = v1(),
		fadeOutDuration = p4,
		fadeInDuration = p3
	}
	t2.sustain = p3 > 0
	t2.currentFadeTime = if p3 > 0 then 0 else 1
	t2.tick = Random.new():NextNumber(-100, 100)
	return setmetatable(t2, t)
end
function t.UpdateShake(p1, p2) --[[ UpdateShake | Line: 59 | Upvalues: noise (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
	local v12 = p1.tick
	local currentFadeTime = p1.currentFadeTime
	local v2 = v1(noise(v12, 0) * 0.5, noise(0, v12) * 0.5, noise(v12, v12) * 0.5)
	if p1.fadeInDuration > 0 and p1.sustain then
		if currentFadeTime < 1 then
			currentFadeTime = currentFadeTime + p2 / p1.fadeInDuration
		elseif p1.fadeOutDuration > 0 then
			p1.sustain = false
		end
	end
	if not p1.sustain then
		currentFadeTime = currentFadeTime - p2 / p1.fadeOutDuration
	end
	if p1.sustain then
		p1.tick = v12 + p2 * p1.Roughness * p1.roughMod
	else
		p1.tick = v12 + p2 * p1.Roughness * p1.roughMod * currentFadeTime
	end
	p1.currentFadeTime = currentFadeTime
	return v2 * p1.Magnitude * p1.magnMod * currentFadeTime
end
function t.StartFadeOut(p1, p2) --[[ StartFadeOut | Line: 95 ]]
	if p2 == 0 then
		p1.currentFadeTime = 0
	end
	p1.fadeOutDuration = p2
	p1.fadeInDuration = 0
	p1.sustain = false
end
function t.StartFadeIn(p1, p2) --[[ StartFadeIn | Line: 105 ]]
	if p2 == 0 then
		p1.currentFadeTime = 1
	end
	p1.fadeInDuration = if p2 then p2 else p1.fadeInDuration
	p1.fadeOutDuration = 0
	p1.sustain = true
end
function t.GetScaleRoughness(p1) --[[ GetScaleRoughness | Line: 115 ]]
	return p1.roughMod
end
function t.SetScaleRoughness(p1, p2) --[[ SetScaleRoughness | Line: 120 ]]
	p1.roughMod = p2
end
function t.GetScaleMagnitude(p1) --[[ GetScaleMagnitude | Line: 125 ]]
	return p1.magnMod
end
function t.SetScaleMagnitude(p1, p2) --[[ SetScaleMagnitude | Line: 130 ]]
	p1.magnMod = p2
end
function t.GetNormalizedFadeTime(p1) --[[ GetNormalizedFadeTime | Line: 135 ]]
	return p1.currentFadeTime
end
function t.IsShaking(p1) --[[ IsShaking | Line: 140 ]]
	return if p1.currentFadeTime > 0 then true else p1.sustain
end
function t.IsFadingOut(p1) --[[ IsFadingOut | Line: 145 ]]
	return not p1.sustain and p1.currentFadeTime > 0
end
function t.IsFadingIn(p1) --[[ IsFadingIn | Line: 150 ]]
	return if p1.currentFadeTime < 1 then p1.sustain and p1.fadeInDuration > 0 else false
end
function t.GetState(p1) --[[ GetState | Line: 155 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if p1:IsFadingIn() then
		return t.CameraShakeState.FadingIn
	end
	if p1:IsFadingOut() then
		return t.CameraShakeState.FadingOut
	end
	if p1:IsShaking() then
		return t.CameraShakeState.Sustained
	else
		return t.CameraShakeState.Inactive
	end
end
return t

local function runEventHandlerInFreeThread(...) --[[ runEventHandlerInFreeThread | Line: 46 | Upvalues: acquireRunnerThreadAndCallEventHandler (copy) ]]
	acquireRunnerThreadAndCallEventHandler(...)
	while true do
		acquireRunnerThreadAndCallEventHandler(coroutine.yield())
	end

local t = {}
t.__index = t
function t.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 57 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	return setmetatable({
		_connected = true,
		_next = false,
		_signal = p1,
		_fn = p2
	}, t)
end
function t.Disconnect(p1) --[[ Disconnect | Line: 66 ]]
	assert(p1._connected, "Can\'t disconnect a connection twice.", 2)
	p1._connected = false
	if p1._signal._handlerListHead == p1 then
		p1._signal._handlerListHead = p1._next
		return
	end
	local _handlerListHead = p1._signal._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead and _handlerListHead._next ~= p1 do
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
	if not _handlerListHead then
		return
	end
	_handlerListHead._next = p1._next
end

	__index = function(p1, p2) --[[ __index | Line: 89 ]]
		error(("Attempt to get Connection::%s (not a valid member)"):format((tostring(p2))), 2)

function t3.Connect(p1, p2) --[[ Connect | Line: 108 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = t.new(p1, p2)
	if p1._signalType == 1 and p1._handlerListHead then
		v1._next = p1._handlerListHead
		p1._handlerListHead = v1
		return v1
	end
	p1._handlerListHead = v1
	return v1
end
function t3.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 123 ]]
	p1._handlerListHead = false
end
function t3.Fire(p1, ...) --[[ Fire | Line: 131 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), runEventHandlerInFreeThread (copy) ]]
	local _handlerListHead = p1._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead do
		if _handlerListHead._connected then
			if not v1 then
				v1 = coroutine.create(runEventHandlerInFreeThread)
			end
			task.spawn(v1, _handlerListHead._fn, ...)
		end
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
end
function t3.Wait(p1) --[[ Wait | Line: 146 ]]
	local v1 = coroutine.running()
	local v2 = nil
	v2 = p1:Connect(function(...) --[[ Line: 149 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), v1 (copy) ]]
		v2:Disconnect()
		task.spawn(v1, ...)
	end)
	return coroutine.yield()
end

function t._CreateAdornment(p1) --[[ _CreateAdornment | Line: 25 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]

	_RaycastHitboxDebugLine.Thickness = 4

	_RaycastHitboxDebugLine.CFrame = v2
	_RaycastHitboxDebugLine.Adornee = workspace.Terrain
	_RaycastHitboxDebugLine.Parent = workspace.Terrain
	return {
		LastUse = 0,
		Adornment = _RaycastHitboxDebugLine
	}
end
function t.GetAdornment(p1) --[[ GetAdornment | Line: 44 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if #t._AdornmentInReserve <= 0 then
		local v1 = t:_CreateAdornment()
		table.insert(t._AdornmentInReserve, v1)
	end
	local v2 = table.remove(t._AdornmentInReserve, 1)
	if v2 then
		v2.Adornment.Visible = true
		v2.LastUse = os.clock()
		table.insert(t._AdornmentInUse, v2)
	end
	return v2
end
function t.ReturnAdornment(p1, p2) --[[ ReturnAdornment | Line: 64 | Upvalues: v2 (copy), t (copy) ]]
	p2.Adornment.Length = 0
	p2.Adornment.Visible = false
	p2.Adornment.CFrame = v2

end
function t.Clear(p1) --[[ Clear | Line: 74 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

		if t._AdornmentInReserve[i].Adornment then
			t._AdornmentInReserve[i].Adornment:Destroy()
		end
		table.remove(t._AdornmentInReserve, i)
	end

	for i = #p1.HitboxRaycastPoints, 1, -1 do
		if p1.HitboxRaycastPoints[i].CastMode == t2.CastModes.Attachment then
			table.remove(p1.HitboxRaycastPoints, i)
		end

			table.insert(v2.Instances, v)
			table.insert(p1.HitboxRaycastPoints, v2)
			count = count + 1
		end
	end
	if not p1.DebugLog then
		return
	end
	print(string.format("%s%s", "[ Raycast Hitbox V4 ]\n", count > 0 and string.format("%s attachments found in object: %s.", count, p1.HitboxObject.Name) or string.format("No attachments found in object: %s. Can be safely ignored if using SetPoints.", p1.HitboxObject.Name)))

			local v1 = p1.HitboxRaycastPoints[i].Instances[2]

					break

			end
		end
	end

function t.Solve(p1, p2) --[[ Solve | Line: 11 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
	local TransformedWorldCFrame = p2.Instances[1].TransformedWorldCFrame
	local v3 = TransformedWorldCFrame.Position + TransformedWorldCFrame:VectorToWorldSpace(p2.Instances[2])
	if not p2.LastPosition then
		p2.LastPosition = v3
	end
	local LastPosition = p2.LastPosition
	local v4 = p2.LastPosition or v1
	p2.WorldSpace = v3
	return LastPosition, v3 - v4
end
function t.UpdateToNextPosition(p1, p2) --[[ UpdateToNextPosition | Line: 31 ]]
	return p2.WorldSpace
end
function t.Visualize(p1, p2) --[[ Visualize | Line: 35 ]]
	return CFrame.lookAt(p2.WorldSpace, p2.LastPosition)
end
return t

function t.canSleep(p1) --[[ canSleep | Line: 118 ]]
	local sum = 0
	for v1, v2 in p1.v do
		sum = sum + v2 ^ 2
	end
	if sum > 0.0001 then
		return false
	end
	local g = p1.g
	local sum_2 = 0
	for v3, v4 in p1.p do
		sum_2 = sum_2 + (g[v3] - v4) ^ 2
	end
	return not (sum_2 > 6.781684027777778e-8)

function t.step(p1, p2) --[[ step | Line: 130 | Upvalues: exp (copy), sqrt (copy), cos (copy), sin (copy) ]]
	local d = p1.d
	local v1 = p1.f * 2 * math.pi
	local g = p1.g
	local p = p1.p
	local v = p1.v
	if d == 1 then
		local v2 = exp(-v1 * p2)
		local v3 = p2 * v2
		local v4 = v2 - v3 * v1
		local v5 = v3 * v1 * v1
		local v6 = v2 + v3 * v1
		for i = 1, #p do
			local v7 = p[i] - g[i]
			p[i] = v7 * v6 + v[i] * v3 + g[i]
			v[i] = v[i] * v4 - v7 * v5
		end
	elseif d < 1 then
		local v8 = exp(-d * v1 * p2)
		local v9 = sqrt(1 - d * d)
		local v10 = cos(p2 * v1 * v9)
		local v11 = sin(p2 * v1 * v9)
		local v12
		if v9 > 0.00001 then
			v12 = v11 / v9
		else
			local v13 = p2 * v1
			v12 = v13 + (v13 * v13 * (v9 * v9) * (v9 * v9) / 20 - v9 * v9) * (v13 * v13 * v13) / 6
		end
		local v14
		if v1 * v9 > 0.00001 then
			v14 = v11 / (v1 * v9)
		else
			local v15 = v1 * v9
			v14 = p2 + (p2 * p2 * (v15 * v15) * (v15 * v15) / 20 - v15 * v15) * (p2 * p2 * p2) / 6
		end
		for j = 1, #p do
			local v16 = p[j] - g[j]
			p[j] = (v16 * (v10 + v12 * d) + v[j] * v14) * v8 + g[j]
			v[j] = (v[j] * (v10 - v12 * d) - v16 * (v12 * v1)) * v8
		end
	else
		local v17 = sqrt(d * d - 1)
		local v18 = -v1 * (d - v17)
		local v19 = -v1 * (d + v17)
		local v20 = exp(v18 * p2)
		local v21 = exp(v19 * p2)
		for k = 1, #p do
			local v22 = p[k] - g[k]
			local v23 = (v[k] - v22 * v18) / (2 * v1 * v17)
			local v24 = v20 * (v22 - v23)
			p[k] = v24 + v23 * v21 + g[k]
			v[k] = v24 * v18 + v23 * v21 * v19
		end
	end
	return p1.typedat.fromIntermediate(p1.p)
end

function t2.canSleep(p1) --[[ canSleep | Line: 289 ]]

	local v2 = math.abs(v1) < 0.00017453292519943296
	return v2 and (if p1.v.Magnitude < 0.0017453292519943296 then true else false)

function t2.step(p1, p2) --[[ step | Line: 295 | Upvalues: exp (copy), sqrt (copy), cos (copy), sin (copy) ]]
	local d = p1.d
	local v1 = p1.f * 2 * math.pi
	local g = p1.g
	local v = p1.v
	local v2, v3 = (p1.p * g:Inverse()):ToAxisAngle()
	local v4 = v2 * v3
	local v5 = exp(-d * v1 * p2)
	local v6, v7
	if d == 1 then
		local v8 = (v4 * (1 + v1 * p2) + v * p2) * v5
		local Magnitude = v8.Magnitude
		v6 = (if Magnitude > 1e-6 then CFrame.fromAxisAngle(v8.Unit, Magnitude) else CFrame.identity) * g
		v7 = (v * (1 - p2 * v1) - v4 * (p2 * v1 * v1)) * v5
	elseif d < 1 then
		local v11 = sqrt(1 - d * d)
		local v12 = cos(p2 * v1 * v11)
		local v13 = sin(p2 * v1 * v11)
		local v14 = v13 / v11
		local v15 = (v4 * (v12 + v14 * d) + v * (v13 / (v1 * v11))) * v5
		local Magnitude = v15.Magnitude
		v6 = (if Magnitude > 1e-6 then CFrame.fromAxisAngle(v15.Unit, Magnitude) else CFrame.identity) * g
		v7 = (v * (v12 - v14 * d) - v4 * (v14 * v1)) * v5
	else
		local v18 = sqrt(d * d - 1)
		local v19 = -v1 * (d - v18)
		local v20 = -v1 * (d + v18)
		local v21 = (v - v4 * v19) / (2 * v1 * v18)
		local v22 = (v4 - v21) * exp(v19 * p2)
		local v23 = v21 * exp(v20 * p2)
		local v24 = v22 + v23
		local Magnitude = v24.Magnitude
		v6 = (if Magnitude > 1e-6 then CFrame.fromAxisAngle(v24.Unit, Magnitude) else CFrame.identity) * g
		v7 = v22 * v19 + v23 * v20
	end
	p1.p = v6
	p1.v = v7
	return v6
end

function t.Disconnect(p1) --[[ Disconnect | Line: 65 ]]
	assert(p1._connected, "Can\'t disconnect a connection twice.", 2)
	p1._connected = false
	local _signal = p1._signal
	if _signal._handlerListHead == p1 then
		_signal._handlerListHead = p1._next
	else
		local _handlerListHead = _signal._handlerListHead
		while _handlerListHead and _handlerListHead._next ~= p1 do
			_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
		end
		if _handlerListHead then
			_handlerListHead._next = p1._next
		end
	end
	if not _signal.connectionsChanged then
		return
	end
	_signal.totalConnections = _signal.totalConnections - 1
	_signal.connectionsChanged:Fire(-1)
end

	end

		return v1
	end

	p1.connectionsChanged:Fire(1)

end

		return

	p1.connectionsChanged:Destroy()

	p1.totalConnections = 0
end

function t3.Fire(p1, ...) --[[ Fire | Line: 152 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), runEventHandlerInFreeThread (copy) ]]
	local _handlerListHead = p1._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead do
		if _handlerListHead._connected then
			if not v1 then
				v1 = coroutine.create(runEventHandlerInFreeThread)
			end
			task.spawn(v1, _handlerListHead._fn, ...)
		end
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
end

		v2:Disconnect()

	end)

end

function t._positionVelocity(p1, p2) --[[ _positionVelocity | Line: 250 ]]
	local _position0 = p1._position0
	local _velocity0 = p1._velocity0
	local _target = p1._target
	local _damper = p1._damper
	local _speed = p1._speed
	local v1 = _speed * (p2 - p1._time0)
	local v2 = _damper * _damper
	local v3, v4, v5
	if v2 < 1 then
		local v6 = math.sqrt(1 - v2)
		local v7 = math.exp(-_damper * v1) / v6
		v3 = v7 * math.cos(v6 * v1)
		v4 = v7 * math.sin(v6 * v1)
		v5 = v6
	elseif v2 == 1 then
		v5 = 1
		local v8 = math.exp(-_damper * v1) / v5
		v3 = v8
		v4 = v8 * v1
	else
		local v9 = math.sqrt(v2 - 1)
		local v10 = math.exp((-_damper + v9) * v1) / (2 * v9)
		local v11 = math.exp((-_damper - v9) * v1) / (2 * v9)
		v5 = v9
		v3 = v10 + v11
		v4 = v10 - v11
	end
	return (v5 * v3 + _damper * v4) * _position0 + (1 - (v5 * v3 + _damper * v4)) * _target + v4 / _speed * _velocity0, -_speed * v4 * _position0 + _speed * v4 * _target + (v5 * v3 - _damper * v4) * _velocity0
end
return t

function t2.__tostring(p1) --[[ __tostring | Line: 113 ]]

		local t2 = {}
		t2[1] = v.trace or v.error

	end

function t3.is(p1) --[[ is | Line: 971 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]
	if type(p1) ~= "table" then
		return false
	end
	local v1 = getmetatable(p1)
	if v1 == t3 then
		return true
	end
	if v1 == nil then
		local andThen = p1.andThen
		if type(andThen) == "function" then
			return true
		end
		if type(andThen) ~= "table" then
			return false
		end
		local v2 = getmetatable(andThen)
		if not v2 then
			return false
		end
		if type((rawget(v2, "__call"))) == "function" then
			return true
		else
			return false
		end
	else
		if type(v1) ~= "table" then
			return false
		end
		if type((rawget(v1, "__index"))) ~= "table" then
			return false
		end
		local v6 = rawget(rawget(v1, "__index"), "andThen")
		local v7
		if type(v6) == "function" then
			v7 = true
		elseif type(v6) == "table" then
			local v8 = getmetatable(v6)
			v7 = if v8 then type((rawget(v8, "__call"))) == "function" else false
		else
			v7 = false
		end
		if v7 then
			return true
		else
			return false
		end
	end
end

	end

			v2 = t3._timeEvent:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 1071 | Upvalues: t3 (ref), v1 (ref), v2 (ref) ]]

					v1 = v22.next

					else

					end

				end
			end)

			end

	end)
end

		it("should wait for all promises to be resolved and return their values", function() --[[ Line: 875 | Upvalues: pack (ref), v1 (ref) ]]

		it("should always return a promise even if the list or reducer don\'t use them", function() --[[ Line: 1061 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), advanceTime (ref) ]]

				else
					return p1 + p2
				end
			end, 0)
			expect(v1.is(v12)).to.equal(true)
			expect(v12:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Started)
			advanceTime(2)
			expect(v12:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Resolved)
			expect(v12:expect()).to.equal(6)
		end)
		it("should return the first rejected promise", function() --[[ Line: 1076 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]

				else
					return p1 + p2
				end
			end, 0)
			expect(v1.is(v12)).to.equal(true)
			local v2, v3 = v12:awaitStatus()

		it("should return the first canceled promise", function() --[[ Line: 1091 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]

				end

					v12 = v1.delay(1):andThenReturn(p1 + p2)

				else
					error("this should not run if the promise is cancelled")
				end

	describe("Promise.some", function() --[[ Line: 1314 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
		it("should resolve once the goal is reached", function() --[[ Line: 1315 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
			local v12 = v1.some({ v1.resolve(1), v1.reject(), v1.resolve(2) }, 2)
			expect(v12:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Resolved)
			expect(v12._values[1][1]).to.equal(1)
			expect(v12._values[1][2]).to.equal(2)
		end)
		it("should error if the goal can\'t be reached", function() --[[ Line: 1326 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
			expect(v1.some({ v1.resolve(), v1.reject() }, 2):getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Rejected)
			local v12 = nil
			local v2 = v1.some({ v1.resolve(), v1.new(function(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 1335 | Upvalues: v12 (ref) ]]
					v12 = p2
				end) }, 2)
			expect(v2:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Started)
			v12("foo")
			expect(v2:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Rejected)
			expect(v2._values[1]).to.equal("foo")
		end)
		it("should cancel pending Promises once the goal is reached", function() --[[ Line: 1346 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
			local v12 = nil
			local v2 = v1.new(function() --[[ Line: 1348 ]] end)
			local v3 = v1.new(function(p1) --[[ Line: 1349 | Upvalues: v12 (ref) ]]
				v12 = p1
			end)
			local v4 = v1.some({ v2, v3, v1.resolve() }, 2)
			expect(v4:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Started)
			expect(v2:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Started)
			expect(v3:getStatus()).to.equal(v1.Status.Started)
			v12()

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Packages._Index.sleitnick_comm@1.0.1.comm.Util

-- https://lua.expert/
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Option = require(script.Parent.Parent.Option)
local t = {
	IsServer = RunService:IsServer(),
	WaitForChildTimeout = 60,
	DefaultCommFolderName = "__comm__",
	None = newproxy()
}
function t.GetCommSubFolder(p1, p2) --[[ GetCommSubFolder | Line: 12 | Upvalues: t (copy), Option (copy) ]]
	local v1
	if t.IsServer then
		local v2 = p1:FindFirstChild(p2)
		if v2 then
			v1 = v2
		else
			local v3 = Instance.new("Folder")
			v3.Name = p2
			v3.Parent = p1
			v1 = v3
		end
	else
		v1 = p1:WaitForChild(p2, t.WaitForChildTimeout)
	end
	return Option.Wrap(v1)
end
return t

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Packages._Index.sleitnick_comm@1.0.1.comm.Server.ServerComm

		Value = p2,
		EnumType = p3
	}

t.__index = t
function t.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 57 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), v2 (copy), t (copy) ]]

	assert(if type(p2) == "table" then true else false, "Enums table required")
	local t2 = {
		[v1] = {},
		[v2] = p1
	}
	for i, v in ipairs(p2) do
		assert(if type(v) == "string" then true else false, "Enum name must be a string")
		local t3 = {
			Name = v,
			Value = i,
			EnumType = t2
		}
		table.freeze(t3)
		t2[v] = t3
		table.insert(t2[v1], t3)
	end
	return table.freeze((setmetatable(t2, t)))
end

-- https://lua.expert/
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Touch = Enum.UserInputType.Touch
local Keyboard = Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard
local v1 = nil
local t = {}
v1 = {
	Current = "MouseKeyboard",
	Observe = function(p1) --[[ Observe | Line: 83 | Upvalues: t (copy), v1 (ref) ]]
		if not table.find(t, p1) then
			local v12
			v12 = t
			table.insert(t, p1)
			task.spawn(p1, v1.Current)
			return function() --[[ Line: 91 | Upvalues: t (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
				local v1 = table.find(t, p1)
				if not v1 then
					return
				end
				local v2 = #t
				t[v1] = t[v2]
				t[v2] = nil
			end
		end
		error("function already subscribed", 2)
	end
}
local function SetPreferred(p1) --[[ SetPreferred | Line: 101 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), t (copy) ]]
	if p1 == v1.Current then
		return
	end
	v1.Current = p1
	for v12, v2 in t do
		task.spawn(v2, p1)
	end
end
local function DeterminePreferred(p1) --[[ DeterminePreferred | Line: 112 | Upvalues: Touch (copy), SetPreferred (copy), Keyboard (copy) ]]
	if p1 == Touch then
		SetPreferred("Touch")
		return
	end
	if p1 == Keyboard then
		SetPreferred("MouseKeyboard")
		return
	end
	if string.sub(p1.Name, 1, 5) == "Mouse" then
		SetPreferred("MouseKeyboard")
		return
	end
	if string.sub(p1.Name, 1, 7) ~= "Gamepad" then
		return
	end
	SetPreferred("Gamepad")
end
local v2 = UserInputService:GetLastInputType()
if v2 == Touch then
	SetPreferred("Touch")
elseif v2 == Keyboard or string.sub(v2.Name, 1, 5) == "Mouse" then
	SetPreferred("MouseKeyboard")
elseif string.sub(v2.Name, 1, 7) == "Gamepad" then
	SetPreferred("Gamepad")
end
UserInputService.LastInputTypeChanged:Connect(DeterminePreferred)
return v1



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.Packages._Index.sleitnick_input@2.3.0.input.Gamepad

-- https://lua.expert/
local Trove = require(script.Parent.Parent.Trove)
local Signal = require(script.Parent.Parent.Signal)
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local HapticService = game:GetService("HapticService")
local GuiService = game:GetService("GuiService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local function ApplyDeadzone(p1, p2) --[[ ApplyDeadzone | Line: 13 ]]
	if math.abs(p1) < p2 then
		return 0
	else
		return (math.abs(p1) - p2) / (1 - p2) * math.sign(p1)
	end
end
local function GetActiveGamepad() --[[ GetActiveGamepad | Line: 20 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = nil
	local v2 = UserInputService:GetNavigationGamepads()
	if #v2 > 1 then
		for i, v in ipairs(v2) do
			if v1 == nil or v.Value < v1.Value then
				v1 = v
			end
		end
	else
		for i, v in ipairs((UserInputService:GetConnectedGamepads())) do
			if v1 == nil or v.Value < v1.Value then
				v1 = v
			end
		end
	end
	if v1 and not UserInputService:GetGamepadConnected(v1) then
		v1 = nil
	end
	return v1
end
local function HeartbeatDelay(p1, p2) --[[ HeartbeatDelay | Line: 43 | Upvalues: RunService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = time()
	local v2 = nil
	v2 = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 46 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), p1 (copy), v2 (ref), p2 (copy) ]]
		if not (p1 <= time() - v1) then
			return
		end
		v2:Disconnect()
		p2()
	end)
	return v2
end
local t = {}
t.__index = t
function t.new(p1) --[[ new | Line: 232 | Upvalues: t (copy), Trove (copy), Signal (copy) ]]
	local v2 = setmetatable({}, t)
	v2._trove = Trove.new()
	v2._gamepadTrove = v2._trove:Construct(Trove)
	v2.ButtonDown = v2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	v2.ButtonUp = v2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	v2.Connected = v2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	v2.Disconnected = v2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	v2.GamepadChanged = v2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	v2.DefaultDeadzone = 0.05
	v2.SupportsVibration = false
	v2.State = {}
	v2:_setupGamepad(p1)
	v2:_setupMotors()
	return v2
end
function t._setupActiveGamepad(p1, p2) --[[ _setupActiveGamepad | Line: 249 | Upvalues: HapticService (copy), UserInputService (copy) ]]
	local _gamepad = p1._gamepad
	if p2 == _gamepad then
		return
	end
	p1._gamepadTrove:Clean()
	table.clear(p1.State)
	p1.SupportsVibration = if p2 then HapticService:IsVibrationSupported(p2) else false
	p1._gamepad = p2
	if not p2 then
		p1.Disconnected:Fire()
		p1.GamepadChanged:Fire(nil)
		return
	end
	for i, v in ipairs(UserInputService:GetGamepadState(p2)) do
		p1.State[v.KeyCode] = v
	end
	p1._gamepadTrove:Add(p1, "StopMotors")
	p1._gamepadTrove:Connect(UserInputService.InputBegan, function(p12, p22) --[[ Line: 274 | Upvalues: p2 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= p2 then
			return
		end
		p1.ButtonDown:Fire(p12.KeyCode, p22)
	end)
	p1._gamepadTrove:Connect(UserInputService.InputEnded, function(p12, p22) --[[ Line: 280 | Upvalues: p2 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		if p12.UserInputType ~= p2 then
			return
		end
		p1.ButtonUp:Fire(p12.KeyCode, p22)
	end)
	if _gamepad == nil then
		p1.Connected:Fire()
	end
	p1.GamepadChanged:Fire(p2)
end
function t._setupGamepad(p1, p2) --[[ _setupGamepad | Line: 292 | Upvalues: UserInputService (copy), GetActiveGamepad (copy) ]]
	if p2 then
		p1._trove:Connect(UserInputService.GamepadConnected, function(p12) --[[ Line: 296 | Upvalues: p2 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
			if p12 ~= p2 then
				return
			end
			p1:_setupActiveGamepad(p2)
		end)
		p1._trove:Connect(UserInputService.GamepadDisconnected, function(p12) --[[ Line: 302 | Upvalues: p2 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
			if p12 ~= p2 then
				return
			end
			p1:_setupActiveGamepad(nil)
		end)
		if UserInputService:GetGamepadConnected(p2) then
			p1:_setupActiveGamepad(p2)
		end
	else
		local function CheckToSetupActive() --[[ CheckToSetupActive | Line: 314 | Upvalues: GetActiveGamepad (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
			local v1 = GetActiveGamepad()
			if v1 == p1._gamepad then
				return
			end
			p1:_setupActiveGamepad(v1)
		end
		p1._trove:Connect(UserInputService.GamepadConnected, CheckToSetupActive)
		p1._trove:Connect(UserInputService.GamepadDisconnected, CheckToSetupActive)
		p1:_setupActiveGamepad((GetActiveGamepad()))
	end
end
function t._setupMotors(p1) --[[ _setupMotors | Line: 327 ]]
	p1._setMotorIds = {}
	for i, v in ipairs(Enum.VibrationMotor:GetEnumItems()) do

	end

function t.GetThumbstick(p1, p2, p3) --[[ GetThumbstick | Line: 349 ]]
	local Position = p1.State[p2].Position
	local v1 = if p3 then p3 else p1.DefaultDeadzone
	local v2 = Vector2.new
	local X = Position.X
	local v3 = if math.abs(X) < v1 then 0 else (math.abs(X) - v1) / (1 - v1) * math.sign(X)
	local Y = Position.Y
	return v2(v3, if math.abs(Y) < v1 then 0 else (math.abs(Y) - v1) / (1 - v1) * math.sign(Y))
end
function t.GetTrigger(p1, p2, p3) --[[ GetTrigger | Line: 371 ]]
	local Z = p1.State[p2].Position.Z
	local v1 = if p3 then p3 else p1.DefaultDeadzone
	if math.abs(Z) < v1 then
		return 0
	else
		return (math.abs(Z) - v1) / (1 - v1) * math.sign(Z)
	end
end

	_setMotorIds[p2] = _setMotorIds[p2] + 1
	HapticService:SetMotor(p1._gamepad, p2, p3)
	return p1._setMotorIds[p2]
end
function t.PulseMotor(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ PulseMotor | Line: 454 | Upvalues: RunService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = p1:SetMotor(p2, p3)
	local function f2() --[[ Line: 456 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), p2 (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
		if p1._setMotorIds[p2] == v1 then
			p1:StopMotor(p2)
		end
	end
	local v3 = time()
	local v4 = nil
	v4 = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 46 | Upvalues: v3 (copy), p4 (copy), v4 (ref), f2 (copy) ]]
		if not (p4 <= time() - v3) then
			return
		end
		v4:Disconnect()
		f2()
	end)
	local v5 = v4
	p1._gamepadTrove:Add(v5)
end

end

		end

	else
		return t.Some(p1)
	end

	return p1.Value == nil and t.None or t.Some(p1.Value)

		ClassName = p1.ClassName,
		Value = p1._v
	}

function t.Match(p1, p2) --[[ Match | Line: 219 ]]
	local Some = p2.Some
	local None = p2.None
	assert(if type(Some) == "function" then true else false, "Missing \'Some\' match")
	assert(if type(None) == "function" then true else false, "Missing \'None\' match")
	if p1:IsSome() then
		return Some(p1:Unwrap())
	else
		return None()
	end
end

		return p1

function t.__eq(p1, p2) --[[ __eq | Line: 464 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if not t.Is(p2) then
		return false
	end
	if p1:IsSome() and p2:IsSome() then
		return p1:Unwrap() == p2:Unwrap()
	elseif p1:IsNone() and p2:IsNone() then
		return true
	else
		return false
	end
end

function t.Disconnect(p1) --[[ Disconnect | Line: 99 ]]
	if not p1.Connected then
		return
	end
	p1.Connected = false
	if p1._signal._handlerListHead == p1 then
		p1._signal._handlerListHead = p1._next
		return
	end

		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end

		return
	end
	_handlerListHead._next = p1._next
end

	local v2 = p2 or 10
	while not p1() do
		if v2 < os.clock() - v1 then
			return false
		end
		task.wait()
	end
	return true
end

function t3.DisconnectAll(p1) --[[ DisconnectAll | Line: 286 ]]
	local _handlerListHead = p1._handlerListHead
	while _handlerListHead do
		_handlerListHead.Connected = false
		_handlerListHead = _handlerListHead._next
	end
	p1._handlerListHead = false
	local v1 = rawget(p1, "_yieldedThreads")
	if not v1 then
		return
	end
	for v2 in v1 do
		if coroutine.status(v2) == "suspended" then
			warn(debug.traceback(v2, "signal disconnected; yielded thread cancelled", 2))
			task.cancel(v2)
		end
	end
	table.clear(p1._yieldedThreads)
end

function t3.Wait(p1) --[[ Wait | Line: 370 ]]

		rawset(p1, "_yieldedThreads", v1)
	end
	local v2 = coroutine.running()
	v1[v2] = true
	p1:Once(function(...) --[[ Line: 380 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), v2 (copy) ]]
		v1[v2] = nil
		task.spawn(v2, ...)
	end)
