local Trove = require(script.Parent.Parent.Trove)
local Signal = require(script.Parent.Parent.Signal)
local t = {}
t.__index = t
function t.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 96 | Upvalues: t (copy), Trove (copy), Signal (copy) ]]
	local t2 = {}
	setmetatable(t2, t)
	t2._trove = Trove.new()
	t2._shown = t2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	t2._shownTrove = Trove.new()
	t2._trove:Add(t2._shownTrove)
	t2.Instance = p1:FindFirstChild(p2)
	local function OnInstanceSet() --[[ OnInstanceSet | Line: 107 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
		local v1 = t2.Instance
		if typeof(v1) ~= "Instance" then
			return
		end
		t2._shown:Fire(v1, t2._shownTrove)
		t2._shownTrove:Connect(v1:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Parent"), function() --[[ Line: 111 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), t2 (ref) ]]
			if v1.Parent then
				return
			end
			t2._shownTrove:Clean()
		end)
		t2._shownTrove:Add(function() --[[ Line: 116 | Upvalues: t2 (ref), v1 (copy) ]]
			if t2.Instance ~= v1 then
				return
			end
			t2.Instance = nil
		end)
	end
	local function OnChildAdded(p1) --[[ OnChildAdded | Line: 124 | Upvalues: p2 (copy), t2 (copy), OnInstanceSet (copy) ]]
		if p1.Name ~= p2 or t2.Instance then
			return
		end
		t2.Instance = p1
		OnInstanceSet()
	end
	t2._trove:Connect(p1.ChildAdded, OnChildAdded)
	if not t2.Instance then
		return t2
	end
	OnInstanceSet()
	return t2
end
function t.primary(p1) --[[ primary | Line: 146 | Upvalues: t (copy), Trove (copy), Signal (copy) ]]
	local t2 = {}
	setmetatable(t2, t)
	t2._trove = Trove.new()
	t2._shown = t2._trove:Construct(Signal)
	t2._shownTrove = Trove.new()
	t2._trove:Add(t2._shownTrove)
	t2.Instance = p1.PrimaryPart
	local function OnPrimaryPartChanged() --[[ OnPrimaryPartChanged | Line: 157 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), t2 (copy) ]]
		local PrimaryPart = p1.PrimaryPart
		t2._shownTrove:Clean()
		t2.Instance = PrimaryPart
		if not PrimaryPart then
			return
		end
		t2._shown:Fire(PrimaryPart, t2._shownTrove)
	end
	t2._trove:Connect(p1:GetPropertyChangedSignal("PrimaryPart"), OnPrimaryPartChanged)
	if t2.Instance then
		local PrimaryPart = p1.PrimaryPart
		t2._shownTrove:Clean()
		t2.Instance = PrimaryPart
		if PrimaryPart then
			t2._shown:Fire(PrimaryPart, t2._shownTrove)
		end
	end
	return t2
end
function t.Observe(p1, p2) --[[ Observe | Line: 184 ]]
	if p1.Instance then
		task.spawn(p2, p1.Instance, p1._shownTrove)
	end
	return p1._shown:Connect(p2)
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 196 ]]
	p1._trove:Destroy()
end
return t

local Trove = require(script.Parent.Parent.Trove)
require(script.Parent.Streamable)
return {
	Compound = function(p1, p2) --[[ Compound | Line: 47 | Upvalues: Trove (copy) ]]
		local v1 = Trove.new()
		local v2 = Trove.new()
		local v3 = false
		local function Check() --[[ Check | Line: 51 | Upvalues: v3 (ref), p1 (copy), p2 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]
			if v3 then
				return
			end
			for k, v in pairs(p1) do
				if not v.Instance then
					return
				end
			end
			v3 = true
			p2(p1, v2)
		end
		local function Cleanup() --[[ Cleanup | Line: 63 | Upvalues: v3 (ref), v2 (copy) ]]
			if v3 then
				v3 = false
				v2:Clean()
			end
		end
		for k, v in pairs(p1) do
			v1:Add(v:Observe(function(p12, p22) --[[ Line: 71 | Upvalues: v3 (ref), p1 (copy), p2 (copy), v2 (copy), Cleanup (copy) ]]
				if not v3 then
					for k, v in pairs(p1) do
						if not v.Instance then
							p22:Add(Cleanup)
							return
						end
					end
					v3 = true
					p2(p1, v2)
				end
				p22:Add(Cleanup)
			end))
		end
		v1:Add(Cleanup)
		return v1
	end
}

local t = {}
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local v1 = Random.new()
local function Copy(p1, p2) --[[ Copy | Line: 40 ]]
	if p2 then
		local function v1(p1_2_2_2_2) --[[ DeepCopy | Line: 44 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
			local v12 = table.clone(p1_2_2_2_2)
			for v2, v3 in v12 do
				if type(v3) == "table" then
					v12[v2] = v1(v3)
				end
			end
			return v12
		end
		return v1(p1)
	else
		return table.clone(p1)
	end
end
local function v2(p1, p2) --[[ Sync | Line: 84 | Upvalues: v2 (copy) ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "table" then true else false, "Second argument must be a table")
	local v3 = table.clone(p1)
	for k, v in pairs(v3) do
		local v4
		local v5 = p2[k]
		if v5 == nil then
			v3[k] = nil
			continue
		end
		if type(v) == type(v5) then
			if type(v) == "table" then
				v3[k] = v2(v, v5)
			end
			continue
		end
		if type(v5) == "table" then
			v4 = function(p1_2_2_2_2) --[[ DeepCopy | Line: 44 | Upvalues: v4 (copy) ]]
				local v12 = table.clone(p1_2_2_2_2)
				for v2, v3 in v12 do
					if type(v3) == "table" then
						v12[v2] = v4(v3)
					end
				end
				return v12
			end
			v3[k] = v4(v5)
			continue
		end
		v3[k] = v5
	end
	for k, v in pairs(p2) do
		local v6
		if v3[k] == nil then
			if type(v) == "table" then
				v6 = function(p1_2_2_2_2) --[[ DeepCopy | Line: 44 | Upvalues: v6 (copy) ]]
					local v12 = table.clone(p1_2_2_2_2)
					for v2, v3 in v12 do
						if type(v3) == "table" then
							v12[v2] = v6(v3)
						end
					end
					return v12
				end
				v3[k] = v6(v)
				continue
			end
			v3[k] = v
		end
	end
	return v3
end
local function v3(p1, p2) --[[ Reconcile | Line: 156 | Upvalues: v3 (copy) ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "table" then true else false, "Second argument must be a table")
	local v32 = table.clone(p1)
	for v6, v7 in p2 do
		local v4, v5
		local v8 = p1[v6]
		if v8 == nil then
			if type(v7) == "table" then
				v4 = function(p1_2_2_2_2) --[[ DeepCopy | Line: 44 | Upvalues: v4 (copy) ]]
					local v12 = table.clone(p1_2_2_2_2)
					for v2, v3 in v12 do
						if type(v3) == "table" then
							v12[v2] = v4(v3)
						end
					end
					return v12
				end
				v32[v6] = v4(v7)
				continue
			end
			v32[v6] = v7
			continue
		end

			if type(v7) == "table" then
				v32[v6] = v3(v8, v7)
				continue
			end

					end

		end
	end

local function SwapRemove(p1, p2) --[[ SwapRemove | Line: 209 ]]
	local v1 = #p1
	p1[p2] = p1[v1]
	p1[v1] = nil
end
local function SwapRemoveFirstValue(p1, p2) --[[ SwapRemoveFirstValue | Line: 234 ]]
	local v1 = table.find(p1, p2)
	if v1 then
		local v2 = #p1
		p1[v1] = p1[v2]
		p1[v2] = nil
	end
	return v1
end
local function Map(p1, p2) --[[ Map | Line: 262 ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "function" then true else false, "Second argument must be a function")
	local v3 = table.create(#p1)
	for v4, v5 in p1 do
		v3[v4] = p2(v5, v4, p1)
	end
	return v3
end
local function Filter(p1, p2) --[[ Filter | Line: 292 ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "function" then true else false, "Second argument must be a function")
	local v3 = table.create(#p1)
	if #p1 > 0 then
		local count = 0
		for v4, v5 in p1 do
			if p2(v5, v4, p1) then
				count = count + 1
				v3[count] = v5
			end
		end
	else
		for v6, v7 in p1 do
			if p2(v7, v6, p1) then
				v3[v6] = v7
			end
		end
	end
	return v3
end
local function Reduce(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Reduce | Line: 335 ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "function" then true else false, "Second argument must be a function")
	if #p1 > 0 then
		local v3, v4
		if p3 == nil then
			v3 = p1[1]
			v4 = 2
		else
			v4 = 1
			v3 = p3
		end
		for i = v4, #p1 do
			v3 = p2(v3, p1[i], i, p1)
		end
		return v3
	else
		local v6, v7
		if p3 == nil then
			local v8 = next(p1)
			v6 = v8
			v7 = v8
		else
			v6 = nil
			v7 = p3
		end
		for v9, v10 in next, p1, v6 do
			v7 = p2(v7, v10, v9, p1)
		end
		return v7
	end
end
local function Assign(p1, ...) --[[ Assign | Line: 378 ]]

			v1[v4] = v5
		end
	end
	return v1
end
local function Extend(p1, p2) --[[ Extend | Line: 407 ]]
	local v1 = table.clone(p1)
	for v2, v3 in p2 do
		table.insert(v1, v3)
	end
	return v1
end
local function Reverse(p1) --[[ Reverse | Line: 432 ]]
	local v1 = #p1
	local v2 = table.create(v1)
	for i = 1, v1 do
		v2[i] = p1[v1 - i + 1]
	end
	return v2
end
local function Shuffle(p1, p2) --[[ Shuffle | Line: 459 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	local v2 = table.clone(p1)
	local v3 = if typeof(p2) == "Random" then p2 else v1
	for i = #p1, 2, -1 do
		local v4 = v3:NextInteger(1, i)
		local v6 = v2[i]
		v2[i] = v2[v4]
		v2[v4] = v6
	end
	return v2
end
local function Sample(p1, p2, p3) --[[ Sample | Line: 489 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
	assert(if type(p1) == "table" then true else false, "First argument must be a table")
	assert(if type(p2) == "number" then true else false, "Second argument must be a number")
	local v3 = #p1
	if v3 == 0 then
		return {}
	end
	local v4 = table.clone(p1)
	local v5 = table.create(p2)
	local v6 = if typeof(p3) == "Random" then p3 else v1
	local v7 = math.clamp(p2, 1, v3)
	for i = 1, v7 do
		local v9 = v6:NextInteger(i, v3)
		local v11 = v4[i]
		v4[i] = v4[v9]
		v4[v9] = v11
	end
	table.move(v4, 1, v7, 1, v5)
	return v5
end
local function Flat(p1, p2) --[[ Flat | Line: 537 ]]
	local v1 = if type(p2) == "number" then p2 else 1
	local v2 = table.create(#p1)
	local function v3(p1_2, p2_2) --[[ Scan | Line: 540 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), v3 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]

			if type(v22) == "table" and p2_2 < v1 then
				v3(v22, p2_2 + 1)
				continue
			end
			table.insert(v2, v22)
		end
	end
	v3(p1, 0)
	return v2
end
local function FlatMap(p1, p2) --[[ FlatMap | Line: 574 | Upvalues: Map (copy) ]]

local function Find(p1, p2) --[[ Find | Line: 669 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return v2, v1
		end
	end
	return nil, nil
end
local function Every(p1, p2) --[[ Every | Line: 698 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if not p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return false
		end
	end
	return true
end
local function Some(p1, p2) --[[ Some | Line: 727 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		if p2(v2, v1, p1) then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end
local function Truncate(p1, p2) --[[ Truncate | Line: 753 ]]
	local v1 = #p1
	local v2 = math.clamp(p2, 1, v1)
	if v2 == v1 then
		return table.clone(p1)
	else
		return table.move(p1, 1, v2, 1, table.create(v2))
	end
end
local function Zip(...) --[[ Zip | Line: 786 ]]
	assert(select("#", ...) > 0, "Must supply at least 1 table")
	local function ZipIteratorArray(p1, p2) --[[ ZipIteratorArray | Line: 788 ]]
		local v1 = p2 + 1
		local t = {}
		for v2, v3 in p1 do
			local v4 = v3[v1]
			if v4 == nil then
				return nil, nil
			end
			t[v2] = v4
		end
		return v1, t
	end
	local function ZipIteratorMap(p1, p2) --[[ ZipIteratorMap | Line: 801 ]]
		local t = {}
		for v1, v2 in p1 do
			local v3 = next(v2, p2)
			if v3 == nil then
				return nil, nil
			end
			t[v1] = v3
		end
		return p2, t
	end
	local t = { ... }
	if #t[1] > 0 then
		return ZipIteratorArray, t, 0
	else
		return ZipIteratorMap, t, nil
	end
end
local function Lock(p1) --[[ Lock | Line: 839 ]]
	local function v1(p1) --[[ Freeze | Line: 840 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
		for k, v in pairs(p1) do
			if type(v) == "table" then
				p1[k] = v1(v)
			end
		end
		return table.freeze(p1)
	end
	return v1(p1)
end
local function IsEmpty(p1) --[[ IsEmpty | Line: 869 ]]
	return next(p1) == nil
end

	v6.Interval = p1

			return
		end

	end)
end

function t._startTimer(p1) --[[ _startTimer | Line: 132 ]]

	local v1 = TimeFunction() + p1.Interval
	p1._runHandle = p1.UpdateSignal:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 135 | Upvalues: TimeFunction (copy), v1 (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
		local v12 = TimeFunction()
		if not (v1 <= v12) then
			return
		end

	end)

function t._startTimerNoDrift(p1) --[[ _startTimerNoDrift | Line: 144 ]]
	assert(p1.Interval > 0, "Interval must be greater than 0 when AllowDrift is set to false")
	local TimeFunction = p1.TimeFunction
	local v2 = 1
	local v3 = TimeFunction()
	local v4 = v3 + p1.Interval
	p1._runHandle = p1.UpdateSignal:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 150 | Upvalues: TimeFunction (copy), v4 (ref), v2 (ref), v3 (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
		while v4 <= TimeFunction() do
			v2 = v2 + 1
			v4 = v3 + p1.Interval * v2
			p1.Tick:Fire()
		end
	end)
end
function t.Start(p1) --[[ Start | Line: 167 ]]
	if p1._runHandle then
		return
	end
	if p1.AllowDrift then
		p1:_startTimer()
	else
		p1:_startTimerNoDrift()
	end
end
function t.StartNow(p1) --[[ StartNow | Line: 186 ]]
	if not p1._runHandle then
		p1.Tick:Fire()
		p1:Start()
	end
end
function t.Stop(p1) --[[ Stop | Line: 201 ]]
	if p1._runHandle then
		p1._runHandle:Disconnect()
		p1._runHandle = nil
	end
end
function t.IsRunning(p1) --[[ IsRunning | Line: 218 ]]
	return p1._runHandle ~= nil
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 225 ]]
	p1.Tick:Destroy()
	p1:Stop()
end
return t

		end)

				v1 = v1 + 1
			end)

			v12:Stop()

		end)

			expect(v12:IsRunning()).to.equal(false)
			v12:StartNow()

			v12:Stop()

local function GetObjectCleanupFunction(p1, p2) --[[ GetObjectCleanupFunction | Line: 10 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]
	local v12 = typeof(p1)
	if v12 == "function" then
		return v1
	end
	if v12 == "thread" then
		return v2
	end
	if p2 then
		return p2
	end
	if v12 == "Instance" then
		return "Destroy"
	end
	if v12 == "RBXScriptConnection" then
		return "Disconnect"
	end
	if v12 == "table" then
		if typeof(p1.Destroy) == "function" then
			return "Destroy"
		end
		if typeof(p1.Disconnect) == "function" then
			return "Disconnect"
		end
	end
	error("Failed to get cleanup function for object " .. v12 .. ": " .. tostring(p1), 3)
end

end

function t._findAndRemoveFromObjects(p1, p2, p3) --[[ _findAndRemoveFromObjects | Line: 291 ]]
	local _objects = p1._objects
	for i, v in ipairs(_objects) do
		if v[1] == p2 then
			local v1 = #_objects
			_objects[i] = _objects[v1]
			_objects[v1] = nil
			if not p3 then
				return true
			end
			p1:_cleanupObject(v[1], v[2])
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end
function t._cleanupObject(p1, p2, p3) --[[ _cleanupObject | Line: 307 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]

		p2()
		return
	end
	if p3 == v2 then
		coroutine.close(p2)
	else

describe("Janitor.LinkToInstance", function() --[[ Line: 497 | Upvalues: it (copy), v1 (copy), ReplicatedStorage (copy), expect (copy), Workspace (copy), AwaitCondition (copy), NoOperation (copy) ]]
	it("should link to an Instance", function() --[[ Line: 498 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), ReplicatedStorage (ref), expect (ref) ]]
		local v12 = v1.new()
		local v2 = v12:Add(Instance.new("Part"), "Destroy")
		v2.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
		expect(function() --[[ Line: 503 | Upvalues: v12 (copy), v2 (copy) ]]
			v12:LinkToInstance(v2)
		end).never.toThrow()
		v12:Destroy()
	end)
	it("should cleanup once the Instance is destroyed", function() --[[ Line: 510 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), Workspace (ref), expect (ref) ]]
		local v12 = v1.new()
		local v2 = false
		local Part = Instance.new("Part")
		Part.Parent = Workspace
		v12:Add(function() --[[ Line: 517 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			v2 = true
		end, true)
		v12:LinkToInstance(Part)
		Part:Destroy()
		task.wait(0.1)
		expect(v2).toBe(true)
		v12:Destroy()
	end)
	it("should work if the Instance is parented to nil when started", function() --[[ Line: 530 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), Workspace (ref), expect (ref), AwaitCondition (ref) ]]
		local v12 = v1.new()
		local v2 = false
		local Part = Instance.new("Part")
		v12:Add(function() --[[ Line: 535 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			v2 = true
		end, true)
		v12:LinkToInstance(Part)
		Part.Parent = Workspace
		Part:Destroy()
		expect(AwaitCondition(function() --[[ Line: 543 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			return v2
		end, 1)).toBe(true)
		v12:Destroy()
	end)
	it("should work if the Instance is parented to nil", function() --[[ Line: 549 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), expect (ref), AwaitCondition (ref) ]]
		local v12 = v1.new()
		local v2 = false
		local Part = Instance.new("Part")
		v12:Add(function() --[[ Line: 554 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			v2 = true
		end, true)
		v12:LinkToInstance(Part)
		Part:Destroy()
		expect(AwaitCondition(function() --[[ Line: 561 | Upvalues: v2 (ref) ]]
			return v2
		end, 1)).toBe(true)
		v12:Destroy()
	end)
	it("shouldn\'t run if the Instance is removed or parented to nil", function() --[[ Line: 567 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), ReplicatedStorage (ref), NoOperation (ref), expect (ref) ]]
		local v12 = v1.new()
		local Part = Instance.new("Part")
		Part.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
		v12:Add(NoOperation, true, "Function")
		v12:LinkToInstance(Part)
		Part.Parent = nil
		expect(v12:Get("Function")).toBe(NoOperation)
		Part.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
		expect(v12:Get("Function")).toBe(NoOperation)
		Part:Destroy()
		task.wait(0.1)
		expect(function() --[[ Line: 582 | Upvalues: v12 (copy) ]]
			v12:Destroy()
		end).never.toThrow()
	end)
end)
return false

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local v1 = Random.new()
local BackgroundMusic = SoundService:WaitForChild("BackgroundMusic")
local Volume = BackgroundMusic.Volume
local t = {}
return {
	SelectNewBackgroundSong = function(p1) --[[ SelectNewBackgroundSong | Line: 19 | Upvalues: BackgroundMusic (copy), v1 (copy), t (copy) ]]
		for v12, v2 in BackgroundMusic:GetChildren() do
			v2:Stop()
		end
		local v3 = BackgroundMusic:GetChildren()
		local v4 = v3[v1:NextInteger(1, #v3)]
		while table.find(t, v4) do
			v4 = v3[v1:NextInteger(1, #v3)]
			task.wait()
		end
		if not v4.IsLoaded then
			task.wait()
			return
		end
		while #t > 1 do
			table.remove(t, 1)
		end
		print("Now playing:", v4.Name)
		v4:Play()
		return v4
	end,
	OnStart = function(p1) --[[ OnStart | Line: 54 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (copy), BackgroundMusic (copy), Volume (copy), ReplicatedStorage (copy) ]]
		LocalPlayer:GetAttributeChangedSignal("MuteMusic"):Connect(function() --[[ Line: 56 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (ref), BackgroundMusic (ref), Volume (ref) ]]
			BackgroundMusic.Volume = if LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("MuteMusic") then 0 else Volume
		end)
		local v1 = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Libraries"):WaitForChild("Icon")).new()
		v1:setImage("rbxassetid://7059338404")
		v1:oneClick()
		v1.selected:Connect(function(p1) --[[ Line: 70 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (ref) ]]
			LocalPlayer:SetAttribute("MuteMusic", not LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("MuteMusic"))
		end)
		while true do
			local v2 = p1:SelectNewBackgroundSong()
			if v2 and v2.Playing then
				v2.Ended:Wait()
			end
			task.wait()
		end
	end
}

	PopulateList = function(p1) --[[ PopulateList | Line: 28 | Upvalues: List (copy), ToolModels (copy), Template (copy), LocalPlayer (copy), MarketplaceService (copy), Remotes (copy) ]]
		for v1, v2 in List:GetChildren() do
			if v2:IsA("ImageButton") then
				v2:Destroy()
			end
		end
		for v3, v4 in ToolModels:GetChildren() do
			local v5 = Template:Clone()
			v5.Name = v4.Name
			v5.Label.Text = v4.Name
			v5.MockUp.Image = v4:GetAttribute("Icon")
			local v6 = v4:GetAttribute("GamepassId")
			if v6 then
				v5.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180, 140, 0)
			end
			v5.Activated:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 53 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (ref), v4 (copy), v6 (copy), MarketplaceService (ref), Remotes (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
				local v1 = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Backpack"):FindFirstChild(v4.Name)
				if not v1 then
					v1 = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(v4.Name)
				end
				if v6 and not LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("SecurityGuardGamepass") then
					MarketplaceService:PromptGamePassPurchase(LocalPlayer, 1672316343)
					return
				end
				if v1 then
					Remotes.UnequipTool:InvokeServer(v4.Name)
				else
					Remotes.EquipTool:InvokeServer(v4.Name)
				end
				p1:UpdateList()
			end)
			v5.Parent = List
		end
	end,
	UpdateList = function(p1) --[[ UpdateList | Line: 82 | Upvalues: LocalPlayer (copy), List (copy) ]]

			if v2:IsA("Tool") then
				table.insert(t, v2.Name)
			end
		end
		local Tool = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
		if Tool then
			table.insert(t, Tool.Name)
		end
		for v5, v6 in List:GetChildren() do
			if v6:IsA("ImageButton") then
				v6.CheckMark.Visible = table.find(t, v6.Name)
			end
		end
	end,
	OnStart = function(p1) --[[ OnStart | Line: 119 | Upvalues: ToolsFrame (copy), Remotes (copy), StarterGui (copy) ]]

			Remotes.ClearTools:InvokeServer()
			p1:UpdateList()
		end)

				else
					if LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("Fighting") then
						return
					end

						task.wait()

				end
				p1:UpdateList()

	end,
	PopulateHugs = function(p1) --[[ PopulateHugs | Line: 97 | Upvalues: Animations (copy), Template (copy), MarketplaceService (copy), LocalPlayer (copy), v1 (copy), v2 (ref), Remotes (copy), List (copy) ]]

						return MarketplaceService:UserOwnsGamePassAsync(LocalPlayer.UserId, v12)
					end)

					end
				end

						return

					v2 = v22

				end

		end

	OnStart = function(p1) --[[ OnStart | Line: 201 | Upvalues: NavBar (copy), Animations (copy), StopAnimation (copy), v1 (copy), v2 (ref), Remotes (copy), UserInputService (copy), LocalPlayer (copy) ]]

					end

function t.request(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ request | Line: 50 | Upvalues: t (copy), InternalConfig (copy), HttpService (copy) ]]

			return false, {

			}

		return false, {
			message = "Circuit breaker open"
		}
	else
		if t._failures >= 5 and t._circuitOpenUntil <= v1 then
			t._failures = math.max(0, t._failures - 2)
		end
		if not string.find(p2, "://") then
			p2 = t.getNewUrl(p2)
		end

		}

			t2[k] = v
		end

			local v6, v7 = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 83 | Upvalues: HttpService (ref), p1 (copy), p2 (ref), v5 (copy), t2 (copy) ]]
				return HttpService:RequestAsync({
					Method = string.upper(p1),
					Url = p2,

			end)

						return HttpService:JSONDecode(v7.Body)

							t._failures = 0
							return true, v9
						end

						end
						t._failures = 0

						if p4 then
							t._failures = 0
							return false, {}
						end
						warn("[PopMall] JSON decode failed: " .. tostring(v9))
						t._failures = 0
						return false, {}
					end

							task.wait(math.min(2 ^ (i - 1) * 5, 30) + math.random() * 3)
						end
						continue
					end

						if i < 3 then
							local v14 = math.min(2 ^ (i - 1) * 1, 10)
							task.wait(v14 + math.random() * v14 * 0.5)
						end

					else

						end

function t.requestDeduped(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ requestDeduped | Line: 183 | Upvalues: HttpService (copy), t2 (copy), t3 (copy), t (copy) ]]

		end

	end

function t.backgroundProcessEvents() --[[ backgroundProcessEvents | Line: 227 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]

		local v1

			until #t.eventQueue ~= 0

function t.getTextColor(p1) --[[ getTextColor | Line: 178 ]]
	if type(p1) == "string" then
		p1 = Color3.fromHex(p1)
	end
	local R = p1.R
	local G = p1.G
	local B = p1.B
	if 0.2126 * (if R <= 0.04045 then R / 12.92 else ((R + 0.055) / 1.055) ^ 2.4) + 0.7152 * (if G <= 0.04045 then G / 12.92 else ((G + 0.055) / 1.055) ^ 2.4) + 0.0722 * (if B <= 0.04045 then B / 12.92 else ((B + 0.055) / 1.055) ^ 2.4) > 0.25 then

	end
end

function t.callWithRetry(p1, p2) --[[ callWithRetry | Line: 479 ]]
	local v1 = false
	local count = 1
	local v2 = nil
	while not v1 and count <= p2 do
		local v3, v4 = pcall(p1)
		if v3 then
			v1 = v3
			v2 = v4
		else
			local v5 = tostring(v4)
			if v5:find("429") or v5:find("Too Many Requests") or v5:find("rate") then
				local v7 = math.min(2 ^ (count - 1) * 5, 30) + math.random() * 3
				warn("[SuperBiz] Rate limited (attempt " .. count .. "/" .. p2 .. "), waiting " .. math.floor(v7) .. "s")
				task.wait(v7)
			else
				local v8 = math.min(count * 2, 8) + math.random() * 1
				warn("[SuperBiz] Retrying failed function call (attempt " .. count .. "/" .. p2 .. "): " .. v5)
				task.wait(v8)
			end
			v1 = v3
			v2 = v4
			count = count + 1
		end
	end
	return v2, v1
end
return t

-- https://lua.expert/
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local t = {}
t.__index = t
function t.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 6 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	return setmetatable({
		LastCallsRefresh = 0,
		QueueConnection = nil,
		Interval = p1,
		CallsLeft = p2,
		CallsPerInterval = p2,
		Queue = {}
	}, t)
end
function t.Add(p1, p2) --[[ Add | Line: 20 | Upvalues: RunService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
	table.insert(p1.Queue, {
		Function = p2,
		Called = v1
	})
	if p1.QueueConnection then
		return v1.Event
	end
	p1.QueueConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 25 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		if #p1.Queue == 0 then
			return
		end
		if p1.LastCallsRefresh + p1.Interval < tick() then
			p1.CallsLeft = p1.CallsPerInterval
			p1.LastCallsRefresh = tick()
		end
		local t = {}
		if p1.CallsLeft <= 0 then
			return
		end
		for v1, v2 in p1.Queue do
			task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 38 | Upvalues: v2 (copy) ]]
				v2.Function()
				v2.Called:Fire()
				v2.Called:Destroy()
				v2.Called = nil
			end)
			table.insert(t, v1)
			local v3 = p1
			v3.CallsLeft = v3.CallsLeft - 1
			if p1.CallsLeft <= 0 then
				break
			end
		end
		for v4, v5 in t do
			table.remove(p1.Queue, v5)
		end
	end)
	return v1.Event
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 59 ]]
	if not p1.QueueConnection then
		return
	end
	p1.QueueConnection:Disconnect()
	p1.QueueConnection = nil
end
return t

-- https://lua.expert/
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local packType = require(v1.Animation.packType)
local springCoefficients = require(v1.Animation.springCoefficients)
local updateAll = require(v1.Dependencies.updateAll)
local t = {}
local t2 = {}
local v2 = os.clock()
function t.add(p1) --[[ add | Line: 24 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), t2 (copy) ]]
	p1._lastSchedule = v2
	p1._startDisplacements = {}
	p1._startVelocities = {}
	for i, v in ipairs(p1._springGoals) do
		p1._startDisplacements[i] = p1._springPositions[i] - v
		p1._startVelocities[i] = p1._springVelocities[i]
	end
	t2[p1] = true
end
function t.remove(p1) --[[ remove | Line: 39 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = nil
end
local function updateAllSprings() --[[ updateAllSprings | Line: 44 | Upvalues: v2 (ref), t2 (copy), springCoefficients (copy), packType (copy), updateAll (copy) ]]
	local tbl = {}
	v2 = os.clock()
	for k in pairs(t2) do
		local v1, v22, v3, v4 = springCoefficients(v2 - k._lastSchedule, k._currentDamping, k._currentSpeed)
		local _springPositions = k._springPositions
		local _springVelocities = k._springVelocities
		local _startDisplacements = k._startDisplacements
		local _startVelocities = k._startVelocities
		local v5 = false
		for i, v in ipairs(k._springGoals) do
			local v6 = _startDisplacements[i]
			local v7 = _startVelocities[i]
			local v8 = v6 * v1 + v7 * v22
			local v9 = v6 * v3 + v7 * v4
			if math.abs(v8) > 0.0001 or math.abs(v9) > 0.0001 then
				v5 = true
			end
			_springPositions[i] = v8 + v
			_springVelocities[i] = v9
		end
		if not v5 then
			tbl[k] = true
		end
	end
	for k in pairs(t2) do
		k._currentValue = packType(k._springPositions, k._currentType)
		updateAll(k)
	end
	for k in pairs(tbl) do
		t2[k] = nil
	end
end
RunService:BindToRenderStep("__FusionSpringScheduler", Enum.RenderPriority.First.Value, updateAllSprings)
return t

		return false

	local _tweenInfo = p1._tweenInfo
	if p1._tweenInfoIsState then
		_tweenInfo = _tweenInfo:get()

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.BloxbizSDK.Utils.Fusion.Animation.TweenScheduler

-- https://lua.expert/
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local lerpType = require(v1.Animation.lerpType)
local getTweenRatio = require(v1.Animation.getTweenRatio)
local updateAll = require(v1.Dependencies.updateAll)
local t = {}
local t2 = {}
setmetatable(t2, {
	__mode = "k"
})
function t.add(p1) --[[ add | Line: 29 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = true
end
function t.remove(p1) --[[ remove | Line: 36 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	t2[p1] = nil
end
local function updateAllTweens() --[[ updateAllTweens | Line: 43 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), updateAll (copy), t (copy), getTweenRatio (copy), lerpType (copy) ]]
	local v1 = os.clock()
	for k in pairs(t2) do
		local v2 = v1 - k._currentTweenStartTime
		if k._currentTweenDuration < v2 then
			if k._currentTweenInfo.Reverses then
				k._currentValue = k._prevValue
			else
				k._currentValue = k._nextValue
			end
			k._currentlyAnimating = false
			updateAll(k)
			t.remove(k)
			continue
		end
		k._currentValue = lerpType(k._prevValue, k._nextValue, (getTweenRatio(k._currentTweenInfo, v2)))
		k._currentlyAnimating = true
		updateAll(k)
	end
end
RunService:BindToRenderStep("__FusionTweenScheduler", Enum.RenderPriority.First.Value, updateAllTweens)

PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.BloxbizSDK.Utils.Fusion.Animation.getTweenRatio

-- https://lua.expert/
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
return function(p1, p2) --[[ getTweenRatio | Line: 10 | Upvalues: TweenService (copy) ]]
	local DelayTime = p1.DelayTime
	local Time = p1.Time
	local sum = DelayTime + Time
	if p1.Reverses then
		sum = sum + Time
	end
	if sum * (1 + p1.RepeatCount) <= p2 then
		return 1
	end
	local v2 = p2 % sum
	if v2 <= DelayTime then
		return 0
	end
	local sum_2 = (v2 - DelayTime) / Time
	if sum_2 > 1 then
		sum_2 = 2 - sum_2
	end
	return TweenService:GetValue(sum_2, p1.EasingStyle, p1.EasingDirection)
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.BloxbizSDK.Utils.Fusion.Animation.lerpType

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.PubTypes)
local Oklab = require(v1.Colour.Oklab)
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ lerpType | Line: 16 | Upvalues: Oklab (copy) ]]
	local v1 = typeof(p1)
	if typeof(p2) == v1 then
		if v1 == "number" then
			return (p2 - p1) * p3 + p1
		end
		if v1 == "CFrame" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Color3" then
			local v2 = Oklab.to(p1)
			return Oklab.from(v2:Lerp(Oklab.to(p2), p3), false)
		end
		if v1 == "ColorSequenceKeypoint" then
			local v4 = Oklab.to(p1.Value)
			return ColorSequenceKeypoint.new((p2.Time - p1.Time) * p3 + p1.Time, Oklab.from(v4:Lerp(Oklab.to(p2.Value), p3), false))
		end
		if v1 == "DateTime" then
			return DateTime.fromUnixTimestampMillis((p2.UnixTimestampMillis - p1.UnixTimestampMillis) * p3 + p1.UnixTimestampMillis)
		end
		if v1 == "NumberRange" then
			return NumberRange.new((p2.Min - p1.Min) * p3 + p1.Min, (p2.Max - p1.Max) * p3 + p1.Max)
		end
		if v1 == "NumberSequenceKeypoint" then
			return NumberSequenceKeypoint.new((p2.Time - p1.Time) * p3 + p1.Time, (p2.Value - p1.Value) * p3 + p1.Value, (p2.Envelope - p1.Envelope) * p3 + p1.Envelope)
		end
		if v1 == "PhysicalProperties" then
			return PhysicalProperties.new((p2.Density - p1.Density) * p3 + p1.Density, (p2.Friction - p1.Friction) * p3 + p1.Friction, (p2.Elasticity - p1.Elasticity) * p3 + p1.Elasticity, (p2.FrictionWeight - p1.FrictionWeight) * p3 + p1.FrictionWeight, (p2.ElasticityWeight - p1.ElasticityWeight) * p3 + p1.ElasticityWeight)
		end
		if v1 == "Ray" then
			return Ray.new(p1.Origin:Lerp(p2.Origin, p3), p1.Direction:Lerp(p2.Direction, p3))
		end
		if v1 == "Rect" then
			return Rect.new(p1.Min:Lerp(p2.Min, p3), p1.Max:Lerp(p2.Max, p3))
		end
		if v1 == "Region3" then
			local v6 = p1.CFrame.Position:Lerp(p2.CFrame.Position, p3)
			local v7 = p1.Size:Lerp(p2.Size, p3) / 2
			return Region3.new(v6 - v7, v6 + v7)
		end
		if v1 == "Region3int16" then
			return Region3int16.new(Vector3int16.new((p2.Min.X - p1.Min.X) * p3 + p1.Min.X, (p2.Min.Y - p1.Min.Y) * p3 + p1.Min.Y, (p2.Min.Z - p1.Min.Z) * p3 + p1.Min.Z), Vector3int16.new((p2.Max.X - p1.Max.X) * p3 + p1.Max.X, (p2.Max.Y - p1.Max.Y) * p3 + p1.Max.Y, (p2.Max.Z - p1.Max.Z) * p3 + p1.Max.Z))
		end
		if v1 == "UDim" then
			return UDim.new((p2.Scale - p1.Scale) * p3 + p1.Scale, (p2.Offset - p1.Offset) * p3 + p1.Offset)
		end
		if v1 == "UDim2" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector2" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector2int16" then
			return Vector2int16.new((p2.X - p1.X) * p3 + p1.X, (p2.Y - p1.Y) * p3 + p1.Y)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector3" then
			return p1:Lerp(p2, p3)
		end
		if v1 == "Vector3int16" then
			return Vector3int16.new((p2.X - p1.X) * p3 + p1.X, (p2.Y - p1.Y) * p3 + p1.Y, (p2.Z - p1.Z) * p3 + p1.Z)
		end
	end
	if p3 < 0.5 then
		return p1
	else
		return p2
	end
end

local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.PubTypes)
local Oklab = require(v1.Colour.Oklab)
return function(p1, p2) --[[ packType | Line: 16 | Upvalues: Oklab (copy) ]]
	if p2 == "number" then
		return p1[1]
	end
	if p2 == "CFrame" then
		local v1 = CFrame.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
		return v1 * CFrame.fromAxisAngle(Vector3.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6]).Unit, p1[7])
	end
	if p2 == "Color3" then
		return Oklab.from(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), false)
	end
	if p2 == "ColorSequenceKeypoint" then
		return ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(p1[4], Oklab.from(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), false))
	end
	if p2 == "DateTime" then
		return DateTime.fromUnixTimestampMillis(p1[1])
	end
	if p2 == "NumberRange" then
		return NumberRange.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "NumberSequenceKeypoint" then
		return NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(p1[2], p1[1], p1[3])
	end
	if p2 == "PhysicalProperties" then
		return PhysicalProperties.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4], p1[5])
	end
	if p2 == "Ray" then
		return Ray.new(Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), (Vector3.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6])))
	end
	if p2 == "Rect" then
		return Rect.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4])
	end
	if p2 == "Region3" then
		local v24 = Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
		local v28 = Vector3.new(p1[4] / 2, p1[5] / 2, p1[6] / 2)
		return Region3.new(v24 - v28, v24 + v28)
	end
	if p2 == "Region3int16" then
		return Region3int16.new(Vector3int16.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3]), Vector3int16.new(p1[4], p1[5], p1[6]))
	end
	if p2 == "UDim" then
		return UDim.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "UDim2" then
		return UDim2.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3], p1[4])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2" then
		return Vector2.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector2int16" then
		return Vector2int16.new(p1[1], p1[2])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3" then
		return Vector3.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
	end
	if p2 == "Vector3int16" then
		return Vector3int16.new(p1[1], p1[2], p1[3])
	else
		return nil
	end
end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.BloxbizSDK.Utils.Fusion.Animation.springCoefficients

-- https://lua.expert/
return function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ springCoefficients | Line: 14 ]]
	if p1 == 0 or p3 == 0 then
		return 1, 0, 0, 1
	end
	if p2 > 1 then
		local v1 = p1 * p3
		local v2 = math.sqrt(p2 ^ 2 - 1)
		local v3 = -0.5 / v2
		local v4 = -v2 - p2
		local v5 = 1 / v4
		local v6 = math.exp(v1 * v4)
		local v7 = math.exp(v1 * v5)
		return (v7 * v4 - v6 * v5) * v3, (v6 - v7) * v3 / p3, (v7 - v6) * v3 * p3, (v6 * v4 - v7 * v5) * v3
	end
	if p2 == 1 then
		local v8 = p1 * p3
		local v9 = math.exp(-v8)
		return v9 * (v8 + 1), v9 * p1, v9 * (-v8 * p3), v9 * (1 - v8)
	else
		local v10 = p1 * p3
		local v11 = math.sqrt(1 - p2 ^ 2)
		local v12 = v11 * v10
		local v13 = math.exp(-v10 * p2)
		local v14 = v13 * math.sin(v12)
		local v15 = v13 * math.cos(v12)
		local v16 = v14 * (1 / v11)
		local v17 = v16 * p2
		return v17 + v15, v16, -(v17 * p2 + v14 * v11), v15 - v17
	end
end

local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.PubTypes)
local cleanup = require(v1.Utility.cleanup)
local xtypeof = require(v1.Utility.xtypeof)
local logError = require(v1.Logging.logError)
local Observer = require(v1.State.Observer)
local function setProperty_unsafe(p1, p2, p3) --[[ setProperty_unsafe | Line: 23 ]]
	p1[p2] = p3
end
local function testPropertyAssignable(p1, p2) --[[ testPropertyAssignable | Line: 27 ]]
	p1[p2] = p1[p2]
end
local function setProperty(p1, p2, p3) --[[ setProperty | Line: 31 | Upvalues: setProperty_unsafe (copy), testPropertyAssignable (copy), logError (copy) ]]
	if pcall(setProperty_unsafe, p1, p2, p3) then
		return
	end
	if pcall(testPropertyAssignable, p1, p2) then
		local v1 = typeof(p3)
		logError("invalidPropertyType", nil, p1.ClassName, p2, typeof(p1[p2]), v1)
	elseif p1 == nil then
		logError("setPropertyNilRef", nil, p2, (tostring(p3)))
	else
		logError("cannotAssignProperty", nil, p1.ClassName, p2)
	end
end
local function bindProperty(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ bindProperty | Line: 51 | Upvalues: xtypeof (copy), setProperty (copy), Observer (copy) ]]
	if xtypeof(p3) == "State" then
		local v1 = false
		local function updateLater() --[[ updateLater | Line: 55 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), setProperty (ref), p1 (copy), p2 (copy), p3 (copy) ]]
			if v1 then
				return
			end
			v1 = true
			task.defer(function() --[[ Line: 58 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), setProperty (ref), p1 (ref), p2 (ref), p3 (ref) ]]
				v1 = false
				setProperty(p1, p2, p3:get(false))
			end)
		end
		setProperty(p1, p2, p3:get(false))
		table.insert(p4, Observer(p3):onChange(updateLater))
	else
		setProperty(p1, p2, p3)
	end
end
return function(p1, p2) --[[ applyInstanceProps | Line: 73 | Upvalues: xtypeof (copy), bindProperty (copy), logError (copy), cleanup (copy) ]]
	local t = {
		self = {},
		descendants = {},
		ancestor = {},
		observer = {}
	}
	local t2 = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		local v1 = xtypeof(k)
		if v1 == "string" then
			if k ~= "Parent" then
				bindProperty(p2, k, v, t2)
			end
			continue
		end
		if v1 == "SpecialKey" then
			local stage = k.stage
			local v2 = t[stage]
			if v2 == nil then
				logError("unrecognisedPropertyStage", nil, stage)
				continue
			end
			v2[k] = v
			continue
		end
		logError("unrecognisedPropertyKey", nil, xtypeof(k))
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.self) do
		k:apply(v, p2, t2)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.descendants) do
		k:apply(v, p2, t2)
	end
	if p1.Parent ~= nil then
		bindProperty(p2, "Parent", p1.Parent, t2)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.ancestor) do
		k:apply(v, p2, t2)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.observer) do
		k:apply(v, p2, t2)
	end
	p2.Destroying:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 121 | Upvalues: cleanup (ref), t2 (copy) ]]
		cleanup(t2)
	end)
end

local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.Types)
local captureDependencies = require(v1.Dependencies.captureDependencies)
local initDependency = require(v1.Dependencies.initDependency)
local useDependency = require(v1.Dependencies.useDependency)
local logErrorNonFatal = require(v1.Logging.logErrorNonFatal)

	__index = t
}
local t3 = {
	__mode = "k"
}
function t.get(p1, p2) --[[ get | Line: 28 | Upvalues: useDependency (copy) ]]

		useDependency(p1)
	end
	return p1._value
end
function t.update(p1) --[[ update | Line: 39 | Upvalues: captureDependencies (copy), needsDestruction (copy), logWarn (copy), isSimilar (copy), logErrorNonFatal (copy) ]]
	for k in pairs(p1.dependencySet) do
		k.dependentSet[p1] = nil
	end
	local _oldDependencySet = p1._oldDependencySet
	p1._oldDependencySet = p1.dependencySet
	p1.dependencySet = _oldDependencySet
	table.clear(p1.dependencySet)
	local v1, v2, v3 = captureDependencies(p1.dependencySet, p1._processor)
	if v1 then
		if p1._destructor == nil and needsDestruction(v2) then
			logWarn("destructorNeededComputed")
		end
		if v3 ~= nil then
			logWarn("multiReturnComputed")
		end
		local _value = p1._value
		local v4 = isSimilar(_value, v2)
		if p1._destructor ~= nil then
			p1._destructor(_value)
		end
		p1._value = v2
		for k in pairs(p1.dependencySet) do
			k.dependentSet[p1] = true
		end
		return not v4
	else
		logErrorNonFatal("computedCallbackError", v2)
		local _oldDependencySet_2 = p1._oldDependencySet
		p1._oldDependencySet = p1.dependencySet
		p1.dependencySet = _oldDependencySet_2
		for k in pairs(p1.dependencySet) do
			k.dependentSet[p1] = true
		end
		return false
	end
end

		type = "State",

		_value = nil,

	}

	t._processor = p1
	t._destructor = p2

end



PATH SOURCE : ReplicatedStorage.BloxbizSDK.Utils.Fusion.State.ForKeys

-- https://lua.expert/
local v1 = script.Parent.Parent
require(v1.PubTypes)
require(v1.Types)
local captureDependencies = require(v1.Dependencies.captureDependencies)
local initDependency = require(v1.Dependencies.initDependency)
local useDependency = require(v1.Dependencies.useDependency)
local parseError = require(v1.Logging.parseError)
local logErrorNonFatal = require(v1.Logging.logErrorNonFatal)
local logError = require(v1.Logging.logError)
local logWarn = require(v1.Logging.logWarn)
local cleanup = require(v1.Utility.cleanup)
local needsDestruction = require(v1.Utility.needsDestruction)
local t = {}
local t2 = {
	__index = t
}
local t3 = {
	__mode = "k"
}
function t.get(p1, p2) --[[ get | Line: 36 | Upvalues: useDependency (copy) ]]
	if p2 ~= false then
		useDependency(p1)
	end
	return p1._outputTable
end
function t.update(p1) --[[ update | Line: 62 | Upvalues: t3 (copy), captureDependencies (copy), needsDestruction (copy), logWarn (copy), logError (copy), cleanup (copy), parseError (copy), logErrorNonFatal (copy) ]]
	local _inputIsState = p1._inputIsState
	local v1 = if _inputIsState then p1._inputTable:get(false) else p1._inputTable
	local _oldInputTable = p1._oldInputTable
	local _outputTable = p1._outputTable
	local _keyOIMap = p1._keyOIMap
	local _keyIOMap = p1._keyIOMap
	local _meta = p1._meta
	local v2 = false
	for k in pairs(p1.dependencySet) do
		k.dependentSet[p1] = nil
	end
	local _oldDependencySet = p1._oldDependencySet
	p1._oldDependencySet = p1.dependencySet
	p1.dependencySet = _oldDependencySet
	table.clear(p1.dependencySet)
	if _inputIsState then
		p1._inputTable.dependentSet[p1] = true
		p1.dependencySet[p1._inputTable] = true
	end
	for k, v in pairs(v1) do
		local v3 = p1._keyData[k]
		if v3 == nil then
			local t = {}
			t.dependencySet = setmetatable({}, t3)
			t.oldDependencySet = setmetatable({}, t3)
			t.dependencyValues = setmetatable({}, t3)
			p1._keyData[k] = t
			v3 = t
		end
		local v7 = if _oldInputTable[k] == nil then true else false
		if v7 == false then
			for k2, v4 in pairs(v3.dependencyValues) do
				if v4 ~= k2:get(false) then
					v7 = true
					break
				end
			end
		end
		if v7 then
			local oldDependencySet = v3.oldDependencySet
			v3.oldDependencySet = v3.dependencySet
			v3.dependencySet = oldDependencySet
			table.clear(v3.dependencySet)
			local v8, v9, v10 = captureDependencies(v3.dependencySet, p1._processor, k)
			if v8 then
				if p1._destructor == nil and (needsDestruction(v9) or needsDestruction(v10)) then
					logWarn("destructorNeededForKeys")
				end
				local v11 = _keyOIMap[v9]
				local v12 = _keyIOMap[k]
				if v11 ~= k and v1[v11] ~= nil then
					logError("forKeysKeyCollision", nil, tostring(v9), tostring(v11), (tostring(v9)))
				end
				if v12 ~= v9 and _keyOIMap[v12] == k then
					local v16, v17 = xpcall(p1._destructor or cleanup, parseError, v12, _meta[v12])
					if not v16 then
						logErrorNonFatal("forKeysDestructorError", v17)
					end
					_keyOIMap[v12] = nil
					_outputTable[v12] = nil
					_meta[v12] = nil
				end
				_oldInputTable[k] = v
				_meta[v9] = v10
				_keyOIMap[v9] = k
				_keyIOMap[k] = v9
				_outputTable[v9] = v
				v2 = true
			else
				local oldDependencySet_2 = v3.oldDependencySet
				v3.oldDependencySet = v3.dependencySet
				v3.dependencySet = oldDependencySet_2
				logErrorNonFatal("forKeysProcessorError", v9)
			end
		end
		for k2 in pairs(v3.dependencySet) do
			v3.dependencyValues[k2] = k2:get(false)
			p1.dependencySet[k2] = true
			k2.dependentSet[p1] = true
		end
	end
	for k, v in pairs(_keyOIMap) do
		if v1[v] == nil then
			local v21, v22 = xpcall(p1._destructor or cleanup, parseError, k, _meta[k])
			if not v21 then
				logErrorNonFatal("forKeysDestructorError", v22)
			end
			_oldInputTable[v] = nil
			_meta[k] = nil
			_keyOIMap[k] = nil
			_keyIOMap[v] = nil
			_outputTable[k] = nil
			p1._keyData[v] = nil
			v2 = true
		end
	end

function t.setState(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ setState | Line: 481 | Upvalues: Utility (copy), v4 (copy) ]]
	if not p2 then
		p2 = if p1.isSelected then "Selected" else "Deselected"
	end
	local v2 = Utility.formatStateName(p2)
	if p1.activeState == v2 then
		return
	end
	local isSelected = p1.isSelected
	p1.activeState = v2
	if v2 == "Deselected" then
		p1.isSelected = false
		if isSelected then
			p1.toggled:Fire(false, p3, p4)
			p1.deselected:Fire(p3, p4)
		end
		p1:_setToggleItemsVisible(false, p3, p4)
	elseif v2 == "Selected" then
		p1.isSelected = true
		if not isSelected then
			p1.toggled:Fire(true, p3, p4)
			p1.selected:Fire(p3, p4)
			v4:Fire(p1, p3, p4)
		end
		p1:_setToggleItemsVisible(true, p3, p4)
	end
	p1.stateChanged:Fire(v2, p3, p4)
end

function t.align(p1, p2, p3) --[[ align | Line: 746 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = tostring(p2):lower()
	if v1 == "mid" or v1 == "centre" then
		v1 = "center"
	end
	if v1 ~= "left" and (v1 ~= "center" and v1 ~= "right") then
		v1 = "left"
	end
	local v2 = v1 == "center" and t.container.TopbarCentered or t.container.TopbarStandard
	local v3 = string.upper((string.sub(v1, 1, 1))) .. string.sub(v1, 2)
	if not p3 then
		p1.originalAlignment = v3
	end
	local joinedFrame = p1.joinedFrame
	local v4 = v2.Holders[v3]
	p1.screenGui = v2
	p1.alignmentHolder = v4
	if not p1.isDestroyed then
		p1.widget.Parent = joinedFrame or v4
	end
	p1.alignment = v3
	p1.alignmentChanged:Fire(v3)
	t.iconChanged:Fire(p1)
	return p1
end
t.setAlignment = t.align

function t.setTextFont(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ setTextFont | Line: 815 ]]
	local v1 = if p3 then p3 else Enum.FontWeight.Regular
	local v2 = if p4 then p4 else Enum.FontStyle.Normal
	local v3 = nil
	local v4 = typeof(p2)
	local v5, v6
	if v4 == "number" then
		v3, v5, v6 = Font.fromId(p2, v1, v2), v1, v2
	elseif v4 == "EnumItem" then
		v3, v5, v6 = Font.fromEnum(p2), v1, v2
	elseif v4 == "string" and not p2:match("rbxasset") then
		v3, v5, v6 = Font.fromName(p2, v1, v2), v1, v2
	else
		v5 = v1
		v6 = v2
	end
	if not v3 then
		v3 = Font.new(p2, v5, v6)
	end
	p1:modifyTheme({ "IconLabel", "FontFace", v3, p5 })
	return p1
end
function t.bindToggleItem(p1, p2) --[[ bindToggleItem | Line: 836 ]]
	if not (p2:IsA("GuiObject") or p2:IsA("LayerCollector")) then
		error("Toggle item must be a GuiObject or LayerCollector!")
	end
	p1.toggleItems[p2] = true
	p1:_updateSelectionInstances()
	return p1
end
function t.unbindToggleItem(p1, p2) --[[ unbindToggleItem | Line: 845 ]]
	p1.toggleItems[p2] = nil
	p1:_updateSelectionInstances()
	return p1
end
function t._updateSelectionInstances(p1) --[[ _updateSelectionInstances | Line: 851 ]]

		local t = {}

			if (v2:IsA("TextButton") or v2:IsA("ImageButton")) and v2.Active then
				table.insert(t, v2)
			end
		end
		p1.toggleItems[k] = t
	end
end

		if not p4 or (p4 == p1 or p4.toggleItems[k] == nil) then
			k[if k:IsA("LayerCollector") then "Enabled" else "Visible"] = p2
		end
	end

		p1.captionText = nil
	end

end

end

end

	if not p1.indicator then
		p1.indicator = p1.janitor:add(require(Elements.Indicator)(p1, t))
	end
	p1.indicatorSet:Fire(p2)
end
function t.destroy(p1) --[[ destroy | Line: 1076 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if p1.isDestroyed then
		return
	end
	p1:clearNotices()
	if p1.parentIconUID then
		p1:leave()
	end
	p1.isDestroyed = true
	p1.janitor:clean()
	t.iconRemoved:Fire(p1)
end
t.Destroy = t.destroy
return t

		return false
	else
		local v1 = Instance.new("ObjectValue")

		v1.Value = script.Parent
		v1.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
		return v1
	end
end

	end

function t.createStagger(p1, p2, p3) --[[ createStagger | Line: 13 ]]
	local v1 = false
	local v2 = false
	if not p1 or p1 == 0 then
		p1 = 0.01
	end
	local function v3(...) --[[ staggeredCallback | Line: 29 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), v2 (ref), p3 (copy), p1 (ref), p2 (copy), v3 (copy) ]]
		if v1 then
			v2 = true
		else
			local v12 = table.pack(...)

function t.reverseTable(p1) --[[ reverseTable | Line: 60 ]]
	for i = 1, math.floor(#p1 / 2) do
		local v1 = #p1 - i + 1
		local v3 = p1[i]
		p1[i] = p1[v1]
		p1[v1] = v3
	end
end
function t.copyTable(p1) --[[ copyTable | Line: 67 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	assert(type(p1) == "table", "First argument must be a table")
	local v2 = table.create(#p1)
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		if type(v) == "table" then
			v2[k] = t.copyTable(v)
			continue
		end
		v2[k] = v
	end
	return v2
end

				end

function t3.is(p1) --[[ is | Line: 971 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]
	if type(p1) ~= "table" then
		return false
	end

	if v1 == t3 then
		return true
	end

		end

		if not v2 then
			return false
		end
		if type((rawget(v2, "__call"))) == "function" then
			return true
		else
			return false
		end
	else

			return false
		end
		if type((rawget(v1, "__index"))) ~= "table" then
			return false
		end
		local v6 = rawget(rawget(v1, "__index"), "andThen")
		local v7

			v7 = true

		else
			v7 = false
		end

		else

		end
	end

local function cancel(p1) --[[ cancel | Line: 1414 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]
	if p1._status ~= t3.Status.Started then
		return
	end
	p1._status = t3.Status.Cancelled
	if p1._cancellationHook then
		p1._cancellationHook()
	end
	coroutine.close(p1._thread)
	if p1._parent then
		p1._parent:_consumerCancelled(p1)
	end
	for k in pairs(p1._consumers) do
		k:cancel()
	end
	p1:_finalize()
end
t3.prototype.cancel = cancel
local function _consumerCancelled(p1, p2) --[[ _consumerCancelled | Line: 1442 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]

		return
	end
	p1._consumers[p2] = nil
	if next(p1._consumers) ~= nil then
		return
	end
	p1:cancel()
end
t3.prototype._consumerCancelled = _consumerCancelled

local function _reject(p1, ...) --[[ _reject | Line: 1798 | Upvalues: t3 (copy), pack (copy) ]]

		return
	end

			end

local function _finalize(p1) --[[ _finalize | Line: 1852 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]

		coroutine.wrap(v)(p1._status)
	end

	p1._queuedReject = nil
	p1._queuedResolve = nil

		p1._parent = nil
		p1._consumers = nil
	end
	task.defer(coroutine.close, p1._thread)

function t.Encode(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 60 | Upvalues: f3 (copy), Properties (copy), f1 (copy), Compress (copy), t (copy), base92 (copy) ]]
	f3()
	local v2 = typeof(p1)
	if v2 == "Instance" and #p1:GetDescendants() ~= 0 then
		v2 = v2 .. "s"
	end
	local v3 = script.Encoders:FindFirstChild(v2)
	if not v3 then
		v3 = script.Encoders:FindFirstChild("Value")
	end

		f1("Failure to encode " .. v2)
		return true
	end

		v4 = Compress.compress(v4)
	end

		return base92.encode(v4)
	else
		return v4
	end
end
function t.Decode(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 99 | Upvalues: f3 (copy), t (copy), base92 (copy), Compress (copy), Binary (copy), f1 (copy), Properties (copy) ]]

	end
	p1 = Compress.decompress(p1)
	local v4 = Binary.DecodeData(p1)

		f1("Instnace/Datatype failed to decode correctly!")
		return
	end

	if not v5 then
		v5 = script.Encoders:FindFirstChild("Value")
	end

local DataIndex = require(script.DataIndex)
local v1 = require(script.Parent.Parent)
local t = {}
for k, v in pairs(DataIndex) do
	t[k] = {}
	for k2, v2 in pairs(v) do
		t[k][v2] = k2
	end
end
function DecodeData(p1) --[[ DecodeData | Line: 44 | Upvalues: t (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
	local t2 = {}
	local v2 = t.StoreType[string.byte(p1:sub(1, 1))] or "Invalid"
	if v2 == "Invalid" then
		v1.pprint("[SuperBiz][RBXLSerialize][Binary]:StoreType defined as Invalid? Binary Data may be corrupted?")
	else
		t2.TypeOf = v2
		local sum = 1
		local v3
		if v2 == "Instance" then
			t2.ClassName = t.InstanceName[string.byte(p1:sub(2, 2))] or "Invalid"
			sum = sum + 1
			v3 = "Ins:Prop"
		else
			v3 = ""
		end
		if v2 == "Value" then
			local v6 = t.DataType[string.byte(p1:sub(2, 2))] or "Invalid"
			t2.ClassName = v6
			t2[v6] = p1:sub(4, 4 + string.byte(p1:sub(3, 3)))
			sum = sum + 5
			v3 = "Val:Prop"
		end
		if v2 == "Root" then
			t2.ClassName = "Root"
			t2.Root = {}
			sum = sum - 1
			v3 = "Root:NewRoot"
		end
		while sum < #p1 do
			sum = sum + 1
			string.byte(p1:sub(sum, sum))
			if v3 == "Root:NewRoot" and sum + 3 < #p1 then
				local v7 = sum + 1
				local v8 = string.byte(p1:sub(v7, v7))
				local v9 = p1:sub(sum + 2, sum + 1 + v8)
				local v10 = sum + 2 + v8
				local v11 = string.byte(p1:sub(v10, v10))
				table.insert(t2.Root, { v9, (DecodeData((p1:sub(sum + 3 + v8, sum + 3 + v8 + v11)))) })
				sum = sum + (v8 + v11 + 1)
			end
			if v3 == "Ins:Prop" and sum + 2 < #p1 then
				local v16 = t.ValueType[string.unpack("H", (p1:sub(sum, sum + 1)))] or "Invalid"
				local v17 = sum + 1
				local v18 = v17 + 1
				local v19 = string.byte(p1:sub(v18, v18))
				local v20 = p1:sub(v17 + 2, v17 + 1 + v19)
				if v16 ~= "Invalid" then
					t2[v16] = v20
				end
				sum = v17 + v19 + 1
			end
		end
	end
	return t2
end
return {
	DecodeData = DecodeData,
	describe = function(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 21 | Upvalues: DataIndex (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
		local v12 = DataIndex[p1]
		if v12 and v12[p2] then
			if p1 == "ValueType" then
				return string.pack("H", v12[p2])
			else
				return string.char(v12[p2]) or 0
			end
		else
			if p1 ~= "Value" then
				v1.pprint("[SuperBiz][RBXLSerialize][Binary]:Could not describe", p1, p2)
				return 0
			end
			local v3 = tostring(p2)
			local v4 = #v3
			if v4 > 255 then
				v1.pprint("[SuperBiz][RBXLSerialize][Binary]:Cannot Encode DataValues more than 255 Bytes.")
			else
				return string.char(v4) .. v3 or 0
			end
		end
	end
}

function splitbyte(p1) --[[ splitbyte | Line: 2 ]]
	local v2, sum, v3 = 128, string.byte(p1), { false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false }
	for i = 1, 8 do
		if v2 <= sum then
			v3[i] = true
			sum = sum - v2
		end
		v2 = v2 / 2
	end
	return v3
end
function formbyte(...) --[[ formbyte | Line: 10 ]]
	local sum = 0
	for i = 1, 8 do
		if select(i, ...) then
			sum = sum + 2 ^ (8 - i)
		end
	end
	return string.char(sum)
end

function BuildClasses(p1) --[[ BuildClasses | Line: 44 ]]
	local function ApplyTags(p1) --[[ ApplyTags | Line: 49 ]]
		if not p1.tags then
			return
		end
		for i = 1, #p1.tags do
			local v1 = p1.tags[i]
			if v1:match("Security$") then
				p1.Security = v1
				continue
			end
			if v1 == "readonly" then
				p1.ReadOnly = true
				continue
			end
			if v1 == "hidden" then
				p1.Hidden = true
				continue
			end
			if v1 == "notCreatable" then
				p1.NotCreatable = true
				continue
			end
			if v1 == "notbrowsable" then
				p1.NotBrowsable = true
			end
		end
	end

			t[#t + 1] = v1

			v1.Properties = {}
			v1.Methods = {}

local function getCorners(p1, p2, p3) --[[ getCorners | Line: 80 ]]
	local t = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p3) do
		local v1 = math.floor(v / 4) % 2 * 2 - 1
		t[k] = p1 * (p2 * Vector3.new(v1, math.floor(v / 2) % 2 * 2 - 1, v % 2 * 2 - 1))
	end
	return t
end
local function getModelPointCloud(p1) --[[ getModelPointCloud | Line: 89 | Upvalues: t2 (copy), t3 (copy), t (copy), getCorners (copy) ]]
	local t4 = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p1:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") then
			for k2, v3 in pairs((getCorners(v.CFrame, v.Size / 2, if v:IsA("WedgePart") then t2 elseif v:IsA("CornerWedgePart") then t3 else t))) do
				table.insert(t4, v3)
			end
		end
	end
	return t4
end
local function viewProjectionEdgeHits(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ viewProjectionEdgeHits | Line: 103 ]]
	local v1 = (-1 / 0)
	local v2 = (1 / 0)
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		local v3 = p4 * (p3 - v.Z)
		local v4 = v[p2] + v3
		local v5 = v[p2] - v3
		local v6 = math.max(v1, v4, v5)
		v1, v2 = v6, math.min(v2, v4, v5)
	end
	return v1, v2
end
function t4.new(p1, p2) --[[ new | Line: 127 | Upvalues: t4 (copy) ]]
	local v2 = setmetatable({}, t4)
	v2.Model = nil
	v2.ViewportFrame = p1
	v2.WorldModel = p1:FindFirstChild("WorldModel")
	v2.Camera = p2
	local WorldModel = p1:FindFirstChild("WorldModel")
	if WorldModel then
		v2.WorldModel = WorldModel
	else
		local WorldModel_2 = Instance.new("WorldModel")
		WorldModel_2.Parent = p1
		v2.WorldModel = WorldModel_2
	end
	v2._points = {}
	v2._modelCFrame = CFrame.new()
	v2._modelSize = Vector3.new()
	v2._modelRadius = 0
	v2:Calibrate()
	return v2
end
function t4.SetModel(p1, p2) --[[ SetModel | Line: 159 | Upvalues: getModelPointCloud (copy) ]]
	p1.Model = p2
	p2.Parent = p1.WorldModel
	local v1, v2 = p2:GetBoundingBox()
	p1._points = getModelPointCloud(p2)
	p1._modelCFrame = v1
	p1._modelSize = v2
	p1._modelRadius = v2.Magnitude / 3
end
function t4.Calibrate(p1) --[[ Calibrate | Line: 173 ]]
	local t = {}
	local AbsoluteSize = p1.ViewportFrame.AbsoluteSize
	t.aspect = AbsoluteSize.X / AbsoluteSize.Y
	t.yFov2 = math.rad(p1.Camera.FieldOfView / 2)
	t.tanyFov2 = math.tan(t.yFov2)
	t.xFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * t.aspect)
	t.tanxFov2 = math.tan(t.xFov2)
	t.cFov2 = math.atan(t.tanyFov2 * math.min(1, t.aspect))
	t.sincFov2 = math.sin(t.cFov2)
	p1._viewport = t
end
function t4.GetFitDistance(p1, p2) --[[ GetFitDistance | Line: 195 ]]
	return (p1._modelRadius + (p2 and (p2 - p1._modelCFrame.Position).Magnitude or 0)) / p1._viewport.sincFov2
end
function t4.GetMinimumFitCFrame(p1, p2) --[[ GetMinimumFitCFrame | Line: 207 | Upvalues: viewProjectionEdgeHits (copy) ]]
	if not p1.Model then
		return CFrame.new()
	end
	local v1 = (p2 - p2.Position):Inverse()
	local _points = p1._points
	local t = { v1 * _points[1] }
	local Z = t[1].Z
	for i = 2, #_points do
		local v2 = v1 * _points[i]
		local v3 = math.min(Z, v2.Z)
		t[i] = v2
		Z = v3
	end
	local v4, v5 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "X", Z, p1._viewport.tanxFov2)
	local v6, v7 = viewProjectionEdgeHits(t, "Y", Z, p1._viewport.tanyFov2)
	return p2 * CFrame.new((v4 + v5) / 2, (v6 + v7) / 2, Z + math.max((v4 - v5) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanxFov2, (v6 - v7) / 2 / p1._viewport.tanyFov2))
end
return t4

function t.Open(p1) --[[ Open | Line: 379 | Upvalues: v6 (ref), v7 (ref), v4 (ref), t (copy), StarterGui (copy), v2 (ref) ]]
	if not v6 and v7 then
		v7()
		if not v4 then
			local sum = 0
			while not v4 and sum < 15 do
				task.wait(0.1)
				sum = sum + 0.1
			end
		end
	end
	if not v4 or t.Enabled:get() then
		return
	end
	t.LastChatActiveState = StarterGui:GetCore("ChatActive")
	t.LastPlayerListState = StarterGui:GetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.PlayerList)
	v2:FireServer()
	t.Controllers.TopBarController.OpenCategory = p1
	if t.TopbarButton then
		t.TopbarButton:select()
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.Controllers) do
		if v.OnOpen then
			v:OnOpen()
		end
	end
	t.Enabled:set(true)
	task.defer(function() --[[ Line: 413 | Upvalues: StarterGui (ref) ]]
		StarterGui:SetCore("ChatActive", false)
		StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.PlayerList, false)
	end)
end
function t.Close() --[[ Close | Line: 419 | Upvalues: t (copy), StarterGui (copy) ]]
	t.Enabled:set(false)
	StarterGui:SetCore("ChatActive", t.LastChatActiveState)
	StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.PlayerList, t.LastPlayerListState)
	if t.TopbarButton then
		t.TopbarButton:deselect()
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.Controllers) do
		if v.OnClose then
			v:OnClose()
		end
	end
end

end
function t.PromptBuyOutfit() --[[ PromptBuyOutfit | Line: 443 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	t.Open()

	t.Controllers.BuyOutfitController:ShowModal()
end
function t.ToggleCatalog(p1) --[[ ToggleCatalog | Line: 451 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t.Enabled:get() then
		t.Close()
	else
		t.Open(p1)
	end
end

end

		v2:set(up_votes)
	end

		TextColor3 = {
			Default = Color3.new(0/255, 0/255, 0/255),
			Hover = Color3.new(0/255, 0/255, 0/255),
			MouseDown = Color3.new(0/255, 0/255, 0/255),
			Disabled = Color3.new(0/255, 0/255, 0/255)
		},
		TextTransparency = {
			Default = 0,
			Hover = 0.1,
			MouseDown = 0.2,
			Disabled = 0.3
		},
		Callback = function(p12, p2) --[[ Callback | Line: 114 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			if not p12:get() then
				return
			end
			p12:set(false)
			local Action = p1.Action
			if Action == "like" and p1.OwnLike:get() then
				Action = "unlike"
			end
			if Action == "like" then
				p1.Likes:set(p1.Likes:get() + 1)
				p1.OwnLike:set(true)
			elseif Action == "unlike" then
				p1.Likes:set(p1.Likes:get() - 1)
				p1.OwnLike:set(false)
			end
			task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 131 | Upvalues: p1 (ref), Action (ref) ]]
				if p1.Callback(Action) then
					return
				end
				if Action == "like" then
					p1.Likes:set(p1.Likes:get() - 1)
					p1.OwnLike:set(false)
					return
				end
				if Action ~= "unlike" then
					return
				end
				p1.Likes:set(p1.Likes:get() + 1)
				p1.OwnLike:set(true)
			end)
			p12:set(true)
		end
	})
end
local function CreateViewport(p1) --[[ CreateViewport | Line: 151 | Upvalues: AvatarHandler (copy), ViewportFrame (copy) ]]
	local v1 = AvatarHandler.GetModel(p1)
	local Animate = v1:FindFirstChild("Animate")
	if not Animate then
		return ViewportFrame({
			RotateEnabled = true,
			AutoRotateEnabled = true,
			AnimTrack = nil,
			Model = v1,
			Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.19, 1),
			Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.00159, 0.5),
			AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
		})
	end
	Animate.Disabled = true
	return ViewportFrame({
		RotateEnabled = true,
		AutoRotateEnabled = true,
		AnimTrack = nil,
		Model = v1,
		Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.19, 1),
		Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.00159, 0.5),

	})
end

function t11.BuildItemData(p1, p2) --[[ BuildItemData | Line: 485 | Upvalues: t11 (copy) ]]

			v1 = 2
		end
	end

		AssetType = t11.GetAssetTypeIdFromString(AssetType, p2)
	end

	t.IsLimited = v1
	t.Available = p1.UnitsAvailableForConsumption
	t.Purchased = p1.PurchaseCount
	return t
end

function t11.IsValidAssetType(p1) --[[ IsValidAssetType | Line: 702 | Upvalues: t6 (copy), t9 (copy) ]]

function t11.GetAssetTypeIdFromString(p1, p2) --[[ GetAssetTypeIdFromString | Line: 714 | Upvalues: t9 (copy), t6 (copy), v3 (copy) ]]
	if p1 == "TShirt" then
		return if p2 then Enum.AccessoryType.TShirt or 2 else 2
	elseif p1 == "Hat" then
		return if p2 then Enum.AccessoryType.Hat or 8 else 8
	else
		if p1 == "EmoteAnimation" then
			return 61
		end
		if p1 == "DynamicHead" then
			return 79
		end
		if p1:find("Accessory") then
			for v32, v4 in t9 do
				if v4.Name .. "Accessory" == p1 then
					return if p2 then if v4 then v4 else v32 else v32
				end
			end
		else
			for v6, v7 in t6 do
				if v7 == p1 then
					return if p2 then if v7 then v7 else v6 else v6
				end
			end
		end
		v3.pprint("[Superbiz] Could not find AssetTypeId for AssetTypeString", p1)
		return 1
	end
end

end
function t11.OutfitToHumDesc(p1, p2) --[[ OutfitToHumDesc | Line: 752 | Upvalues: t7 (copy), t6 (copy), t9 (copy), v3 (copy) ]]
	local v1 = p2 and p2:Clone() or Instance.new("HumanoidDescription")
	v1.Shirt = nil
	v1.Pants = nil
	v1.Head = nil
	v1.LeftArm = nil
	v1.RightArm = nil
	v1.LeftLeg = nil
	v1.RightLeg = nil
	v1.Torso = nil
	for k, v in pairs(p1.BodyColors) do
		v1[k] = v
	end
	local v2 = p2 and p2:GetAccessories(true) or {}
	local t = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		if k ~= "BodyColors" then
			local AssetId = v.AssetId
			local AssetType = v.AssetType
			local v32 = tonumber(AssetType)
			local v5 = t6[tonumber(AssetType)]
			local v6 = t9[tonumber(AssetType)]
			if v5 then
				v1[v5] = AssetId
				continue
			end
			if v6 then
				table.insert(t, v3.search(v2, function(p1) --[[ Line: 783 | Upvalues: AssetId (copy) ]]
					return p1.AssetId == AssetId
				end) or {
					AccessoryType = v6,
					AssetId = AssetId
				})
				continue
			end
			if not t7[v32] and v32 ~= 61 then
				v3.pprint("[SuperBiz] Asset is not an accessory, emote or a valid HumDesc property")
				v3.pprint(AssetType)
			end
		end
	end
	v1:SetAccessories(t, true)

		if v._holder == p1 then
			v2 = true
			break
		end
	end

		v9._data._percent = SliderFuncs.getAlphaBetween(p2.SliderData.Start, p2.SliderData.End, p2.SliderData.DefaultValue)

local t = {
	snapToScale = function(p1, p2) --[[ snapToScale | Line: 3 ]]
		return math.clamp(math.round(p1 / p2) * p2, 0, 1)
	end
}
function lerp(p1, p2, p3) --[[ lerp | Line: 7 ]]
	return (1 - p3) * p1 + p3 * p2
end
function t.map(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6) --[[ map | Line: 11 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = lerp(p4, p5, t.getAlphaBetween(p2, p3, p1))
	if not p6 then
		return v1
	end
	if p4 < p5 then
		p4, p5 = p5, p4
	end
	return math.max(math.min(v1, p4), p5)
end
function t.getNewPosition(p1) --[[ getNewPosition | Line: 31 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	local v1 = p1._data.Button.AbsoluteSize[p1._config.Axis]
	local v2 = p1._holder.AbsoluteSize[p1._config.Axis]
	local v3 = p1._data.Button.AnchorPoint[p1._config.Axis]
	local v4 = v3 * v1 / v2 + p1._config.Padding / v2
	local v5 = t.map(p1._data._percent, 0, 1, v4, 1 - v4 + (2 * v1 * v3 - v1) / v2, true)
	if p1._config.Axis == "X" then
		return UDim2.fromScale(v5, p1._data.Button.Position.Y.Scale)
	else
		return UDim2.fromScale(p1._data.Button.Position.X.Scale, v5)
	end
end
function t.getScaleIncrement(p1) --[[ getScaleIncrement | Line: 50 ]]
	return 1 / ((p1._config.SliderData.End - p1._config.SliderData.Start) / p1._config.SliderData.Increment)
end
function t.getAlphaBetween(p1, p2, p3) --[[ getAlphaBetween | Line: 54 ]]
	return (p3 - p1) / (p2 - p1)
end
function t.getNewValue(p1) --[[ getNewValue | Line: 58 ]]
	local v1 = lerp(p1._config.SliderData.Start, p1._config.SliderData.End, p1._data._percent)
	local v2 = 1 / p1._config.SliderData.Increment
	return math.round(v1 * v2) / v2
end
return t

function t2.LoadCurrentOutfit(p1, p2, p3) --[[ LoadCurrentOutfit | Line: 611 | Upvalues: AvatarHandler (copy), t (copy), v7 (copy) ]]
	local v1 = if p2 then p2 else p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid
	local v2, v3, v4 = AvatarHandler.GetCurrentOutfit(p1.EquippedItems:get(), v1)
	v2.BodyColors = AvatarHandler.GetCurrentBodyColors(v1:GetAppliedDescription())
	local t2 = {}
	for k, v in pairs(v2) do
		if k ~= "BodyColors" then
			t2[tostring(v.AssetId)] = v
		end
	end
	p1.EquippedItems:set(t2)
	local v6 = if #v3 > 0 then true else false
	if table.find(v3, "BodyColors") then
		v6 = #v3 - 1 > 0
	end
	if p1.Controllers and p1.Controllers.BodyEditorController then
		p1.Controllers.BodyEditorController:UpdateSliders(v4)
	end
	if t.PersistentWear then
		task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 644 | Upvalues: p3 (copy), p1 (copy), v4 (copy), v7 (ref) ]]
			if p3 then
				p1:ApplyOutfit(p1.EquippedItems:get(), v4)
			end
			p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid:ApplyDescription(v4)
			local v1 = p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid.Parent
			if v1:FindFirstChild("Head") or v1:FindFirstChild("DynamicHead") then
				p1.OutfitLoaded:Fire()
				return
			end
			v7.pprint("Dynamic head was unable to load due to Roblox bug, reverting to default head")
			v4.Head = 2432102561
			p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid:ApplyDescription(v4)
			p1.OutfitLoaded:Fire()
		end)
	else
		p1.OutfitLoaded:Fire()
	end
	return (if #v2 > 0 then true else false) or v6
end

		if not v4 then
			return
		end

	end
end

function t2.GetLastEquippedAsset(p1, p2, p3) --[[ GetLastEquippedAsset | Line: 819 | Upvalues: v7 (copy) ]]

	end

		p3 = 1
	end

		return p2 ~= "BodyColors"
	end)
	local v2 = v7.filter(v1, function(p1) --[[ Line: 829 | Upvalues: p2 (ref) ]]
		return table.find(p2, p1.AssetType)
	end)
	local v3 = if p3 <= v7.getArraySize(v2) then v2 else v1
	v7.sortByKey(v3, function(p1) --[[ Line: 837 ]]
		return -(p1.equippedAt or 0)
	end)
	return v3[p3]
end
function t2.AddChange(p1, p2, p3) --[[ AddChange | Line: 841 | Upvalues: v7 (copy), AvatarHandler (copy), HumanoidDescriptionProperties (copy), ExceedsWearLimit (copy), t (copy), v2 (ref) ]]

	local AssetId = p2.AssetId
	local AssetType = p2.AssetType
	local v1 = if p2.BundleId == nil then false else true
	local Humanoid = p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid
	local v22 = Humanoid:GetAppliedDescription()
	local t2 = {
		Old = {
			Outfit = v7.deepCopy(p1.EquippedItems:get()),
			Desc = v22
		}
	}
	if v1 then
		local v3, _, _2 = AvatarHandler.GetHumDescFromBundle(v22, p2, false)
		Humanoid:ApplyDescription(v3)
		local v4 = Humanoid.Parent
		if not (v4:FindFirstChild("Head") or v4:FindFirstChild("DynamicHead")) then
			v7.pprint("Dynamic head was unable to load due to Roblox bug, reverting to default head")
			v3.Head = 2432102561
			Humanoid:ApplyDescription(v3)
		end
		p1:LoadCurrentOutfit(Humanoid)
		AvatarHandler.ReplicateBundle(HumanoidDescriptionProperties.FetchDescriptionToTable(v3))
	elseif p1:IsItemEquipped(p2) then
		if AvatarHandler:Remove(Humanoid, AssetId, AssetType) then
			v7.pprint("reloading outfit with default clothes")
			task.wait()
			p1:LoadCurrentOutfit(Humanoid, false)
		else
			p1:UpdateEquippedItems(AssetId, nil)
		end
	else
		local v5 = p1.EquippedItems:get()
		local v6, _ = ExceedsWearLimit(v5, p1.AssetWearingLimits, AssetType)
		local v72 = table.find(t.BottomTypes, AssetType)

			v6 = v7.getArraySize(v5) >= 50
		end
		if v6 then
			local AssetId_2 = v10.AssetId
			AvatarHandler:Remove(Humanoid, AssetId_2, v10.AssetType)
			p1:UpdateEquippedItems(AssetId_2, nil)
		end
		v2:FireServer(AssetId, p2.Name, p3)
		v7.pprint("try on fired in", p3)
		p2.Order = p1:GetMaxOrder() + 1
		local v11 = AvatarHandler:TryOn(Humanoid, AssetId, AssetType, not t.PersistentWear, p2.Order)
		p1:UpdateEquippedItems(AssetId, p2)
		if v11 then
			p1:UpdateEquippedItems(v11, nil)
		end
	end

		Outfit = v7.deepCopy(p1.EquippedItems:get()),
		Desc = Humanoid:GetAppliedDescription()
	}
	p1.UndoChanges:AddChange(t2)
	p1.RedoChanges:DropChanges()
	AvatarHandler.UpdateViewportRender(p1.GuiObjects.ViewportFrame, false, p1.zoom:get())
	p1.GuiObjects.LoadingFrame.Visible = false
	task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 939 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		task.wait(0.1)
		p1.PlayerDescChanged:set(false)
	end)
end
function t2.ReverseChange(p1, p2) --[[ ReverseChange | Line: 945 | Upvalues: v7 (copy), GetTableDiff (copy), AvatarHandler (copy), HumanoidDescriptionProperties (copy) ]]
	p1.GuiObjects.LoadingFrame.Visible = true
	local v1 = if p2 then p1.UndoChanges:GetLatestChange() else p1.RedoChanges:GetLatestChange()
	if not v1 then
		return
	end
	if p1.Debounces.TryItemDebounce then
		return
	end
	p1.Debounces.TryItemDebounce = true
	local v4, v5
	if p2 then
		v4 = v1.Old.Desc
		v5 = v1.Old.Outfit
	else
		v4 = v1.New.Desc
		v5 = v1.New.Outfit
	end
	local v6 = v7.deepCopy(v5)
	local v72, v8 = GetTableDiff(p1.EquippedItems:get(), v6)
	for k, v in pairs(v8) do
		p1:UpdateEquippedItems(v, nil)
	end
	for k, v in pairs(v6) do
		if table.find(v72, v.AssetId) then
			p1:UpdateEquippedItems(v.AssetId, v)
		end
	end
	p1.AvatarObjects.Humanoid:ApplyDescription(v4)
	AvatarHandler.ReplicateBundle(HumanoidDescriptionProperties.FetchDescriptionToTable(v4))
	AvatarHandler.UpdateViewportRender(p1.GuiObjects.ViewportFrame, false, p1.zoom:get())
	if p2 then
		p1.RedoChanges:AddChange(v1)
		p1.UndoChanges:RemoveLatestChange()
	else
		p1.UndoChanges:AddChange(v1)
		p1.RedoChanges:RemoveLatestChange()
	end
	p1.Debounces.TryItemDebounce = false
	p1.GuiObjects.LoadingFrame.Visible = false
end

function t2.ResetChanges(p1) --[[ ResetChanges | Line: 1119 | Upvalues: v7 (copy), AvatarHandler (copy), GetTableDiff (copy), t (copy), v4 (ref) ]]

		return
	end

			Outfit = v7.deepCopy(p1.EquippedItems:get()),
			Desc = Humanoid:GetAppliedDescription()

end

end
function t2.OnClose(p1) --[[ OnClose | Line: 1193 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if t.PersistentWear then
		p1:ApplyScalesToPlayerHumanoid()
	end
	p1.FullScreen:set(false)
	p1.Scene:set(p1.Scenes:get()[1])
	p1:StopPosing()
end
function t2.OnOpen(p1) --[[ OnOpen | Line: 1203 | Upvalues: Players (copy), t (copy), AvatarHandler (copy) ]]

	local v1 = Character and Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
	task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 1207 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), t (ref), v1 (copy), AvatarHandler (ref) ]]
		p1.GuiObjects.LoadingFrame.Visible = true
		if t.PersistentWear then
			p1:LoadCurrentOutfit(v1, false)
		else
			p1:LoadCurrentOutfit()
		end

	end)

local function GetTableType(p1) --[[ GetTableType | Line: 20 ]]
	if next(p1) == nil then
		return
	end
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		if typeof(k) ~= "number" or typeof(k) == "number" and (k % 1 ~= 0 or k < 0) then
			return "Dictionary"
		end
	end
	return "Array"
end
local function GetTableSize(p1) --[[ GetTableSize | Line: 33 | Upvalues: GetTableType (copy) ]]
	local v1 = GetTableType(p1)
	if v1 == "Array" then
		return #p1
	end
	if v1 ~= "Dictionary" then
		return 0
	end
	local count = 0
	for v2 in p1 do
		count = count + 1
	end
	return count
end

function t5.ClearItemFrame(p1) --[[ ClearItemFrame | Line: 821 ]]

function t.GetSortedPage(p1, p2, p3) --[[ GetSortedPage | Line: 60 ]]

		p1.SortedPages[p3] = {}
		v1 = p1.SortedPages[p3]
	end

	end

end
function t.GetNormalPage(p1, p2) --[[ GetNormalPage | Line: 74 ]]

	end

end

	else

	end

function t3.ResetFeed(p1, p2) --[[ ResetFeed | Line: 572 ]]
	local v1 = p1.FeedsById[p2]
	local v2 = v1.LoadedOutfits:get()
	local OutfitsCache = p1.OutfitsCache
	for i, v in ipairs(v2) do
		local v3
		v3 = if type(v) == "string" and v then v else v.guid
		if OutfitsCache[v3] then
			OutfitsCache[v3].Frame:Destroy()
			OutfitsCache[v3].Frame = nil
			OutfitsCache[v3] = nil
		end
	end
	v1.Page:set(0)
	v1.LastRefresh:set(tick())
	v1.LoadedOutfits:set({})
	v1.LoadedAll:set(false)
	v1.ScrollY:set(0)
end
function t3.SwitchToFeed(p1, p2, p3) --[[ SwitchToFeed | Line: 594 | Upvalues: t2 (copy) ]]
	p1:CancelLoading()

		p1.TopDropdownOpen:set(false)
	end
	p1.States.Loading:set(true)
	p1.States.SwitchingFeed:set(true)

	v1.SwitchFailed:set(false)
	v1.LoadFailed:set(false)

		p3 = true
	end
	if not v1.Searchable then
		p1.States.Query:set(t2)
	end
	if p3 or tick() - v1.LastRefresh:get() > 60 then
		v1.ShouldRefresh:set(false)
		p1:ResetFeed(p2)
	end
	local ScrollingFrame = p1.GuiObjects.ScrollingFrame
	ScrollingFrame.CanvasPosition = Vector2.zero
	p1:ClearWindow()
	task.wait(0.1)
	local v2 = p3 and {} or v1.LoadedOutfits:get()
	if #v2 > 0 then
		p1:RenderOutfits(v2, 0, true):andThen(function() --[[ Line: 632 | Upvalues: ScrollingFrame (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
			ScrollingFrame.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, v1.ScrollY:get() or 0)
		end):catch(function() --[[ Line: 635 ]] end):finally(function() --[[ Line: 637 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			p1.States.Loading:set(false)
			p1.States.SwitchingFeed:set(false)
		end)
	else
		p1:LoadNextPage()
		ScrollingFrame.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
	end
end
function t3.UpdateFilters(p1) --[[ UpdateFilters | Line: 647 | Upvalues: v15 (copy) ]]
	local keywords = p1.States.Query:get().keywords
	local v1 = if keywords then #keywords > 0 else keywords
	local v2 = v15.deepCopy(p1.FilterTabs:get())
	for k, v in pairs(v2) do
		if v1 then
			local Internal = v.Internal
			if not Internal then
				Internal = not (v.Searchable or v.SearchOnly)
			end
			v2[k].Hidden = Internal
			continue
		end
		v2[k].Hidden = v.Internal or v.SearchOnly
	end
	p1.FilterTabs:set(v2)
	p1:MarkAllForRefresh()
	local v7 = p1.States.CurrentFeedId:get()
	local v8 = v15.search(v2, function(p1) --[[ Line: 664 | Upvalues: v7 (copy) ]]
		return p1.Id == v7
	end)
	if not p1.Enabled or v8 and not v8.Hidden then
		return
	end
	local v9 = v15.search(v2, function(p1) --[[ Line: 667 ]]
		return not p1.Hidden
	end)
	p1.States.CurrentFeedId:set(v9.Id)
	p1:SwitchToFeed(v9.Id, true)
end
function t3.LoadNextPage(p1) --[[ LoadNextPage | Line: 673 ]]
	p1.States.Loading:set(true)
	local v2 = p1.FeedsById[p1.States.CurrentFeedId:get()]
	v2.SwitchFailed:set(false)
	v2.LoadFailed:set(false)
	v2.Page:set(v2.Page:get() + 1)
	local v3 = v2.Page:get()
	local v4 = v2.LoadedOutfits:get()
	local v5, v6 = p1:GetOutfitsFromFeedId(v2.Id, p1.States.Query:get(), v3)
	if v5 then
		if not (#v6 > 0) then
			v2.LoadedAll:set(true)
			p1.States.Loading:set(false)
			p1.States.SwitchingFeed:set(false)
			return
		end
		p1:RenderOutfits(v6, #v4, v3 == 1):andThen(function() --[[ Line: 691 ]] end):catch(function() --[[ Line: 693 ]] end):finally(function() --[[ Line: 695 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			p1.States.Loading:set(false)
			p1.States.SwitchingFeed:set(false)
		end)
		for v9, v10 in v6 do
			table.insert(v4, v10)
		end
		v2.LoadedOutfits:set(v4)
	else
		p1.States.Loading:set(false)
		p1.States.SwitchingFeed:set(false)
		v2.LoadFailed:set(true)
		v2.SwitchFailed:set(v3 == 1)
		v2.Page:set(v3 - 1)
		v2.ErrorType:set(v6.status)

function t3.ProcessOutfit(p1, p2, p3) --[[ ProcessOutfit | Line: 1347 | Upvalues: AvatarHandler (copy) ]]
	local HumanoidDescription = Instance.new("HumanoidDescription")
	local v1 = HumanoidDescription:GetAccessories(false)
	local t = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p3) do
		local v2 = AvatarHandler.BuildItemData(v, true)
		if v2 then
			local AssetType = v2.AssetType
			if AssetType == "Shirt" then
				HumanoidDescription.Shirt = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "TShirt" then
				HumanoidDescription.GraphicTShirt = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "Pants" then
				HumanoidDescription.Pants = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "Torso" then
				HumanoidDescription.Torso = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "Head" or (AssetType == "DynamicHead" or AssetType == 79) then
				HumanoidDescription.Head = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "RightArm" then
				HumanoidDescription.RightArm = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "LeftArm" then
				HumanoidDescription.LeftArm = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "RightLeg" then
				HumanoidDescription.RightLeg = v2.AssetId
			elseif AssetType == "LeftLeg" then
				HumanoidDescription.LeftLeg = v2.AssetId
			else
				v1[#v1 + 1] = {
					AccessoryType = v2.AssetType,
					AssetId = v2.AssetId,
					Order = k
				}
				HumanoidDescription:SetAccessories(v1, true)
			end
		end
		local v3 = AvatarHandler.BuildItemData(v, false)
		if v3 then
			v3.Order = k
			t[v3.AssetId] = v3
		end
	end
	HumanoidDescription.HeadColor = p2.Colors.Head and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.Head) or Color3.new()
	HumanoidDescription.TorsoColor = p2.Colors.Torso and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.Torso) or Color3.new()
	HumanoidDescription.LeftArmColor = p2.Colors.LeftArm and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.LeftArm) or Color3.new()
	HumanoidDescription.LeftLegColor = p2.Colors.LeftLeg and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.LeftLeg) or Color3.new()
	HumanoidDescription.RightArmColor = p2.Colors.RightArm and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.RightArm) or Color3.new()
	HumanoidDescription.RightLegColor = p2.Colors.RightLeg and Color3.fromHex(p2.Colors.RightLeg) or Color3.new()
	t.BodyColors = {
		HeadColor = HumanoidDescription.HeadColor,
		TorsoColor = HumanoidDescription.TorsoColor,
		LeftArmColor = HumanoidDescription.LeftArmColor,
		LeftLegColor = HumanoidDescription.LeftLegColor,
		RightArmColor = HumanoidDescription.RightArmColor,
		RightLegColor = HumanoidDescription.RightLegColor
	}
	return HumanoidDescription, t, {}
end
function t3.SearchFor(p1, p2) --[[ SearchFor | Line: 1416 ]]
	local v1 = if p2 and #p2 > 0 then if #(p1.States.Query:get().keywords or "") == 0 then true else false else false
	p1.States.Query:set({
		keywords = p2
	})
	p1:MarkAllForRefresh(function(p1) --[[ Line: 1427 ]]
		return p1.Searchable
	end)
	if v1 then
		p1.States.CurrentFeedId:set("relevance")
		p1:SwitchToFeed("relevance", true)
	else
		p1:SwitchToFeed(p1.States.CurrentFeedId:get(), true)
	end
end
return t3

local function validateShopData(p1) --[[ validateShopData | Line: 218 ]]
	local v1 = p1.Name
	local Group = p1.Group
	local Emoji = p1.Emoji
	if typeof(v1) ~= "string" or #v1 < 3 then
		return false
	end
	if typeof(Emoji) ~= "string" or #Emoji < 1 then
		return false
	end
	if not Group then
		return false
	end
	if typeof(Group.value) ~= "number" then
		return false
	end
	for v2 in p1.Items do
		return true
	end
end
function t.OnCreateShop(p1, p2) --[[ OnCreateShop | Line: 242 | Upvalues: validateShopData (copy), v6 (ref), v7 (ref), ShopClass (copy) ]]

			p1.PopupProps:set({

		end
