local function getShopItemsFromSections(p1) --[[ getShopItemsFromSections | Line: 319 | Upvalues: InventoryHandler (copy), Players (copy), GroupService (copy) ]]
	local v1 = p1[1]
	local t = {}
	local t2 = {}
	local t3 = {}
	for v2, v3 in v1.featured_items do
		if v3.itemType == "Bundle" then
			table.insert(t2, v3.id)
			continue
		end
		table.insert(t, v3.id)
	end
	local v4 = InventoryHandler.GetBatchItemDetails(t, Enum.AvatarItemType.Asset)
	local v5 = InventoryHandler.GetBatchItemDetails(t2, Enum.AvatarItemType.Bundle)
	for v6, v7 in v4 do
		local Id = v7.Id
		t3[Id .. "_Item"] = {
			Type = "Item",
			Data = v7.Name,
			Id = Id
		}
	end
	for v8, v9 in v5 do
		local Id = v9.Id
		t3[Id .. "_Item"] = {
			Type = "Item",
			IsBundle = true,
			Data = v9.Name,
			Id = Id
		}
	end
	for v10, v11 in v1.queries do
		local Keyword = v11.Keyword
		local CreatorType = v11.CreatorType
		if Keyword then
			t3[Keyword .. "_Search term"] = {
				Type = "Search term",
				Data = Keyword,
				Id = Keyword
			}
			continue
		end
		if CreatorType then
			local v12 = if CreatorType == 1 then "User" else "Group"
			local CreatorTargetId = v11.CreatorTargetId
			local v13 = "Unknown"
			if v12 == "User" then
				local v14, v15 = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 380 | Upvalues: Players (ref), CreatorTargetId (copy) ]]
					return Players:GetNameFromUserIdAsync(CreatorTargetId)
				end)
				if v14 then
					v13 = v15
				end
			else
				local v16, v17 = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 388 | Upvalues: GroupService (ref), CreatorTargetId (copy) ]]
					return GroupService:GetGroupInfoAsync(CreatorTargetId)
				end)
				if v16 then
					v13 = v17.Name
				end
			end
			t3[CreatorTargetId .. "_" .. v12] = {
				Data = v13,
				Id = CreatorTargetId,
				Type = v12
			}
		end
	end
	return t3
end

function t.SwitchToFeed(p1, p2) --[[ SwitchToFeed | Line: 518 | Upvalues: ClearListFrame (copy) ]]
	local CurrentFeedId = p1.CurrentFeedId
	if CurrentFeedId:get() == p2 then
		return
	end
	CurrentFeedId:set(p2)
	p1:CancelLoading()
	local v1 = p1:GetFeed(p2)
	if tick() - p1.LastRefresh > 60 then
		p1:ClearAllFeedsCache()
	elseif v1.ShouldRefresh then
		p1:ClearFeedCache(p2)
	end
	ClearListFrame(p1.Guis.ShopListFrame)
	local v2 = v1.GetShops()
	if #v2 > 0 then
		table.insert(p1.LoadingPromises, p1:LoadFromCache(v2):andThen(function() --[[ Line: 539 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			p1.Loading:set(false)
		end))
	else
		p1:LoadNextPage(v1)
	end
end
function t.LoadFromCache(p1, p2, p3) --[[ LoadFromCache | Line: 547 | Upvalues: Promise (copy), ShopPreview (copy) ]]

		if not p3 then
			p1.Loading:set(true)
		end
		for v1, v2 in p2 do
			ShopPreview(p1, v2).Parent = ShopListFrame
		end
		p12()
	end)
end
function t.LoadNextPage(p1, p2, p3) --[[ LoadNextPage | Line: 564 | Upvalues: ClearListFrame (copy) ]]
	if not p3 then
		p1.Loading:set(true)
	end
	p2.Page = p2.Page + 1
	local Page = p2.Page
	local v1, v2 = p1:GetShopsFromFeedId(p2.id, Page)
	if not v1 then
		print("Handle page load failed!")
		p2.Page = p2.Page - 1
		p1.Loading:set(false)
		return
	end
	if #v2 > 0 then
		table.insert(p1.LoadingPromises, p1:LoadFromCache(p2.CacheShops(v2), p3):andThen(function() --[[ Line: 579 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
			p1.Loading:set(false)
		end))
		return
	end
	if Page == 1 then
		ClearListFrame(p1.Guis.ShopListFrame)
	end
	p2.LoadedAll = true
	p1.Loading:set(false)
end
function t.ClearFeedCache(p1, p2) --[[ ClearFeedCache | Line: 598 ]]
	local v1 = p1:GetFeed(p2)
	v1.Page = 0
	v1.ScrollY = 0
	v1.CachedShops = {}
	v1.LoadedAll = false
end
function t.ClearAllFeedsCache(p1) --[[ ClearAllFeedsCache | Line: 606 ]]
	for v1 in p1.FeedsById do
		p1:ClearFeedCache(v1)
	end
	p1.LikedShops:set({})
	p1.LastRefresh = tick()
end
function t.CancelLoading(p1) --[[ CancelLoading | Line: 615 ]]
	for v1, v2 in p1.LoadingPromises do
		v2:cancel()
	end
	p1.LoadingPromises = {}
end
function t.Enable(p1) --[[ Enable | Line: 623 ]]
	if not p1.Enabled:get() then
		p1.Enabled:set(true)
		p1.Controllers.CategoryController:Disable(true)
		p1.Controllers.OutfitsController:Disable()
		p1.Controllers.InventoryController:Disable()
		p1.Controllers.BodyEditorController:Disable()
		p1:SwitchToFeed(p1.Tabs[1].Id)
	end
end
function t.Disable(p1) --[[ Disable | Line: 638 ]]
	p1.Enabled:set(false)
	p1:CancelLoading()

function t.SwitchToSearchAll(p1) --[[ SwitchToSearchAll | Line: 168 ]]
	p1.SearchInCategory:set(false)
	p1:SearchAllItems(p1.SearchQuery:get())
end
function t.OnCategoryClick(p1, p2) --[[ OnCategoryClick | Line: 173 ]]
	p1.CurrentCategory:set(p2)
	p1.SearchInCategory:set(true)
	if p2 == "feed" then
		p1.Controllers.NavigationController:SwitchTo("OutfitFeed")
		return
	end
	if p2 == "shops" then
		p1.Controllers.NavigationController:SwitchTo("ShopFeed")
	else
		p1.Controllers.CategoryController.CurrentCategoryId:set(p2, true)
		p1.Controllers.NavigationController:SwitchTo("CategoryController")
	end
end
function t.SearchAllItems(p1, p2) --[[ SearchAllItems | Line: 187 ]]
	if p2 and #p2 == 0 then
		p2 = nil
	end
	if p2 then
		p1.CurrentCategory:set(nil)
		p1.Controllers.NavigationController:SwitchTo("CategoryController")
		p1.Controllers.CategoryController:LoadCategory("Search", p2)
	else
		p1:OnCategoryClick(p1.DefaultCategory)
	end
end
function t.Reset(p1) --[[ Reset | Line: 201 ]]
	p1:ResetSearchBar()
	p1.CurrentCategory:set(nil)
end
function t.ResetSearchBar(p1) --[[ ResetSearchBar | Line: 206 ]]
	p1.SearchQuery:set(nil)
end
function t.SearchFor(p1, p2) --[[ SearchFor | Line: 210 ]]
	p1.SearchInCategory:set(false)
	p1.SearchQuery:set(p2)
	p1:SearchAllItems(p2)
end
function t.GetButton(p1, p2) --[[ GetButton | Line: 216 ]]
	return p1.GuiObjects.Buttons[p2]
end
function t.SwitchToCategoryOrSearch(p1, p2) --[[ SwitchToCategoryOrSearch | Line: 220 ]]
	if p2:lower() == "outfits" or p2:lower() == "feed" then
		p1:OnCategoryClick("feed")
		return
	end
	if p2:lower() == "shops" then
		p1:OnCategoryClick("shops")
		return
	end
	local v1 = p1.Controllers.CategoryController:GetCategoryId(p2)
	if v1 then
		p1:OnCategoryClick(v1)
	else
		p1:SearchFor(p2)
	end
end
function t.OnOpen(p1) --[[ OnOpen | Line: 240 ]]
	p1.SearchQuery:set(nil)
	task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 243 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
		if p1.OpenCategory then
			local OpenCategory = p1.OpenCategory
			p1.OpenCategory = nil
			p1:SwitchToCategoryOrSearch(OpenCategory)
			return
		end
		if p1.CurrentCategory:get() then
			p1:OnCategoryClick(p1.CurrentCategory:get())
			return
		end
		if p1.categories and #p1.categories > 0 then
			p1:OnCategoryClick(1)
		else
			p1:OnCategoryClick(p1.DefaultCategory:get())
		end
	end)
end
return t

	local count = 0
	for v1 in p3 do
		count = count + 1
	end
	if count ~= p1 then
		return true
	end
	for v2 in p3 do
		if v2 == "BodyColors" then
			for v3, v4 in p3.BodyColors do
				if BodyColors[v3] ~= v4 then
					return true
				end
			end
			continue
		end
		if not p2[tonumber(v2)] then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end
local function DoesOutfitExist(p1, p2) --[[ DoesOutfitExist | Line: 325 | Upvalues: DataManager (copy), IsValidOutfit (copy) ]]

local function PromptPurchase(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ PromptPurchase | Line: 533 | Upvalues: RateLimiter (copy), t7 (copy), checkForLimitedLocked (copy), v2 (ref), MarketplaceService (copy) ]]

local function PromptPurchaseOutfit(p1, p2) --[[ PromptPurchaseOutfit | Line: 555 | Upvalues: RateLimiter (copy), t7 (copy), checkForLimitedLocked (copy), MarketplaceService (copy) ]]

		return
	end

		if checkForLimitedLocked(v.BundleId or v.AssetId, v.BundleId and true or false) then
			p2[k] = nil
		end
	end

		local t2 = {}

		t2.Type = v.BundleId and Enum.MarketplaceProductType.AvatarBundle or Enum.MarketplaceProductType.AvatarAsset
		table.insert(t, t2)
	end

end

local function nullifyQuery(p1) --[[ nullifyQuery | Line: 317 ]]

	end

local function ProcessImpressionsQueue(p1, p2) --[[ ProcessImpressionsQueue | Line: 697 | Upvalues: Utils (copy), BatchHTTP (copy) ]]
	local t = {}
	local t2 = {}
	for k, v in pairs(p1) do
		table.insert(t, {
			viewer = k,
			outfits = v
		})
	end
	for k, v in pairs(p2) do
		table.insert(t2, {
			viewer = k,
			outfits = v
		})
	end
	if not (#t + #t2 > 0) then
		return
	end
	Utils.pprint("Outfit impressions:", t)
	Utils.pprint("Outfit try ons:", t2)
	local _, _2 = BatchHTTP.request("POST", "/catalog/outfits/record-stats", {
		impressions = t,
		try_ons = t2
	})
end

		end
	end)
end

local function getSections(p1) --[[ getSections | Line: 212 ]]
	local t = {
		id = "default",
		name = "Default",
		queries = {},
		featured_items = {}
	}
	local t2 = {}
	for v1, v2 in p1 do
		local Id = v2.Id
		local Type = v2.Type
		local IsBundle = v2.IsBundle
		if Type == "Search term" and typeof(Id) == "string" then
			table.insert(t.queries, {
				Keyword = Id
			})
		end
		if Type == "Group" and typeof(Id) == "number" then
			table.insert(t.queries, {
				CreatorType = 2,
				CreatorTargetId = Id
			})
		end
		if Type == "User" and typeof(Id) == "number" then
			table.insert(t.queries, {
				CreatorType = 1,
				CreatorTargetId = Id
			})
		end
		if Type == "Item" and typeof(Id) == "number" then
			local t3 = {
				id = Id
			}
			t3.item_type = if IsBundle then "Bundle" else "Asset"
			table.insert(t.featured_items, t3)
		end
	end
	if #t.queries == 0 and #t.featured_items == 0 then
		return false
	end
	table.insert(t2, t)
	return t2
end

function t.GetAssetTypeNumber(p1) --[[ GetAssetTypeNumber | Line: 64 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if not p1 then
		return 0
	end
	for k, v in pairs(t.ASSET_TYPE_TO_ENUM) do
		if v == p1 or tostring(v):match((tostring(p1))) then
			return k
		end
	end
	return 0
end

end

local t = {
	TransformRobloxItem = function(p1) --[[ TransformRobloxItem | Line: 26 | Upvalues: CatalogEnums (copy) ]]
		if p1.ItemType == "Asset" then
			local v1 = 0
			if p1.ItemRestrictions then
				if table.find(p1.ItemRestrictions, "LimitedUnique") or table.find(p1.ItemRestrictions, "Collectible") then
					v1 = 1
				elseif table.find(p1.ItemRestrictions, "Limited") then
					v1 = 2
				end
			end
			local v2 = CatalogEnums.GetAssetTypeNumber(p1.AssetType)
			local v3 = p1.LowestPrice or p1.Price or 0
			return {
				DataSource = "RobloxAPI",
				Name = p1.Name,
				Price = v3,
				AssetId = p1.Id,
				AssetType = v2,
				IsForSale = if v3 > 0 then true elseif p1.Price == nil then false else true,
				IsLimited = v1,
				Available = p1.UnitsAvailableForConsumption or 0,
				Purchased = p1.PurchaseCount or 0
			}
		else
			if p1.ItemType ~= "Bundle" then
				return nil
			end
			local t = {
				Name = p1.Name
			}
			t.Price = p1.LowestPrice or p1.Price or 0
			t.BundleId = p1.Id
			t.BundleType = p1.BundleType and tostring(p1.BundleType) or "Unknown"
			return t
		end
	end,
	AdvanceToPage = function(p1, p2) --[[ AdvanceToPage | Line: 69 ]]
		if p2 <= 1 then
			return true
		end
		for i = 1, p2 - 1 do
			if p1.IsFinished then
				return false
			end
			if not pcall(function() --[[ Line: 79 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
				p1:AdvanceToNextPageAsync()
			end) then
				return false
			end
		end
		return true
	end
}

end

			return nil
		end

			v1 = 2
		end

			Name = p1.name
		}
		t.Price = p1.lowestPrice or p1.price
		t.AssetId = p1.id

		t.IsLimited = v1
		t.Available = p1.unitsAvailableForConsumption
		t.Purchased = p1.purchaseCount
		return t
	end,

		}

	end

function t.DownloadPage(p1, p2) --[[ DownloadPage | Line: 66 | Upvalues: merge (copy), HttpService (copy), t (copy) ]]

	local v3 = AdRequestStats:getClientPlayerStats(p1)

	for i = 1, 2 do
		local v6, v7 = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 81 | Upvalues: HttpService (ref), p2 (copy), v4 (ref) ]]
			return HttpService:PostAsync(p2, v4, Enum.HttpContentType.ApplicationJson)
		end)

				return HttpService:JSONDecode(v7)
			end)
			if not (v8 and v9.data) then
				return nil, nil
			end
			v5 = v9
			break
		end
		if not (i < 2) then
			warn("[PopMall] ProxyUtils.DownloadPage failed after " .. 2 .. " attempts: " .. tostring(v7))
			return nil, nil
		end
		task.wait(math.min(2 ^ i, 8) + math.random() * 2)
	end
	if not (v5 and v5.data) then
		return nil, nil
	end

	for v12, v13 in v5.data do
		local v11
		v11 = if v13.itemType == "Asset" then t.BuildAssetData(v13) else t.BuildBundleData(v13)

		end
	end

	lastPlayerOpenedTime = {}
}
local function queueItemTryOn(p1) --[[ queueItemTryOn | Line: 15 | Upvalues: BatchHTTP (copy) ]]

		event_type = "popup_shop_try_on",
		data = p1
	})
end
local function queueShopOpen(p1) --[[ queueShopOpen | Line: 20 | Upvalues: BatchHTTP (copy) ]]
	table.insert(BatchHTTP.eventQueue, {
		event_type = "popup_shop_open",
		data = p1
	})
end
function t.onItemTryOn(p1, p2, p3) --[[ onItemTryOn | Line: 25 | Upvalues: AdRequestStats (copy), merge (copy), BatchHTTP (copy) ]]
	local t = {
		bloxbiz_ad_id = p3.bloxbizAdId,
		item_id = p3.itemId,
		asset_name = p3.assetName,
		item_category = p3.itemCategory,
		timestamp = os.time()
	}
	local v1 = AdRequestStats:getGameStats()
	local v2 = AdRequestStats:getPlayerStatsWithClientStatsYielding(p2)
	local v3 = merge(merge(t, v1), v2)
	table.insert(BatchHTTP.eventQueue, {
		event_type = "popup_shop_try_on",
		data = v3
	})
	return v3
end
function t.onPopUpShopOpened(p1, p2, p3) --[[ onPopUpShopOpened | Line: 43 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	if not t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p2] then
		t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p2] = {}
	end
	t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p2][p3.bloxbizAdId] = tick()
end
function t.onPopUpShopClosed(p1, p2, p3) --[[ onPopUpShopClosed | Line: 55 | Upvalues: t (copy), AdRequestStats (copy), merge (copy), BatchHTTP (copy) ]]
	if not t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p2] then
		return
	end
	local v1 = t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p2]
	local bloxbizAdId = p3.bloxbizAdId
	local v2 = v1[bloxbizAdId]
	if v2 then
		local v3 = tick() - v2
		v1[bloxbizAdId] = nil
		local t2 = {
			bloxbiz_ad_id = bloxbizAdId,
			time_spent = v3,
			timestamp = os.time()
		}
		local v4 = AdRequestStats:getGameStats()
		local v5 = AdRequestStats:getPlayerStatsWithClientStatsYielding(p2)
		local v6 = merge(merge(t2, v4), v5)
		table.insert(BatchHTTP.eventQueue, {
			event_type = "popup_shop_open",
			data = v6
		})
		return v6
	end
end
function t.connectToEvents(p1) --[[ connectToEvents | Line: 85 | Upvalues: ReplicatedStorage (copy), RateLimiter (copy), Players (copy), t (copy) ]]
	ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("BloxbizRemotes"):WaitForChild("PopUpShopEvent").OnServerEvent:Connect(function(p12, p2, p3) --[[ Line: 89 | Upvalues: RateLimiter (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
		if RateLimiter:checkRateLimiting(p12) then
			return
		end
		if p2 == "ItemTryOn" then
			p1:onItemTryOn(p12, p3)
			return
		end
		if p2 == "PopUpShopOpened" then
			p1:onPopUpShopOpened(p12, p3)
			return
		end
		if p2 ~= "PopUpShopClosed" then
			return
		end
		p1:onPopUpShopClosed(p12, p3)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(p1) --[[ Line: 103 | Upvalues: t (ref) ]]
		if not t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p1] then
			return
		end
		t.lastPlayerOpenedTime[p1] = nil
	end)
end
function t.init() --[[ init | Line: 110 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
	t:connectToEvents()
end
return t

local function GetTime(p1) --[[ GetTime | Line: 10 ]]
	local v2 = math.abs(os.time() - os.time({
		year = tonumber(p1:sub(1, 4)),
		month = tonumber(p1:sub(6, 7)),
		day = tonumber(p1:sub(9, 10)),
		hour = tonumber(p1:sub(12, 13)),
		min = tonumber(p1:sub(15, 16)),
		sec = tonumber(p1:sub(18, 19))
	}))
	if v2 < 60 then
		return string.format("%d seconds ago", v2), 1
	end
	if v2 < 3600 then
		return string.format("%d minutes ago", v2 / 60), 2
	end
	if v2 < 86400 then
		return string.format("%d hours ago", v2 / 3600), 3
	end
	if v2 < 604800 then
		return string.format("%d days ago", v2 / 86400), 4
	end
	if v2 < 2592000 then
		return string.format("%d weeks ago", v2 / 604800), 5
	end
	if v2 < 31536000 then
		return string.format("%d months ago", v2 / 2592000), 6
	else
		return string.format("%d years ago", v2 / 31536000), 7
	end
end

function AddListItem(p1, p2) --[[ AddListItem | Line: 11 ]]
	local t = {
		Signal = p1,
		Callback = p2,
		Last = p1.Last
	}
	if t.Last then
		t.Last.Next = t
	end
	p1.Last = t
	return t
end
function DisconnectListItem(p1) --[[ DisconnectListItem | Line: 20 ]]
	if p1.Signal.Last == p1 then
		p1.Signal.Last = p1.Last
	end
	if p1.Last then
		p1.Last.Next = p1.Next
	end
	if p1.Next then
		p1.Next.Last = p1.Last
	end
	p1.Callback = nil
end

		Last = nil
	}, t)
end

function t.Wait(p1) --[[ Wait | Line: 42 ]]

function t.Fire(p1, ...) --[[ Fire | Line: 50 ]]
	if p1.Killed then
		return
	end
	local Last = p1.Last
	while Last do
		local Callback = Last.Callback
		local v1 = typeof(Callback)
		if v1 == "thread" then
			DisconnectListItem(Last)
			task.spawn(Callback, ...)
		elseif v1 == "function" then
			task.spawn(Callback, ...)
		end
		Last = Last.Last
	end
end
function t.FireDeferred(p1, ...) --[[ FireDeferred | Line: 70 ]]
	task.defer(p1.Fire, p1, ...)
end
function t.Destroy(p1) --[[ Destroy | Line: 74 ]]

		p1.Killed = true
		p1.Last = nil
	end

function t3.is(p1) --[[ is | Line: 971 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]
	if type(p1) ~= "table" then
		return false
	end
	local v1 = getmetatable(p1)
	if v1 == t3 then
		return true
	end

		end

		if not v2 then
			return false
		end

			return true
		else
			return false
		end

			return false
		end
		if type((rawget(v1, "__index"))) ~= "table" then
			return false
		end

			v7 = true

		else
			v7 = false
		end

		else
			return false
		end
	end

local function cancel(p1) --[[ cancel | Line: 1414 | Upvalues: t3 (copy) ]]
	if p1._status ~= t3.Status.Started then
		return
	end
	p1._status = t3.Status.Cancelled
	if p1._cancellationHook then
		p1._cancellationHook()
	end
	coroutine.close(p1._thread)
	if p1._parent then
		p1._parent:_consumerCancelled(p1)
	end
	for k in pairs(p1._consumers) do
		k:cancel()
	end
	p1:_finalize()
end
t3.prototype.cancel = cancel

		return

	if next(p1._consumers) ~= nil then
		return
	end
	p1:cancel()
end

local function _resolve(p1, ...) --[[ _resolve | Line: 1727 | Upvalues: t3 (copy), t2 (ref), pack (copy) ]]
	if p1._status == t3.Status.Started then
		if t3.is((...)) then
			if select("#", ...) > 1 then
				warn((string.format("When returning a Promise from andThen, extra arguments are discarded! See:\n\n%s", p1._source)))
			end
			local v2 = ...
			local v3 = v2:andThen(function(...) --[[ Line: 1748 | Upvalues: p1 (copy) ]]
				p1:_resolve(...)
			end, function(...) --[[ Line: 1750 | Upvalues: v2 (copy), t2 (ref), p1 (copy) ]]
				local v1 = v2._values[1]
				if v2._error then
					v1 = t2.new({
						context = "[No stack trace available as this Promise originated from an older version of the Promise library (< v2)]",
						error = v2._error,
						kind = t2.Kind.ExecutionError
					})
				end
				if t2.isKind(v1, t2.Kind.ExecutionError) then
					return p1:_reject(v1:extend({
						error = "This Promise was chained to a Promise that errored.",
						trace = "",
						context = string.format("The Promise at:\n\n%s\n...Rejected because it was chained to the following Promise, which encountered an error:\n", p1._source)
					}))
				else
					p1:_reject(...)
				end
			end)
			if v3._status == t3.Status.Cancelled then
				p1:cancel()
				return
			end
			if v3._status ~= t3.Status.Started then
				return
			end
			p1._parent = v3
			v3._consumers[p1] = true
		else
			p1._status = t3.Status.Resolved
			local v4, v5 = pack(...)
			p1._valuesLength = v4
			p1._values = v5
			for i, v in ipairs(p1._queuedResolve) do
				coroutine.wrap(v)(...)
			end
			p1:_finalize()
		end
	else
		if not t3.is((...)) then

	local v1, v2, v3 = p1:ToOrientation()
	return string.format("CFrame(%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)", p1.X, p1.Y, p1.Z, v1, v2, v3)
end
local function Vector3ToString(p1) --[[ Vector3ToString | Line: 5 ]]

end

end
local function StringToCFrame(p1) --[[ StringToCFrame | Line: 18 ]]
	local v1, v2, v3, v4, v5, v6 = p1:match("CFrame%((.-),(.-),(.-),(.-),(.-),(.-)%)")

end

end
local function StringToColor(p1) --[[ StringToColor | Line: 30 ]]

local function StringToValue(p1) --[[ StringToValue | Line: 43 | Upvalues: StringToVector2 (copy), StringToColor (copy) ]]

	end

		local v7, v8, v9 = p1:match("Vector3%((.-),(.-),(.-)%)")

	end

		return StringToVector2(p1)
	end
	if p1:match("Color") then
		return StringToColor(p1)
	end
	if p1:match("Bool") then
		return p1:match("Bool%((.+)%)") == "true"
	else
		return p1
	end
end

function t3.InitInstanceListeners(p1, p2, p3) --[[ InitInstanceListeners | Line: 161 ]]
